apokrithen de to pneuma to ponēron eipen ton iēsoun ginōskō kai ton paulon epistamai umeis de tines este
kai ephallomenos ep autous o anthrōpos en ō ēn to pneuma to ponēron kai katakurieusas autōn ischusen kat autōn ōste gumnous kai tetraumatismenous ekphugein ek tou oikou ekeinou
touto de egeneto gnōston pasin ioudaiois te kai ellēsin tois katoikousin tēn epheson kai epepesen phobos epi pantas autous kai emegaluneto to onoma tou kuriou iēsou
polloi te tōn pepisteukotōn ērchonto exomologoumenoi kai anangellontes tas praxeis autōn
ikanoi de tōn ta perierga praxantōn sunenenkantes tas biblous katekaion enōpion pantōn kai sunepsēphisan tas timas autōn kai euron arguriou muriadas pente
outōs kata kratos o logos tou kuriou ēuxanen kai ischuen
ōs de eplērōthē tauta etheto o paulos en tō pneumati dielthōn tēn makedonian kai achaian poreuesthai eis ierousalēm eipōn oti meta to genesthai me ekei dei me kai rōmēn idein
meta de to pausasthai ton thorubon proskalesamenos o paulos tous mathētas kai aspasamenos exēlthen poreuthēnai eis tēn makedonian
dielthōn de ta merē ekeina kai parakalesas autous logō pollō ēlthen eis tēn ellada
poiēsas te mēnas treis genomenēs autō epiboulēs upo tōn ioudaiōn mellonti anagesthai eis tēn surian egeneto gnōmē tou upostrephein dia makedonias
suneipeto de autō achri tēs asias sōpatros beroiaios thessalonikeōn de aristarchos kai sekoundos kai gaios derbaios kai timotheos asianoi de tuchikos kai trophimos
outoi proelthontes emenon ēmas en trōadi
ēmeis de exepleusamen meta tas ēmeras tōn azumōn apo philippōn kai ēlthomen pros autous eis tēn trōada achris ēmerōn pente ou dietripsamen ēmeras epta
en de tē mia tōn sabbatōn sunēgmenōn tōn mathētōn tou klasai arton o paulos dielegeto autois mellōn exienai tē epaurion pareteinen te ton logon mechri mesonuktiou
ēsan de lampades ikanai en tō uperōō ou ēsan sunēgmenoi
kathēmenos de tis neanias onomati eutuchos epi tēs thuridos katapheromenos upnō bathei dialegomenou tou paulou epi pleion katenechtheis apo tou upnou epesen apo tou tristegou katō kai ērthē nekros
katabas de o paulos epepesen autō kai sumperilabōn eipen mē thorubeisthe ē gar psuchē autou en autō estin
anabas de kai klasas arton kai geusamenos eph ikanon te omilēsas achris augēs outōs exēlthen
ēgagon de ton paida zōnta kai pareklēthēsan ou metriōs
ēmeis de proelthontes epi to ploion anēchthēmen eis tēn asson ekeithen mellontes analambanein ton paulon outōs gar ēn diatetagmenos mellōn autos pezeuein
ōs de sunebalen ēmin eis tēn asson analabontes auton ēlthomen eis mitulēnēn
kakeithen apopleusantes tē epiousē katēntēsamen antikru chiou tē de etera parebalomen eis samon kai meinantes en trōgulliō tē echomenē ēlthomen eis milēton
ekrinen gar o paulos parapleusai tēn epheson opōs mē genētai autō chronotribēsai en tē asia espeuden gar ei dunaton ēn autō tēn ēmeran tēs pentēkostēs genesthai eis ierosoluma
apo de tēs milētou pempsas eis epheson metekalesato tous presbuterous tēs ekklēsias
ōs de paregenonto pros auton eipen autois umeis epistasthe apo prōtēs ēmeras aph ēs epebēn eis tēn asian pōs meth umōn ton panta chronon egenomēn
douleuōn tō kuriō meta pasēs tapeinophrosunēs kai pollōn dakruōn kai peirasmōn tōn sumbantōn moi en tais epiboulais tōn ioudaiōn
ōs ouden upesteilamēn tōn sumpherontōn tou mē anangeilai umin kai didaxai umas dēmosia kai kat oikous
ōs de egeneto anachthēnai ēmas apospasthentas ap autōn euthudromēsantes ēlthomen eis tēn kōn tē de exēs eis tēn rodon kakeithen eis patara
kai eurontes ploion diaperōn eis phoinikēn epibantes anēchthēmen
anaphanantes de tēn kupron kai katalipontes autēn euōnumon epleomen eis surian kai katēchthēmen eis turon ekeise gar ēn to ploion apophortizomenon ton gomon
kai aneurontes mathētas epemeinamen autou ēmeras epta oitines tō paulō elegon dia tou pneumatos mē anabainein eis ierousalēm
ote de egeneto ēmas exartisai tas ēmeras exelthontes eporeuometha propempontōn ēmas pantōn sun gunaixin kai teknois eōs exō tēs poleōs kai thentes ta gonata epi ton aigialon prosēuxametha
kai aspasamenoi allēlous epebēmen eis to ploion ekeinoi de upestrepsan eis ta idia
ēmeis de ton ploun dianusantes apo turou katēntēsamen eis ptolemaida kai aspasamenoi tous adelphous emeinamen ēmeran mian par autois
tē de epaurion exelthontes oi peri ton paulon ēlthomen eis kaisareian kai eiselthontes eis ton oikon philippou tou euangelistou tou ontos ek tōn epta emeinamen par autō
toutō de ēsan thugateres parthenoi tessares prophēteuousai
epimenontōn de ēmōn ēmeras pleious katēlthen tis apo tēs ioudaias prophētēs onomati agabos

kai elthōn pros ēmas kai aras tēn zōnēn tou paulou dēsas te autou tas cheiras kai tous podas eipen tade legei to pneuma to agion ton andra ou estin ē zōnē autē outōs dēsousin en ierousalēm oi ioudaioi kai paradōsousin eis cheiras ethnōn
ōs de ēkousamen tauta parekaloumen ēmeis te kai oi entopioi tou mē anabainein auton eis ierousalēm
apekrithē de o paulos ti poieite klaiontes kai sunthruptontes mou tēn kardian egō gar ou monon dethēnai alla kai apothanein eis ierousalēm etoimōs echō uper tou onomatos tou kuriou iēsou
mē peithomenou de autou ēsuchasamen eipontes to thelēma tou kuriou genesthō
meta de tas ēmeras tautas aposkeuasamenoi anebainomen eis ierousalēm
sunēlthon de kai tōn mathētōn apo kaisareias sun ēmin agontes par ō xenisthōmen mnasōni tini kupriō archaiō mathētē
genomenōn de ēmōn eis ierosoluma asmenōs edexanto ēmas oi adelphoi
tē de epiousē eisēei o paulos sun ēmin pros iakōbon pantes te paregenonto oi presbuteroi
kai aspasamenos autous exēgeito kath en ekaston ōn epoiēsen o theos en tois ethnesin dia tēs diakonias autou
oi de akousantes edoxazon ton kurion eipon te autō theōreis adelphe posai muriades eisin ioudaiōn tōn pepisteukotōn kai pantes zēlōtai tou nomou uparchousin
katēchēthēsan de peri sou oti apostasian didaskeis apo mōseōs tous kata ta ethnē pantas ioudaious legōn mē peritemnein autous ta tekna mēde tois ethesin peripatein
ti oun estin pantōs dei plēthos sunelthein akousontai gar oti elēluthas
touto oun poiēson o soi legomen eisin ēmin andres tessares euchēn echontes eph eautōn
andres adelphoi kai pateres akousate mou tēs pros umas nun apologias
akousantes de oti tē ebraidi dialektō prosephōnei autois mallon pareschon ēsuchian kai phēsin

egō men eimi anēr ioudaios gegennēmenos en tarsō tēs kilikias anatethrammenos de en tē polei tautē para tous podas gamaliēl pepaideumenos kata akribeian tou patrōou nomou zēlōtēs uparchōn tou theou kathōs pantes umeis este sēmeron
os tautēn tēn odon ediōxa achri thanatou desmeuōn kai paradidous eis phulakas andras te kai gunaikas

ōs kai o archiereus marturei moi kai pan to presbuterion par ōn kai epistolas dexamenos pros tous adelphous eis damaskon eporeuomēn axōn kai tous ekeise ontas dedemenous eis ierousalēm ina timōrēthōsin
egeneto de moi poreuomenō kai engizonti tē damaskō peri mesēmbrian exaiphnēs ek tou ouranou periastrapsai phōs ikanon peri eme
epeson te eis to edaphos kai ēkousa phōnēs legousēs moi saoul saoul ti me diōkeis
egō de apekrithēn tis ei kurie eipen te pros me egō eimi iēsous o nazōraios on su diōkeis
oi de sun emoi ontes to men phōs etheasanto kai emphoboi egenonto tēn de phōnēn ouk ēkousan tou lalountos moi
eipon de ti poiēsō kurie o de kurios eipen pros me anastas poreuou eis damaskon kakei soi lalēthēsetai peri pantōn ōn tetaktai soi poiēsai
ōs de ouk eneblepon apo tēs doxēs tou phōtos ekeinou cheiragōgoumenos upo tōn sunontōn moi ēlthon eis damaskon
ananias de tis anēr eusebēs kata ton nomon marturoumenos upo pantōn tōn katoikountōn ioudaiōn
elthōn pros me kai epistas eipen moi saoul adelphe anablepson kagō autē tē ōra aneblepsa eis auton
o de eipen o theos tōn paterōn ēmōn proecheirisato se gnōnai to thelēma autou kai idein ton dikaion kai akousai phōnēn ek tou stomatos autou
oti esē martus autō pros pantas anthrōpous ōn eōrakas kai ēkousas
kai nun ti melleis anastas baptisai kai apolousai tas amartias sou epikalesamenos to onoma tou kuriou
egeneto de moi upostrepsanti eis ierousalēm kai proseuchomenou mou en tō ierō genesthai me en ekstasei
kai idein auton legonta moi speuson kai exelthe en tachei ex ierousalēm dioti ou paradexontai sou tēn marturian peri emou
kagō eipon kurie autoi epistantai oti egō ēmēn phulakizōn kai derōn kata tas sunagōgas tous pisteuontas epi se
kai ote execheito to aima stephanou tou marturos sou kai autos ēmēn ephestōs kai suneudokōn tē anairesei autou kai phulassōn ta imatia tōn anairountōn auton
kai eipen pros me poreuou oti egō eis ethnē makran exapostelō se
ēkouon de autou achri toutou tou logou kai epēran tēn phōnēn autōn legontes aire apo tēs gēs ton toiouton ou gar kathēkon auton zēn
kraugazontōn de autōn kai riptountōn ta imatia kai koniorton ballontōn eis ton aera
ekeleusen auton o chiliarchos agesthai eis tēn parembolēn eipōn mastixin anetazesthai auton ina epignō di ēn aitian outōs epephōnoun autō
ōs de proeteinan auton tois imasin eipen pros ton estōta ekatontarchon o paulos ei anthrōpon rōmaion kai akatakriton exestin umin mastizein
akousas de o ekatontarchos proselthōn apēngeilen tō chiliarchō legōn ora ti melleis poiein o gar anthrōpos outos rōmaios estin
proselthōn de o chiliarchos eipen autō lege moi ei su rōmaios ei o de ephē nai
apekrithē te o chiliarchos egō pollou kephalaiou tēn politeian tautēn ektēsamēn o de paulos ephē egō de kai gegennēmai
eutheōs oun apestēsan ap autou oi mellontes auton anetazein kai o chiliarchos de ephobēthē epignous oti rōmaios estin kai oti ēn auton dedekōs

tē de epaurion boulomenos gnōnai to asphales to ti katēgoreitai para tōn ioudaiōn elusen auton apo tōn desmōn kai ekeleusen elthein tous archiereis kai olon to sunedrion autōn kai katagagōn ton paulon estēsen eis autous
atenisas de o paulos tō sunedriō eipen andres adelphoi egō pasē suneidēsei agathē pepoliteumai tō theō achri tautēs tēs ēmeras
o de archiereus ananias epetaxen tois parestōsin autō tuptein autou to stoma
tote o paulos pros auton eipen tuptein se mellei o theos toiche kekoniamene kai su kathē krinōn me kata ton nomon kai paranomōn keleueis me tuptesthai
oi de parestōtes eipon ton archierea tou theou loidoreis
ephē te o paulos ouk ēdein adelphoi oti estin archiereus gegraptai gar archonta tou laou sou ouk ereis kakōs
gnous de o paulos oti to en meros estin saddoukaiōn to de eteron pharisaiōn ekraxen en tō sunedriō andres adelphoi egō pharisaios eimi uios pharisaiou peri elpidos kai anastaseōs nekrōn egō krinomai
touto de autou lalēsantos egeneto stasis tōn pharisaiōn kai tōn saddoukaiōn kai eschisthē to plēthos
saddoukaioi men gar legousin mē einai anastasin mēde angelon mēte pneuma pharisaioi de omologousin ta amphotera
egeneto de kraugē megalē kai anastantes oi grammateis tou merous tōn pharisaiōn diemachonto legontes ouden kakon euriskomen en tō anthrōpō toutō ei de pneuma elalēsen autō ē angelos mē theomachōmen
pollēs de genomenēs staseōs eulabētheis o chiliarchos mē diaspasthē o paulos up autōn ekeleusen to strateuma kataban arpasai auton ek mesou autōn agein te eis tēn parembolēn
tē de epiousē nukti epistas autō o kurios eipen tharsei paule ōs gar diemarturō ta peri emou eis ierousalēm outōs se dei kai eis rōmēn marturēsai
genomenēs de ēmeras poiēsantes tines tōn ioudaiōn sustrophēn anethematisan eautous legontes mēte phagein mēte piein eōs ou apokteinōsin ton paulon
ēsan de pleious tessarakonta oi tautēn tēn sunōmosian pepoiēkotes
oitines proselthontes tois archiereusin kai tois presbuterois eipon anathemati anethematisamen eautous mēdenos geusasthai eōs ou apokteinōmen ton paulon

nun oun umeis emphanisate tō chiliarchō sun tō sunedriō opōs aurion auton katagagē pros umas ōs mellontas diaginōskein akribesteron ta peri autou ēmeis de pro tou engisai auton etoimoi esmen tou anelein auton
akousas de o uios tēs adelphēs paulou tēn enedran paragenomenos kai eiselthōn eis tēn parembolēn apēngeilen tō paulō
proskalesamenos de o paulos ena tōn ekatontarchōn ephē ton neanian touton apagage pros ton chiliarchon echei gar ti apangeilai autō
o men oun paralabōn auton ēgagen pros ton chiliarchon kai phēsin o desmios paulos proskalesamenos me ērōtēsen touton ton neanian agagein pros se echonta ti lalēsai soi
epilabomenos de tēs cheiros autou o chiliarchos kai anachōrēsas kat idian epunthaneto ti estin o echeis apangeilai moi
eipen de oti oi ioudaioi sunethento tou erōtēsai se opōs aurion eis to sunedrion katagagēs ton paulon ōs mellontes ti akribesteron punthanesthai peri autou

su oun mē peisthēs autois enedreuousin gar auton ex autōn andres pleious tessarakonta oitines anethematisan eautous mēte phagein mēte piein eōs ou anelōsin auton kai nun etoimoi eisin prosdechomenoi tēn apo sou epangelian
o men oun chiliarchos apelusen ton neanian parangeilas mēdeni eklalēsai oti tauta enephanisas pros me
kai proskalesamenos duo tinas tōn ekatontarchōn eipen etoimasate stratiōtas diakosious opōs poreuthōsin eōs kaisareias kai ippeis ebdomēkonta kai dexiolabous diakosious apo tritēs ōras tēs nuktos
ktēnē te parastēsai ina epibibasantes ton paulon diasōsōsin pros phēlika ton ēgemona
grapsas epistolēn periechousan ton tupon touton
meta de pente ēmeras katebē o archiereus ananias meta tōn presbuterōn kai rētoros tertullou tinos oitines enephanisan tō ēgemoni kata tou paulou
klēthentos de autou ērxato katēgorein o tertullos legōn
pollēs eirēnēs tunchanontes dia sou kai katorthōmatōn ginomenōn tō ethnei toutō dia tēs sēs pronoias pantē te kai pantachou apodechometha kratiste phēlix meta pasēs eucharistias
ina de mē epi pleion se enkoptō parakalō akousai se ēmōn suntomōs tē sē epieikeia
eurontes gar ton andra touton loimon kai kinounta stasin pasin tois ioudaiois tois kata tēn oikoumenēn prōtostatēn te tēs tōn nazōraiōn aireseōs
os kai to ieron epeirasen bebēlōsai on kai ekratēsamen kai kata ton ēmeteron nomon ēthelēsamen krinein
parelthōn de lusias o chiliarchos meta pollēs bias ek tōn cheirōn ēmōn apēgagen
keleusas tous katēgorous autou erchesthai epi se par ou dunēsē autos anakrinas peri pantōn toutōn epignōnai ōn ēmeis katēgoroumen autou
sunethento de kai oi ioudaioi phaskontes tauta outōs echein
apekrithē de o paulos neusantos autō tou ēgemonos legein ek pollōn etōn onta se kritēn tō ethnei toutō epistamenos euthumoteron ta peri emautou apologoumai
dunamenou sou gnōnai oti ou pleious eisin moi ēmerai ē dekaduo aph ēs anebēn proskunēsōn en ierousalēm
kai oute en tō ierō euron me pros tina dialegomenon ē episustasin poiounta ochlou oute en tais sunagōgais oute kata tēn polin
oute parastēsai dunantai peri ōn nun katēgorousin mou
omologō de touto soi oti kata tēn odon ēn legousin airesin outōs latreuō tō patrōō theō pisteuōn pasin tois kata ton nomon kai tois prophētais gegrammenois
elpida echōn eis ton theon ēn kai autoi outoi prosdechontai anastasin mellein esesthai nekrōn dikaiōn te kai adikōn
en toutō de autos askō aproskopon suneidēsin echein pros ton theon kai tous anthrōpous diapantos
di etōn de pleionōn paregenomēn eleēmosunas poiēsōn eis to ethnos mou kai prosphoras
en ois euron me ēgnismenon en tō ierō ou meta ochlou oude meta thorubou tines apo tēs asias ioudaioi
ous edei epi sou pareinai kai katēgorein ei ti echoien pros me
ē autoi outoi eipatōsan ei ti euron en emoi adikēma stantos mou epi tou sunedriou
ē peri mias tautēs phōnēs ēs ekraxa estōs en autois oti peri anastaseōs nekrōn egō krinomai sēmeron uph umōn
akousas de tauta o phēlix anebaleto autous akribesteron eidōs ta peri tēs odou eipōn otan lusias o chiliarchos katabē diagnōsomai ta kath umas
phēstos oun epibas tē eparchia meta treis ēmeras anebē eis ierosoluma apo kaisareias
enephanisan de autō o archiereus kai oi prōtoi tōn ioudaiōn kata tou paulou kai parekaloun auton
aitoumenoi charin kat autou opōs metapempsētai auton eis ierousalēm enedran poiountes anelein auton kata tēn odon
o men oun phēstos apekrithē tēreisthai ton paulon en kaisareia eauton de mellein en tachei ekporeuesthai
oi oun dunatoi en umin phēsin sunkatabantes ei ti estin atopon en tō andri toutō katēgoreitōsan autou
diatripsas de en autois ēmeras pleious ē deka katabas eis kaisareian tē epaurion kathisas epi tou bēmatos ekeleusen ton paulon achthēnai
paragenomenou de autou periestēsan oi apo ierosolumōn katabebēkotes ioudaioi polla kai barea aitiamata pherontes kata tou paulou a ouk ischuon apodeixai
apologoumenou autou oti oute eis ton nomon tōn ioudaiōn oute eis to ieron oute eis kaisara ti ēmarton
o phēstos de tois ioudaiois thelōn charin katathesthai apokritheis tō paulō eipen theleis eis ierosoluma anabas ekei peri toutōn krinesthai ep emou
eipen de o paulos epi tou bēmatos kaisaros estōs eimi ou me dei krinesthai ioudaious ouden ēdikēsa ōs kai su kallion epiginōskeis
ei men gar adikō kai axion thanatou pepracha ti ou paraitoumai to apothanein ei de ouden estin ōn outoi katēgorousin mou oudeis me dunatai autois charisasthai kaisara epikaloumai
tote o phēstos sullalēsas meta tou sumbouliou apekrithē kaisara epikeklēsai epi kaisara poreusē
ēmerōn de diagenomenōn tinōn agrippas o basileus kai bernikē katēntēsan eis kaisareian aspasomenoi ton phēston
ōs de pleious ēmeras dietribon ekei o phēstos tō basilei anetheto ta kata ton paulon legōn anēr tis estin kataleleimmenos upo phēlikos desmios
peri ou genomenou mou eis ierosoluma enephanisan oi archiereis kai oi presbuteroi tōn ioudaiōn aitoumenoi kat autou dikēn
pros ous apekrithēn oti ouk estin ethos rōmaiois charizesthai tina anthrōpon eis apōleian prin ē o katēgoroumenos kata prosōpon echoi tous katēgorous topon te apologias laboi peri tou enklēmatos
sunelthontōn oun autōn enthade anabolēn mēdemian poiēsamenos tē exēs kathisas epi tou bēmatos ekeleusa achthēnai ton andra
peri ou stathentes oi katēgoroi oudemian aitian epepheron ōn upenooun egō
zētēmata de tina peri tēs idias deisidaimonias eichon pros auton kai peri tinos iēsou tethnēkotos on ephasken o paulos zēn
agrippas de pros ton paulon ephē epitrepetai soi uper seautou legein tote o paulos apelogeito ekteinas tēn cheira
peri pantōn ōn enkaloumai upo ioudaiōn basileu agrippa ēgēmai emauton makarion mellōn apologeisthai epi sou sēmeron
malista gnōstēn onta se eidōs pantōn tōn kata ioudaious ethōn te kai zētēmatōn dio deomai sou makrothumōs akousai mou
tēn men oun biōsin mou tēn ek neotētos tēn ap archēs genomenēn en tō ethnei mou en ierosolumois isasin pantes oi ioudaioi
proginōskontes me anōthen ean thelōsin marturein oti kata tēn akribestatēn airesin tēs ēmeteras thrēskeias ezēsa pharisaios
kai nun ep elpidi tēs pros tous pateras epangelias genomenēs upo tou theou estēka krinomenos
eis ēn to dōdekaphulon ēmōn en ekteneia nukta kai ēmeran latreuon elpizei katantēsai peri ēs elpidos enkaloumai basileu agrippa upo tōn ioudaiōn
ti apiston krinetai par umin ei o theos nekrous egeirei
egō men oun edoxa emautō pros to onoma iēsou tou nazōraiou dein polla enantia praxai
o kai epoiēsa en ierosolumois kai pollous tōn agiōn egō phulakais katekleisa tēn para tōn archiereōn exousian labōn anairoumenōn te autōn katēnenka psēphon
kai kata pasas tas sunagōgas pollakis timōrōn autous ēnankazon blasphēmein perissōs te emmainomenos autois ediōkon eōs kai eis tas exō poleis
en ois kai poreuomenos eis tēn damaskon met exousias kai epitropēs tēs para tōn archiereōn
ēmeras mesēs kata tēn odon eidon basileu ouranothen uper tēn lamprotēta tou ēliou perilampsan me phōs kai tous sun emoi poreuomenous
pantōn de katapesontōn ēmōn eis tēn gēn ēkousa phōnēn lalousan pros me kai legousan tē ebraidi dialektō saoul saoul ti me diōkeis sklēron soi pros kentra laktizein
egō de eipon tis ei kurie o de eipen egō eimi iēsous on su diōkeis
alla anastēthi kai stēthi epi tous podas sou eis touto gar ōphthēn soi procheirisasthai se upēretēn kai martura ōn te eides ōn te ophthēsomai soi
exairoumenos se ek tou laou kai tōn ethnōn eis ous nun se apostellō
anoixai ophthalmous autōn kai epistrepsai apo skotous eis phōs kai tēs exousias tou satana epi ton theon tou labein autous aphesin amartiōn kai klēron en tois ēgiasmenois pistei tē eis eme
othen basileu agrippa ouk egenomēn apeithēs tē ouraniō optasia
ōs de ekrithē tou apoplein ēmas eis tēn italian paredidoun ton te paulon kai tinas eterous desmōtas ekatontarchē onomati iouliō speirēs sebastēs
epibantes de ploiō adramuttēnō mellontes plein tous kata tēn asian topous anēchthēmen ontos sun ēmin aristarchou makedonos thessalonikeōs
tē te etera katēchthēmen eis sidōna philanthrōpōs te o ioulios tō paulō chrēsamenos epetrepsen pros tous philous poreuthenta epimeleias tuchein
kakeithen anachthentes upepleusamen tēn kupron dia to tous anemous einai enantious
to te pelagos to kata tēn kilikian kai pamphulian diapleusantes katēlthomen eis mura tēs lukias
kakei eurōn o ekatontarchos ploion alexandrinon pleon eis tēn italian enebibasen ēmas eis auto
en ikanais de ēmerais braduploountes kai molis genomenoi kata tēn knidon mē proseōntos ēmas tou anemou upepleusamen tēn krētēn kata salmōnēn
molis te paralegomenoi autēn ēlthomen eis topon tina kaloumenon kalous limenas ō engus ēn polis lasaia
ikanou de chronou diagenomenou kai ontos ēdē episphalous tou ploos dia to kai tēn nēsteian ēdē parelēluthenai parēnei o paulos
legōn autois andres theōrō oti meta ubreōs kai pollēs zēmias ou monon tou phortou kai tou ploiou alla kai tōn psuchōn ēmōn mellein esesthai ton ploun
o de ekatontarchos tō kubernētē kai tō nauklērō epeitheto mallon ē tois upo tou paulou legomenois

aneuthetou de tou limenos uparchontos pros paracheimasian oi pleious ethento boulēn anachthēnai kakeithen eipōs dunainto katantēsantes eis phoinika paracheimasai limena tēs krētēs bleponta kata liba kai kata chōron
upopneusantos de notou doxantes tēs protheseōs kekratēkenai arantes asson parelegonto tēn krētēn
met ou polu de ebalen kat autēs anemos tuphōnikos o kaloumenos eurokludōn
sunarpasthentos de tou ploiou kai mē dunamenou antophthalmein tō anemō epidontes epherometha
nēsion de ti upodramontes kaloumenon klaudēn molis ischusamen perikrateis genesthai tēs skaphēs
ēn arantes boētheiais echrōnto upozōnnuntes to ploion phoboumenoi te mē eis tēn surtin ekpesōsin chalasantes to skeuos outōs epheronto
sphodrōs de cheimazomenōn ēmōn tē exēs ekbolēn epoiounto
kai tē tritē autocheires tēn skeuēn tou ploiou erripsamen
mēte de ēliou mēte astrōn epiphainontōn epi pleionas ēmeras cheimōnos te ouk oligou epikeimenou loipon periēreito pasa elpis tou sōzesthai ēmas
pollēs de asitias uparchousēs tote statheis o paulos en mesō autōn eipen edei men ō andres peitharchēsantas moi mē anagesthai apo tēs krētēs kerdēsai te tēn ubrin tautēn kai tēn zēmian
kai ta nun parainō umas euthumein apobolē gar psuchēs oudemia estai ex umōn plēn tou ploiou
parestē gar moi tē nukti tautē angelos tou theou ou eimi ō kai latreuō
legōn mē phobou paule kaisari se dei parastēnai kai idou kecharistai soi o theos pantas tous pleontas meta sou
dio euthumeite andres pisteuō gar tō theō oti outōs estai kath on tropon lelalētai moi
eis nēson de tina dei ēmas ekpesein
kai diasōthentes tote epegnōsan oti melitē ē nēsos kaleitai
oi de barbaroi pareichon ou tēn tuchousan philanthrōpian ēmin anapsantes gar puran proselabonto pantas ēmas dia ton ueton ton ephestōta kai dia to psuchos
sustrepsantos de tou paulou phruganōn plēthos kai epithentos epi tēn puran echidna ek tēs thermēs exelthousa kathēpsen tēs cheiros autou
ōs de eidon oi barbaroi kremamenon to thērion ek tēs cheiros autou elegon pros allēlous pantōs phoneus estin o anthrōpos outos on diasōthenta ek tēs thalassēs ē dikē zēn ouk eiasen
o men oun apotinaxas to thērion eis to pur epathen ouden kakon
oi de prosedokōn auton mellein pimprasthai ē katapiptein aphnō nekron epi polu de autōn prosdokōntōn kai theōrountōn mēden atopon eis auton ginomenon metaballomenoi elegon theon auton einai
en de tois peri ton topon ekeinon upērchen chōria tō prōtō tēs nēsou onomati popliō os anadexamenos ēmas treis ēmeras philophronōs exenisen
egeneto de ton patera tou popliou puretois kai dusenteria sunechomenon katakeisthai pros on o paulos eiselthōn kai proseuxamenos epitheis tas cheiras autō iasato auton
toutou oun genomenou kai oi loipoi oi echontes astheneias en tē nēsō prosērchonto kai etherapeuonto
oi kai pollais timais etimēsan ēmas kai anagomenois epethento ta pros tēn chreian
meta de treis mēnas anēchthēmen en ploiō parakecheimakoti en tē nēsō alexandrinō parasēmō dioskourois
kai katachthentes eis surakousas epemeinamen ēmeras treis
othen perielthontes katēntēsamen eis rēgion kai meta mian ēmeran epigenomenou notou deuteraioi ēlthomen eis potiolous
ou eurontes adelphous pareklēthēmen ep autois epimeinai ēmeras epta kai outōs eis tēn rōmēn ēlthomen
kakeithen oi adelphoi akousantes ta peri ēmōn exēlthon eis apantēsin ēmin achris appiou phorou kai triōn tabernōn ous idōn o paulos eucharistēsas tō theō elaben tharsos
ote de ēlthomen eis rōmēn o ekatontarchos paredōken tous desmious tō stratopedarchē tō de paulō epetrapē menein kath eauton sun tō phulassonti auton stratiōtē

egeneto de meta ēmeras treis sunkalesasthai ton paulon tous ontas tōn ioudaiōn prōtous sunelthontōn de autōn elegen pros autous andres adelphoi egō ouden enantion poiēsas tō laō ē tois ethesin tois patrōois desmios ex ierosolumōn paredothēn eis tas cheiras tōn rōmaiōn
oitines anakrinantes me eboulonto apolusai dia to mēdemian aitian thanatou uparchein en emoi
antilegontōn de tōn ioudaiōn ēnankasthēn epikalesasthai kaisara ouch ōs tou ethnous mou echōn ti katēgorēsai
dia tautēn oun tēn aitian parekalesa umas idein kai proslalēsai eneken gar tēs elpidos tou israēl tēn alusin tautēn perikeimai
oi de pros auton eipon ēmeis oute grammata peri sou edexametha apo tēs ioudaias oute paragenomenos tis tōn adelphōn apēngeilen ē elalēsen ti peri sou ponēron
axioumen de para sou akousai a phroneis peri men gar tēs aireseōs tautēs gnōston estin ēmin oti pantachou antilegetai

taxamenoi de autō ēmeran ēkon pros auton eis tēn xenian pleiones ois exetitheto diamarturomenos tēn basileian tou theou peithōn te autous ta peri tou iēsou apo te tou nomou mōseōs kai tōn prophētōn apo prōi eōs esperas
kai oi men epeithonto tois legomenois oi de ēpistoun
asumphōnoi de ontes pros allēlous apeluonto eipontos tou paulou rēma en oti kalōs to pneuma to agion elalēsen dia ēsaiou tou prophētou pros tous pateras ēmōn
legon poreuthēti pros ton laon touton kai eipe akoē akousete kai ou mē sunēte kai blepontes blepsete kai ou mē idēte

epachunthē gar ē kardia tou laou toutou kai tois ōsin bareōs ēkousan kai tous ophthalmous autōn ekammusan mēpote idōsin tois ophthalmois kai tois ōsin akousōsin kai tē kardia sunōsin kai epistrepsōsin kai iasōmai autous
gnōston oun estō umin oti tois ethnesin apestalē to sōtērion tou theou autoi kai akousontai
kai tauta autou eipontos apēlthon oi ioudaioi pollēn echontes en eautois suzētēsin
emeinen de o paulos dietian olēn en idiō misthōmati kai apedecheto pantas tous eisporeuomenous pros auton
kērussōn tēn basileian tou theou kai didaskōn ta peri tou kuriou iēsou christou meta pasēs parrēsias akōlutōs

name: ΠΡΟΣ ΡΩΜΑΙΟΥΣ
chapters: paulos doulos iēsou christou klētos apostolos aphōrismenos eis euangelion theou
o proepēngeilato dia tōn prophētōn autou en graphais agiais
peri tou uiou autou tou genomenou ek spermatos dabid kata sarka
tou oristhentos uiou theou en dunamei kata pneuma agiōsunēs ex anastaseōs nekrōn iēsou christou tou kuriou ēmōn
di ou elabomen charin kai apostolēn eis upakoēn pisteōs en pasin tois ethnesin uper tou onomatos autou
en ois este kai umeis klētoi iēsou christou
pasin tois ousin en rōmē agapētois theou klētois agiois charis umin kai eirēnē apo theou patros ēmōn kai kuriou iēsou christou
prōton men eucharistō tō theō mou dia iēsou christou uper pantōn umōn oti ē pistis umōn katangelletai en olō tō kosmō
martus gar mou estin o theos ō latreuō en tō pneumati mou en tō euangeliō tou uiou autou ōs adialeiptōs mneian umōn poioumai
pantote epi tōn proseuchōn mou deomenos eipōs ēdē pote euodōthēsomai en tō thelēmati tou theou elthein pros umas
epipothō gar idein umas ina ti metadō charisma umin pneumatikon eis to stērichthēnai umas
touto de estin sumparaklēthēnai en umin dia tēs en allēlois pisteōs umōn te kai emou
ou thelō de umas agnoein adelphoi oti pollakis proethemēn elthein pros umas kai ekōluthēn achri tou deuro ina karpon tina schō kai en umin kathōs kai en tois loipois ethnesin
ellēsin te kai barbarois sophois te kai anoētois opheiletēs eimi
outōs to kat eme prothumon kai umin tois en rōmē euangelisasthai
ou gar epaischunomai to euangelion tou christou dunamis gar theou estin eis sōtērian panti tō pisteuonti ioudaiō te prōton kai ellēni
dikaiosunē gar theou en autō apokaluptetai ek pisteōs eis pistin kathōs gegraptai o de dikaios ek pisteōs zēsetai
apokaluptetai gar orgē theou ap ouranou epi pasan asebeian kai adikian anthrōpōn tōn tēn alētheian en adikia katechontōn
dio anapologētos ei ō anthrōpe pas o krinōn en ō gar krineis ton eteron seauton katakrineis ta gar auta prasseis o krinōn
oidamen de oti to krima tou theou estin kata alētheian epi tous ta toiauta prassontas
logizē de touto ō anthrōpe o krinōn tous ta toiauta prassontas kai poiōn auta oti su ekpheuxē to krima tou theou
ē tou ploutou tēs chrēstotētos autou kai tēs anochēs kai tēs makrothumias kataphroneis agnoōn oti to chrēston tou theou eis metanoian se agei
kata de tēn sklērotēta sou kai ametanoēton kardian thēsaurizeis seautō orgēn en ēmera orgēs kai apokalupseōs dikaiokrisias tou theou
os apodōsei ekastō kata ta erga autou
tois men kath upomonēn ergou agathou doxan kai timēn kai aphtharsian zētousin zōēn aiōnion
tois de ex eritheias kai apeithousin men tē alētheia peithomenois de tē adikia thumos kai orgē
thlipsis kai stenochōria epi pasan psuchēn anthrōpou tou katergazomenou to kakon ioudaiou te prōton kai ellēnos
doxa de kai timē kai eirēnē panti tō ergazomenō to agathon ioudaiō te prōton kai ellēni
ou gar estin prosōpolēpsia para tō theō
osoi gar anomōs ēmarton anomōs kai apolountai kai osoi en nomō ēmarton dia nomou krithēsontai
ou gar oi akroatai tou nomou dikaioi para tō theō all oi poiētai tou nomou dikaiōthēsontai
otan gar ethnē ta mē nomon echonta phusei ta tou nomou poiē outoi nomon mē echontes eautois eisin nomos
oitines endeiknuntai to ergon tou nomou grapton en tais kardiais autōn summarturousēs autōn tēs suneidēseōs kai metaxu allēlōn tōn logismōn katēgorountōn ē kai apologoumenōn
en ēmera ote krinei o theos ta krupta tōn anthrōpōn kata to euangelion mou dia iēsou christou
ide su ioudaios eponomazē kai epanapauē tō nomō kai kauchasai en theō
kai ginōskeis to thelēma kai dokimazeis ta diapheronta katēchoumenos ek tou nomou
pepoithas te seauton odēgon einai tuphlōn phōs tōn en skotei
paideutēn aphronōn didaskalon nēpiōn echonta tēn morphōsin tēs gnōseōs kai tēs alētheias en tō nomō
o oun didaskōn eteron seauton ou didaskeis o kērussōn mē kleptein klepteis
o legōn mē moicheuein moicheueis o bdelussomenos ta eidōla ierosuleis
os en nomō kauchasai dia tēs parabaseōs tou nomou ton theon atimazeis
to gar onoma tou theou di umas blasphēmeitai en tois ethnesin kathōs gegraptai
ti oun to perisson tou ioudaiou ē tis ē ōpheleia tēs peritomēs
polu kata panta tropon prōton men gar oti episteuthēsan ta logia tou theou
ti gar ei ēpistēsan tines mē ē apistia autōn tēn pistin tou theou katargēsei
mē genoito ginesthō de o theos alēthēs pas de anthrōpos pseustēs kathōs gegraptai opōs an dikaiōthēs en tois logois sou kai nikēsēs en tō krinesthai se
ei de ē adikia ēmōn theou dikaiosunēn sunistēsin ti eroumen mē adikos o theos o epipherōn tēn orgēn kata anthrōpon legō
mē genoito epei pōs krinei o theos ton kosmon
ei gar ē alētheia tou theou en tō emō pseusmati eperisseusen eis tēn doxan autou ti eti kagō ōs amartōlos krinomai
kai mē kathōs blasphēmoumetha kai kathōs phasin tines ēmas legein oti poiēsōmen ta kaka ina elthē ta agatha ōn to krima endikon estin
ti oun proechometha ou pantōs proētiasametha gar ioudaious te kai ellēnas pantas uph amartian einai
kathōs gegraptai oti ouk estin dikaios oude eis
ouk estin o suniōn ouk estin o ekzētōn ton theon
pantes exeklinan ama ēchreiōthēsan ouk estin poiōn chrēstotēta ouk estin eōs enos
taphos aneōgmenos o larugx autōn tais glōssais autōn edoliousan ios aspidōn upo ta cheilē autōn
ōn to stoma aras kai pikrias gemei
oxeis oi podes autōn ekcheai aima
suntrimma kai talaipōria en tais odois autōn
ti oun eroumen abraam ton patera ēmōn eurēkenai kata sarka
ei gar abraam ex ergōn edikaiōthē echei kauchēma all ou pros ton theon
ti gar ē graphē legei episteusen de abraam tō theō kai elogisthē autō eis dikaiosunēn
tō de ergazomenō o misthos ou logizetai kata charin alla kata to opheilēma
tō de mē ergazomenō pisteuonti de epi ton dikaiounta ton asebē logizetai ē pistis autou eis dikaiosunēn
kathaper kai dabid legei ton makarismon tou anthrōpou ō o theos logizetai dikaiosunēn chōris ergōn
makarioi ōn aphethēsan ai anomiai kai ōn epekaluphthēsan ai amartiai
makarios anēr ō ou mē logisētai kurios amartian
o makarismos oun outos epi tēn peritomēn ē kai epi tēn akrobustian legomen gar oti elogisthē tō abraam ē pistis eis dikaiosunēn
pōs oun elogisthē en peritomē onti ē en akrobustia ouk en peritomē all en akrobustia
kai sēmeion elaben peritomēs sphragida tēs dikaiosunēs tēs pisteōs tēs en tē akrobustia eis to einai auton patera pantōn tōn pisteuontōn di akrobustias eis to logisthēnai kai autois tēn dikaiosunēn
kai patera peritomēs tois ouk ek peritomēs monon alla kai tois stoichousin tois ichnesin tēs en tē akrobustia pisteōs tou patros ēmōn abraam
ou gar dia nomou ē epangelia tō abraam ē tō spermati autou to klēronomon auton einai tou kosmou alla dia dikaiosunēs pisteōs
ei gar oi ek nomou klēronomoi kekenōtai ē pistis kai katērgētai ē epangelia
o gar nomos orgēn katergazetai ou gar ouk estin nomos oude parabasis
dia touto ek pisteōs ina kata charin eis to einai bebaian tēn epangelian panti tō spermati ou tō ek tou nomou monon alla kai tō ek pisteōs abraam os estin patēr pantōn ēmōn
kathōs gegraptai oti patera pollōn ethnōn tetheika se katenanti ou episteusen theou tou zōopoiountos tous nekrous kai kalountos ta mē onta ōs onta
os par elpida ep elpidi episteusen eis to genesthai auton patera pollōn ethnōn kata to eirēmenon outōs estai to sperma sou
kai mē asthenēsas tē pistei ou katenoēsen to eautou sōma ēdē nenekrōmenon ekatontaetēs pou uparchōn kai tēn nekrōsin tēs mētras sarras
eis de tēn epangelian tou theou ou diekrithē tē apistia all enedunamōthē tē pistei dous doxan tō theō
kai plērophorētheis oti o epēngeltai dunatos estin kai poiēsai
dio kai elogisthē autō eis dikaiosunēn
ouk egraphē de di auton monon oti elogisthē autō
alla kai di ēmas ois mellei logizesthai tois pisteuousin epi ton egeiranta iēsoun ton kurion ēmōn ek nekrōn
dikaiōthentes oun ek pisteōs eirēnēn echomen pros ton theon dia tou kuriou ēmōn iēsou christou
di ou kai tēn prosagōgēn eschēkamen tē pistei eis tēn charin tautēn en ē estēkamen kai kauchōmetha ep elpidi tēs doxēs tou theou
ou monon de alla kai kauchōmetha en tais thlipsesin eidotes oti ē thlipsis upomonēn katergazetai
ē de upomonē dokimēn ē de dokimē elpida
ē de elpis ou kataischunei oti ē agapē tou theou ekkechutai en tais kardiais ēmōn dia pneumatos agiou tou dothentos ēmin
eti gar christos ontōn ēmōn asthenōn kata kairon uper asebōn apethanen
molis gar uper dikaiou tis apothaneitai uper gar tou agathou tacha tis kai tolma apothanein
sunistēsin de tēn eautou agapēn eis ēmas o theos oti eti amartōlōn ontōn ēmōn christos uper ēmōn apethanen
pollō oun mallon dikaiōthentes nun en tō aimati autou sōthēsometha di autou apo tēs orgēs
ei gar echthroi ontes katēllagēmen tō theō dia tou thanatou tou uiou autou pollō mallon katallagentes sōthēsometha en tē zōē autou
ou monon de alla kai kauchōmenoi en tō theō dia tou kuriou ēmōn iēsou christou di ou nun tēn katallagēn elabomen
dia touto ōsper di enos anthrōpou ē amartia eis ton kosmon eisēlthen kai dia tēs amartias o thanatos kai outōs eis pantas anthrōpous o thanatos diēlthen eph ō pantes ēmarton
achri gar nomou amartia ēn en kosmō amartia de ouk ellogeitai mē ontos nomou
all ebasileusen o thanatos apo adam mechri mōseōs kai epi tous mē amartēsantas epi tō omoiōmati tēs parabaseōs adam os estin tupos tou mellontos

all ouch ōs to paraptōma outōs kai to charisma ei gar tō tou enos paraptōmati oi polloi apethanon pollō mallon ē charis tou theou kai ē dōrea en chariti tē tou enos anthrōpou iēsou christou eis tous pollous eperisseusen
ti oun eroumen epimenoumen tē amartia ina ē charis pleonasē
mē genoito oitines apethanomen tē amartia pōs eti zēsomen en autē
ē agnoeite oti osoi ebaptisthēmen eis christon iēsoun eis ton thanaton autou ebaptisthēmen
sunetaphēmen oun autō dia tou baptismatos eis ton thanaton ina ōsper ēgerthē christos ek nekrōn dia tēs doxēs tou patros outōs kai ēmeis en kainotēti zōēs peripatēsōmen
ei gar sumphutoi gegonamen tō omoiōmati tou thanatou autou alla kai tēs anastaseōs esometha
touto ginōskontes oti o palaios ēmōn anthrōpos sunestaurōthē ina katargēthē to sōma tēs amartias tou mēketi douleuein ēmas tē amartia
o gar apothanōn dedikaiōtai apo tēs amartias
ei de apethanomen sun christō pisteuomen oti kai suzēsomen autō
eidotes oti christos egertheis ek nekrōn ouketi apothnēskei thanatos autou ouketi kurieuei
o gar apethanen tē amartia apethanen ephapax o de zē zē tō theō
outōs kai umeis logizesthe eautous nekrous men einai tē amartia zōntas de tō theō en christō iēsou tō kuriō ēmōn
mē oun basileuetō ē amartia en tō thnētō umōn sōmati eis to upakouein autē en tais epithumiais autou
mēde paristanete ta melē umōn opla adikias tē amartia alla parastēsate eautous tō theō ōs ek nekrōn zōntas kai ta melē umōn opla dikaiosunēs tō theō
amartia gar umōn ou kurieusei ou gar este upo nomon all upo charin
ti oun amartēsomen oti ouk esmen upo nomon all upo charin mē genoito
ouk oidate oti ō paristanete eautous doulous eis upakoēn douloi este ō upakouete ētoi amartias eis thanaton ē upakoēs eis dikaiosunēn
charis de tō theō oti ēte douloi tēs amartias upēkousate de ek kardias eis on paredothēte tupon didachēs
eleutherōthentes de apo tēs amartias edoulōthēte tē dikaiosunē

anthrōpinon legō dia tēn astheneian tēs sarkos umōn ōsper gar parestēsate ta melē umōn doula tē akatharsia kai tē anomia eis tēn anomian outōs nun parastēsate ta melē umōn doula tē dikaiosunē eis agiasmon
ote gar douloi ēte tēs amartias eleutheroi ēte tē dikaiosunē
tina oun karpon eichete tote eph ois nun epaischunesthe to gar telos ekeinōn thanatos
nuni de eleutherōthentes apo tēs amartias doulōthentes de tō theō echete ton karpon umōn eis agiasmon to de telos zōēn aiōnion
ta gar opsōnia tēs amartias thanatos to de charisma tou theou zōē aiōnios en christō iēsou tō kuriō ēmōn
ē agnoeite adelphoi ginōskousin gar nomon lalō oti o nomos kurieuei tou anthrōpou eph oson chronon zē
ē gar upandros gunē tō zōnti andri dedetai nomō ean de apothanē o anēr katērgētai apo tou nomou tou andros
ara oun zōntos tou andros moichalis chrēmatisei ean genētai andri eterō ean de apothanē o anēr eleuthera estin apo tou nomou tou mē einai autēn moichalida genomenēn andri eterō
ōste adelphoi mou kai umeis ethanatōthēte tō nomō dia tou sōmatos tou christou eis to genesthai umas eterō tō ek nekrōn egerthenti ina karpophorēsōmen tō theō
ote gar ēmen en tē sarki ta pathēmata tōn amartiōn ta dia tou nomou enērgeito en tois melesin ēmōn eis to karpophorēsai tō thanatō
nuni de katērgēthēmen apo tou nomou apothanontos en ō kateichometha ōste douleuein ēmas en kainotēti pneumatos kai ou palaiotēti grammatos
ti oun eroumen o nomos amartia mē genoito alla tēn amartian ouk egnōn ei mē dia nomou tēn te gar epithumian ouk ēdein ei mē o nomos elegen ouk epithumēseis
aphormēn de labousa ē amartia dia tēs entolēs kateirgasato en emoi pasan epithumian chōris gar nomou amartia nekra
egō de ezōn chōris nomou pote elthousēs de tēs entolēs ē amartia anezēsen egō de apethanon
kai eurethē moi ē entolē ē eis zōēn autē eis thanaton
ē gar amartia aphormēn labousa dia tēs entolēs exēpatēsen me kai di autēs apekteinen
ōste o men nomos agios kai ē entolē agia kai dikaia kai agathē
to oun agathon emoi gegonen thanatos mē genoito alla ē amartia ina phanē amartia dia tou agathou moi katergazomenē thanaton ina genētai kath uperbolēn amartōlos ē amartia dia tēs entolēs
oidamen gar oti o nomos pneumatikos estin egō de sarkikos eimi pepramenos upo tēn amartian
o gar katergazomai ou ginōskō ou gar o thelō touto prassō all o misō touto poiō
ei de o ou thelō touto poiō sumphēmi tō nomō oti kalos
nuni de ouketi egō katergazomai auto all ē oikousa en emoi amartia
oida gar oti ouk oikei en emoi tout estin en tē sarki mou agathon to gar thelein parakeitai moi to de katergazesthai to kalon ouch euriskō
ou gar o thelō poiō agathon all o ou thelō kakon touto prassō
ei de o ou thelō egō touto poiō ouketi egō katergazomai auto all ē oikousa en emoi amartia
euriskō ara ton nomon tō thelonti emoi poiein to kalon oti emoi to kakon parakeitai
sunēdomai gar tō nomō tou theou kata ton esō anthrōpon
blepō de eteron nomon en tois melesin mou antistrateuomenon tō nomō tou noos mou kai aichmalōtizonta me tō nomō tēs amartias tō onti en tois melesin mou
talaipōros egō anthrōpos tis me rusetai ek tou sōmatos tou thanatou toutou
eucharistō tō theō dia iēsou christou tou kuriou ēmōn ara oun autos egō tō men noi douleuō nomō theou tē de sarki nomō amartias
ouden ara nun katakrima tois en christō iēsou mē kata sarka peripatousin alla kata pneuma
o gar nomos tou pneumatos tēs zōēs en christō iēsou ēleutherōsen me apo tou nomou tēs amartias kai tou thanatou
to gar adunaton tou nomou en ō ēsthenei dia tēs sarkos o theos ton eautou uion pempsas en omoiōmati sarkos amartias kai peri amartias katekrinen tēn amartian en tē sarki
ina to dikaiōma tou nomou plērōthē en ēmin tois mē kata sarka peripatousin alla kata pneuma
oi gar kata sarka ontes ta tēs sarkos phronousin oi de kata pneuma ta tou pneumatos
to gar phronēma tēs sarkos thanatos to de phronēma tou pneumatos zōē kai eirēnē
dioti to phronēma tēs sarkos echthra eis theon tō gar nomō tou theou ouch upotassetai oude gar dunatai
oi de en sarki ontes theō aresai ou dunantai
umeis de ouk este en sarki all en pneumati eiper pneuma theou oikei en umin ei de tis pneuma christou ouk echei outos ouk estin autou
ei de christos en umin to men sōma nekron di amartian to de pneuma zōē dia dikaiosunēn
ei de to pneuma tou egeirantos iēsoun ek nekrōn oikei en umin o egeiras ton christon ek nekrōn zōopoiēsei kai ta thnēta sōmata umōn dia tou enoikountos autou pneumatos en umin
ara oun adelphoi opheiletai esmen ou tē sarki tou kata sarka zēn
ei gar kata sarka zēte mellete apothnēskein ei de pneumati tas praxeis tou sōmatos thanatoute zēsesthe
osoi gar pneumati theou agontai outoi eisin uioi theou
ou gar elabete pneuma douleias palin eis phobon all elabete pneuma uiothesias en ō krazomen abba o patēr
auto to pneuma summarturei tō pneumati ēmōn oti esmen tekna theou
ei de tekna kai klēronomoi klēronomoi men theou sunklēronomoi de christou eiper sumpaschomen ina kai sundoxasthōmen
logizomai gar oti ouk axia ta pathēmata tou nun kairou pros tēn mellousan doxan apokaluphthēnai eis ēmas
ē gar apokaradokia tēs ktiseōs tēn apokalupsin tōn uiōn tou theou apekdechetai
tē gar mataiotēti ē ktisis upetagē ouch ekousa alla dia ton upotaxanta ep elpidi
oti kai autē ē ktisis eleutherōthēsetai apo tēs douleias tēs phthoras eis tēn eleutherian tēs doxēs tōn teknōn tou theou
oidamen gar oti pasa ē ktisis sustenazei kai sunōdinei achri tou nun
ou monon de alla kai autoi tēn aparchēn tou pneumatos echontes kai ēmeis autoi en eautois stenazomen uiothesian apekdechomenoi tēn apolutrōsin tou sōmatos ēmōn
tē gar elpidi esōthēmen elpis de blepomenē ouk estin elpis o gar blepei tis ti kai elpizei
ei de o ou blepomen elpizomen di upomonēs apekdechometha
ōsautōs de kai to pneuma sunantilambanetai tais astheneiais ēmōn to gar ti proseuxōmetha katho dei ouk oidamen all auto to pneuma uperentunchanei uper ēmōn stenagmois alalētois
o de ereunōn tas kardias oiden ti to phronēma tou pneumatos oti kata theon entunchanei uper agiōn
oidamen de oti tois agapōsin ton theon panta sunergei eis agathon tois kata prothesin klētois ousin
oti ous proegnō kai proōrisen summorphous tēs eikonos tou uiou autou eis to einai auton prōtotokon en pollois adelphois
ous de proōrisen toutous kai ekalesen kai ous ekalesen toutous kai edikaiōsen ous de edikaiōsen toutous kai edoxasen
ti oun eroumen pros tauta ei o theos uper ēmōn tis kath ēmōn
os ge tou idiou uiou ouk epheisato all uper ēmōn pantōn paredōken auton pōs ouchi kai sun autō ta panta ēmin charisetai
tis enkalesei kata eklektōn theou theos o dikaiōn
tis o katakrinōn christos o apothanōn mallon de kai egertheis os kai estin en dexia tou theou os kai entunchanei uper ēmōn
tis ēmas chōrisei apo tēs agapēs tou christou thlipsis ē stenochōria ē diōgmos ē limos ē gumnotēs ē kindunos ē machaira
alētheian legō en christō ou pseudomai summarturousēs moi tēs suneidēseōs mou en pneumati agiō
oti lupē moi estin megalē kai adialeiptos odunē tē kardia mou
ēuchomēn gar autos egō anathema einai apo tou christou uper tōn adelphōn mou tōn sungenōn mou kata sarka
oitines eisin israēlitai ōn ē uiothesia kai ē doxa kai ai diathēkai kai ē nomothesia kai ē latreia kai ai epangeliai
ōn oi pateres kai ex ōn o christos to kata sarka o ōn epi pantōn theos eulogētos eis tous aiōnas amēn
ouch oion de oti ekpeptōken o logos tou theou ou gar pantes oi ex israēl outoi israēl
oud oti eisin sperma abraam pantes tekna all en isaak klēthēsetai soi sperma
tout estin ou ta tekna tēs sarkos tauta tekna tou theou alla ta tekna tēs epangelias logizetai eis sperma
epangelias gar o logos outos kata ton kairon touton eleusomai kai estai tē sarra uios
ou monon de alla kai rebekka ex enos koitēn echousa isaak tou patros ēmōn
mēpō gar gennēthentōn mēde praxantōn ti agathon ē kakon ina ē kat eklogēn tou theou prothesis menē ouk ex ergōn all ek tou kalountos
errēthē autē oti o meizōn douleusei tō elassoni
kathōs gegraptai ton iakōb ēgapēsa ton de ēsau emisēsa
ti oun eroumen mē adikia para tō theō mē genoito
tō gar mōsē legei eleēsō on an eleō kai oikteirēsō on an oikteirō
ara oun ou tou thelontos oude tou trechontos alla tou eleountos theou
legei gar ē graphē tō pharaō oti eis auto touto exēgeira se opōs endeixōmai en soi tēn dunamin mou kai opōs diangelē to onoma mou en pasē tē gē
ara oun on thelei eleei on de thelei sklērunei
ereis oun moi ti eti memphetai tō gar boulēmati autou tis anthestēken
menounge ō anthrōpe su tis ei o antapokrinomenos tō theō mē erei to plasma tō plasanti ti me epoiēsas outōs
ē ouk echei exousian o kerameus tou pēlou ek tou autou phuramatos poiēsai o men eis timēn skeuos o de eis atimian
ei de thelōn o theos endeixasthai tēn orgēn kai gnōrisai to dunaton autou ēnenken en pollē makrothumia skeuē orgēs katērtismena eis apōleian
kai ina gnōrisē ton plouton tēs doxēs autou epi skeuē eleous a proētoimasen eis doxan
ous kai ekalesen ēmas ou monon ex ioudaiōn alla kai ex ethnōn
ōs kai en tō ōsēe legei kalesō ton ou laon mou laon mou kai tēn ouk ēgapēmenēn ēgapēmenēn
kai estai en tō topō ou errēthē autois ou laos mou umeis ekei klēthēsontai uioi theou zōntos
ēsaias de krazei uper tou israēl ean ē o arithmos tōn uiōn israēl ōs ē ammos tēs thalassēs to kataleimma sōthēsetai
adelphoi ē men eudokia tēs emēs kardias kai ē deēsis ē pros ton theon uper tou israēl estin eis sōtērian
marturō gar autois oti zēlon theou echousin all ou kat epignōsin
agnoountes gar tēn tou theou dikaiosunēn kai tēn idian dikaiosunēn zētountes stēsai tē dikaiosunē tou theou ouch upetagēsan
telos gar nomou christos eis dikaiosunēn panti tō pisteuonti
mōsēs gar graphei tēn dikaiosunēn tēn ek tou nomou oti o poiēsas auta anthrōpos zēsetai en autois
ē de ek pisteōs dikaiosunē outōs legei mē eipēs en tē kardia sou tis anabēsetai eis ton ouranon tout estin christon katagagein
ē tis katabēsetai eis tēn abusson tout estin christon ek nekrōn anagagein
alla ti legei engus sou to rēma estin en tō stomati sou kai en tē kardia sou tout estin to rēma tēs pisteōs o kērussomen
oti ean omologēsēs en tō stomati sou kurion iēsoun kai pisteusēs en tē kardia sou oti o theos auton ēgeiren ek nekrōn sōthēsē
kardia gar pisteuetai eis dikaiosunēn stomati de omologeitai eis sōtērian
legei gar ē graphē pas o pisteuōn ep autō ou kataischunthēsetai
ou gar estin diastolē ioudaiou te kai ellēnos o gar autos kurios pantōn ploutōn eis pantas tous epikaloumenous auton
pas gar os an epikalesētai to onoma kuriou sōthēsetai
pōs oun epikalesontai eis on ouk episteusan pōs de pisteusousin ou ouk ēkousan pōs de akousousin chōris kērussontos
pōs de kēruxousin ean mē apostalōsin kathōs gegraptai ōs ōraioi oi podes tōn euangelizomenōn eirēnēn tōn euangelizomenōn ta agatha
all ou pantes upēkousan tō euangeliō ēsaias gar legei kurie tis episteusen tē akoē ēmōn
ara ē pistis ex akoēs ē de akoē dia rēmatos theou
alla legō mē ouk ēkousan menounge eis pasan tēn gēn exēlthen o phthongos autōn kai eis ta perata tēs oikoumenēs ta rēmata autōn
alla legō mē ouk egnō israēl prōtos mōsēs legei egō parazēlōsō umas ep ouk ethnei epi ethnei asunetō parorgiō umas
ēsaias de apotolma kai legei eurethēn tois eme mē zētousin emphanēs egenomēn tois eme mē eperōtōsin
pros de ton israēl legei olēn tēn ēmeran exepetasa tas cheiras mou pros laon apeithounta kai antilegonta
legō oun mē apōsato o theos ton laon autou mē genoito kai gar egō israēlitēs eimi ek spermatos abraam phulēs beniamin
ouk apōsato o theos ton laon autou on proegnō ē ouk oidate en ēlia ti legei ē graphē ōs entunchanei tō theō kata tou israēl legōn
kurie tous prophētas sou apekteinan kai ta thusiastēria sou kateskapsan kagō upeleiphthēn monos kai zētousin tēn psuchēn mou
alla ti legei autō o chrēmatismos katelipon emautō eptakischilious andras oitines ouk ekampsan gonu tē baal
outōs oun kai en tō nun kairō leimma kat eklogēn charitos gegonen
ei de chariti ouketi ex ergōn epei ē charis ouketi ginetai charis ei de ex ergōn ouketi estin charis epei to ergon ouketi estin ergon
ti oun o epizētei israēl toutou ouk epetuchen ē de eklogē epetuchen oi de loipoi epōrōthēsan
kathōs gegraptai edōken autois o theos pneuma katanuxeōs ophthalmous tou mē blepein kai ōta tou mē akouein eōs tēs sēmeron ēmeras
kai dabid legei genēthētō ē trapeza autōn eis pagida kai eis thēran kai eis skandalon kai eis antapodoma autois
skotisthētōsan oi ophthalmoi autōn tou mē blepein kai ton nōton autōn diapantos sunkampson
legō oun mē eptaisan ina pesōsin mē genoito alla tō autōn paraptōmati ē sōtēria tois ethnesin eis to parazēlōsai autous
ei de to paraptōma autōn ploutos kosmou kai to ēttēma autōn ploutos ethnōn posō mallon to plērōma autōn
umin gar legō tois ethnesin eph oson men eimi egō ethnōn apostolos tēn diakonian mou doxazō
ei pōs parazēlōsō mou tēn sarka kai sōsō tinas ex autōn
ei gar ē apobolē autōn katallagē kosmou tis ē proslēpsis ei mē zōē ek nekrōn
ei de ē aparchē agia kai to phurama kai ei ē riza agia kai oi kladoi
ei de tines tōn kladōn exeklasthēsan su de agrielaios ōn enekentristhēs en autois kai sunkoinōnos tēs rizēs kai tēs piotētos tēs elaias egenou
mē katakauchō tōn kladōn ei de katakauchasai ou su tēn rizan bastazeis all ē riza se
ereis oun exeklasthēsan oi kladoi ina egō enkentristhō
kalōs tē apistia exeklasthēsan su de tē pistei estēkas mē upsēlophronei alla phobou
ei gar o theos tōn kata phusin kladōn ouk epheisato mēpōs oude sou pheisētai
ide oun chrēstotēta kai apotomian theou epi men tous pesontas apotomian epi de se chrēstotēta ean epimeinēs tē chrēstotēti epei kai su ekkopēsē
kai ekeinoi de ean mē epimeinōsin tē apistia enkentristhēsontai dunatos gar estin o theos palin enkentrisai autous
parakalō oun umas adelphoi dia tōn oiktirmōn tou theou parastēsai ta sōmata umōn thusian zōsan agian euareston tō theō tēn logikēn latreian umōn
kai mē suschēmatizesthe tō aiōni toutō alla metamorphousthe tē anakainōsei tou noos umōn eis to dokimazein umas ti to thelēma tou theou to agathon kai euareston kai teleion
legō gar dia tēs charitos tēs dotheisēs moi panti tō onti en umin mē uperphronein par o dei phronein alla phronein eis to sōphronein ekastō ōs o theos emerisen metron pisteōs
kathaper gar en eni sōmati melē polla echomen ta de melē panta ou tēn autēn echei praxin
outōs oi polloi en sōma esmen en christō o de kath eis allēlōn melē
echontes de charismata kata tēn charin tēn dotheisan ēmin diaphora eite prophēteian kata tēn analogian tēs pisteōs
eite diakonian en tē diakonia eite o didaskōn en tē didaskalia
eite o parakalōn en tē paraklēsei o metadidous en aplotēti o proistamenos en spoudē o eleōn en ilarotēti
ē agapē anupokritos apostugountes to ponēron kollōmenoi tō agathō
tē philadelphia eis allēlous philostorgoi tē timē allēlous proēgoumenoi
tē spoudē mē oknēroi tō pneumati zeontes tō kuriō douleuontes
tē elpidi chairontes tē thlipsei upomenontes tē proseuchē proskarterountes
tais chreiais tōn agiōn koinōnountes tēn philoxenian diōkontes
eulogeite tous diōkontas umas eulogeite kai mē katarasthe
chairein meta chairontōn kai klaiein meta klaiontōn
to auto eis allēlous phronountes mē ta upsēla phronountes alla tois tapeinois sunapagomenoi mē ginesthe phronimoi par eautois
mēdeni kakon anti kakou apodidontes pronooumenoi kala enōpion pantōn anthrōpōn
ei dunaton to ex umōn meta pantōn anthrōpōn eirēneuontes
mē eautous ekdikountes agapētoi alla dote topon tē orgē gegraptai gar emoi ekdikēsis egō antapodōsō legei kurios
ean oun peina o echthros sou psōmize auton ean dipsa potize auton touto gar poiōn anthrakas puros sōreuseis epi tēn kephalēn autou
mē nikō upo tou kakou alla nika en tō agathō to kakon
pasa psuchē exousiais uperechousais upotassesthō ou gar estin exousia ei mē apo theou ai de ousai exousiai upo tou theou tetagmenai eisin
ōste o antitassomenos tē exousia tē tou theou diatagē anthestēken oi de anthestēkotes eautois krima lēpsontai
oi gar archontes ouk eisin phobos tōn agathōn ergōn alla tōn kakōn theleis de mē phobeisthai tēn exousian to agathon poiei kai exeis epainon ex autēs
theou gar diakonos estin soi eis to agathon ean de to kakon poiēs phobou ou gar eikē tēn machairan phorei theou gar diakonos estin ekdikos eis orgēn tō to kakon prassonti
dio anankē upotassesthai ou monon dia tēn orgēn alla kai dia tēn suneidēsin
dia touto gar kai phorous teleite leitourgoi gar theou eisin eis auto touto proskarterountes
apodote oun pasin tas opheilas tō ton phoron ton phoron tō to telos to telos tō ton phobon ton phobon tō tēn timēn tēn timēn
mēdeni mēden opheilete ei mē to agapan allēlous o gar agapōn ton eteron nomon peplērōken
to gar ou moicheuseis ou phoneuseis ou klepseis ou pseudomarturēseis ouk epithumēseis kai ei tis etera entolē en toutō tō logō anakephalaioutai en tō agapēseis ton plēsion sou ōs eauton
ē agapē tō plēsion kakon ouk ergazetai plērōma oun nomou ē agapē
kai touto eidotes ton kairon oti ōra ēmas ēdē ex upnou egerthēnai nun gar enguteron ēmōn ē sōtēria ē ote episteusamen
ē nux proekopsen ē de ēmera ēngiken apothōmetha oun ta erga tou skotous kai endusōmetha ta opla tou phōtos
ōs en ēmera euschēmonōs peripatēsōmen mē kōmois kai methais mē koitais kai aselgeiais mē eridi kai zēlō
all endusasthe ton kurion iēsoun christon kai tēs sarkos pronoian mē poieisthe eis epithumias
ton de asthenounta tē pistei proslambanesthe mē eis diakriseis dialogismōn
os men pisteuei phagein panta o de asthenōn lachana esthiei
o esthiōn ton mē esthionta mē exoutheneitō kai o mē esthiōn ton esthionta mē krinetō o theos gar auton proselabeto
su tis ei o krinōn allotrion oiketēn tō idiō kuriō stēkei ē piptei stathēsetai de dunatos gar estin o theos stēsai auton
os men krinei ēmeran par ēmeran os de krinei pasan ēmeran ekastos en tō idiō noi plērophoreisthō
o phronōn tēn ēmeran kuriō phronei kai o mē phronōn tēn ēmeran kuriō ou phronei o esthiōn kuriō esthiei eucharistei gar tō theō kai o mē esthiōn kuriō ouk esthiei kai eucharistei tō theō
oudeis gar ēmōn eautō zē kai oudeis eautō apothnēskei
ean te gar zōmen tō kuriō zōmen ean te apothnēskōmen tō kuriō apothnēskomen ean te oun zōmen ean te apothnēskōmen tou kuriou esmen
eis touto gar christos kai apethanen kai anestē kai anezēsen ina kai nekrōn kai zōntōn kurieusē
su de ti krineis ton adelphon sou ē kai su ti exoutheneis ton adelphon sou pantes gar parastēsometha tō bēmati tou christou
gegraptai gar zō egō legei kurios oti emoi kampsei pan gonu kai pasa glōssa exomologēsetai tō theō
ara oun ekastos ēmōn peri eautou logon dōsei tō theō
mēketi oun allēlous krinōmen alla touto krinate mallon to mē tithenai proskomma tō adelphō ē skandalon
oida kai pepeismai en kuriō iēsou oti ouden koinon di eautou ei mē tō logizomenō ti koinon einai ekeinō koinon
ei de dia brōma o adelphos sou lupeitai ouketi kata agapēn peripateis mē tō brōmati sou ekeinon apollue uper ou christos apethanen
opheilomen de ēmeis oi dunatoi ta asthenēmata tōn adunatōn bastazein kai mē eautois areskein
ekastos gar ēmōn tō plēsion aresketō eis to agathon pros oikodomēn
kai gar o christos ouch eautō ēresen alla kathōs gegraptai oi oneidismoi tōn oneidizontōn se epepeson ep eme
osa gar proegraphē eis tēn ēmeteran didaskalian proegraphē ina dia tēs upomonēs kai tēs paraklēseōs tōn graphōn tēn elpida echōmen
o de theos tēs upomonēs kai tēs paraklēseōs dōē umin to auto phronein en allēlois kata christon iēsoun
ina omothumadon en eni stomati doxazēte ton theon kai patera tou kuriou ēmōn iēsou christou
dio proslambanesthe allēlous kathōs kai o christos proselabeto ēmas eis doxan theou
legō de iēsoun christon diakonon gegenēsthai peritomēs uper alētheias theou eis to bebaiōsai tas epangelias tōn paterōn
ta de ethnē uper eleous doxasai ton theon kathōs gegraptai dia touto exomologēsomai soi en ethnesin kai tō onomati sou psalō
kai palin legei euphranthēte ethnē meta tou laou autou
kai palin aineite ton kurion panta ta ethnē kai epainesate auton pantes oi laoi
kai palin ēsaias legei estai ē riza tou iessai kai o anistamenos archein ethnōn ep autō ethnē elpiousin
o de theos tēs elpidos plērōsai umas pasēs charas kai eirēnēs en tō pisteuein eis to perisseuein umas en tē elpidi en dunamei pneumatos agiou
pepeismai de adelphoi mou kai autos egō peri umōn oti kai autoi mestoi este agathōsunēs peplērōmenoi pasēs gnōseōs dunamenoi kai allēlous nouthetein
tolmēroteron de egrapsa umin adelphoi apo merous ōs epanamimnēskōn umas dia tēn charin tēn dotheisan moi upo tou theou
eis to einai me leitourgon iēsou christou eis ta ethnē ierourgounta to euangelion tou theou ina genētai ē prosphora tōn ethnōn euprosdektos ēgiasmenē en pneumati agiō
echō oun kauchēsin en christō iēsou ta pros theon
ou gar tolmēsō lalein ti ōn ou kateirgasato christos di emou eis upakoēn ethnōn logō kai ergō
en dunamei sēmeiōn kai teratōn en dunamei pneumatos theou ōste me apo ierousalēm kai kuklō mechri tou illurikou peplērōkenai to euangelion tou christou
outōs de philotimoumenon euangelizesthai ouch opou ōnomasthē christos ina mē ep allotrion themelion oikodomō
alla kathōs gegraptai ois ouk anēngelē peri autou opsontai kai oi ouk akēkoasin sunēsousin
dio kai enekoptomēn ta polla tou elthein pros umas
nuni de mēketi topon echōn en tois klimasin toutois epipothian de echōn tou elthein pros umas apo pollōn etōn
ōs ean poreuōmai eis tēn spanian eleusomai pros umas elpizō gar diaporeuomenos theasasthai umas kai uph umōn propemphthēnai ekei ean umōn prōton apo merous emplēsthō
nuni de poreuomai eis ierousalēm diakonōn tois agiois
eudokēsan gar makedonia kai achaia koinōnian tina poiēsasthai eis tous ptōchous tōn agiōn tōn en ierousalēm
eudokēsan gar kai opheiletai autōn eisin ei gar tois pneumatikois autōn ekoinōnēsan ta ethnē opheilousin kai en tois sarkikois leitourgēsai autois
touto oun epitelesas kai sphragisamenos autois ton karpon touton apeleusomai di umōn eis tēn spanian
oida de oti erchomenos pros umas en plērōmati eulogias tou euangeliou tou christou eleusomai
parakalō de umas adelphoi dia tou kuriou ēmōn iēsou christou kai dia tēs agapēs tou pneumatos sunagōnisasthai moi en tais proseuchais uper emou pros ton theon
ina rusthō apo tōn apeithountōn en tē ioudaia kai ina ē diakonia mou ē eis ierousalēm euprosdektos genētai tois agiois
ina en chara elthō pros umas dia thelēmatos theou kai sunanapausōmai umin
o de theos tēs eirēnēs meta pantōn umōn amēn
sunistēmi de umin phoibēn tēn adelphēn ēmōn ousan diakonon tēs ekklēsias tēs en kenchreais
ina autēn prosdexēsthe en kuriō axiōs tōn agiōn kai parastēte autē en ō an umōn chrēzē pragmati kai gar autē prostatis pollōn egenēthē kai autou emou
aspasasthe priskillan kai akulan tous sunergous mou en christō iēsou
oitines uper tēs psuchēs mou ton eautōn trachēlon upethēkan ois ouk egō monos eucharistō alla kai pasai ai ekklēsiai tōn ethnōn
kai tēn kat oikon autōn ekklēsian aspasasthe epaineton ton agapēton mou os estin aparchē tēs achaias eis christon
aspasasthe mariam ētis polla ekopiasen eis ēmas
aspasasthe andronikon kai iounian tous sungeneis mou kai sunaichmalōtous mou oitines eisin episēmoi en tois apostolois oi kai pro emou gegonasin en christō
aspasasthe amplian ton agapēton mou en kuriō
aspasasthe ourbanon ton sunergon ēmōn en christō kai stachun ton agapēton mou
aspasasthe apellēn ton dokimon en christō aspasasthe tous ek tōn aristoboulou

name: ΠΡΟΣ ΚΟΡΙΝΘΙΟΥΣ Α΄
chapters: paulos klētos apostolos iēsou christou dia thelēmatos theou kai sōsthenēs o adelphos
tē ekklēsia tou theou tē ousē en korinthō ēgiasmenois en christō iēsou klētois agiois sun pasin tois epikaloumenois to onoma tou kuriou ēmōn iēsou christou en panti topō autōn te kai ēmōn
charis umin kai eirēnē apo theou patros ēmōn kai kuriou iēsou christou
eucharistō tō theō mou pantote peri umōn epi tē chariti tou theou tē dotheisē umin en christō iēsou
oti en panti eploutisthēte en autō en panti logō kai pasē gnōsei
kathōs to marturion tou christou ebebaiōthē en umin
ōste umas mē ustereisthai en mēdeni charismati apekdechomenous tēn apokalupsin tou kuriou ēmōn iēsou christou
os kai bebaiōsei umas eōs telous anenklētous en tē ēmera tou kuriou ēmōn iēsou christou
pistos o theos di ou eklēthēte eis koinōnian tou uiou autou iēsou christou tou kuriou ēmōn
parakalō de umas adelphoi dia tou onomatos tou kuriou ēmōn iēsou christou ina to auto legēte pantes kai mē ē en umin schismata ēte de katērtismenoi en tō autō noi kai en tē autē gnōmē
edēlōthē gar moi peri umōn adelphoi mou upo tōn chloēs oti erides en umin eisin
legō de touto oti ekastos umōn legei egō men eimi paulou egō de apollō egō de kēpha egō de christou
memeristai o christos mē paulos estaurōthē uper umōn ē eis to onoma paulou ebaptisthēte
eucharistō tō theō oti oudena umōn ebaptisa ei mē krispon kai gaion
ina mē tis eipē oti eis to emon onoma ebaptisa
ebaptisa de kai ton stephana oikon loipon ouk oida ei tina allon ebaptisa
ou gar apesteilen me christos baptizein all euangelizesthai ouk en sophia logou ina mē kenōthē o stauros tou christou
o logos gar o tou staurou tois men apollumenois mōria estin tois de sōzomenois ēmin dunamis theou estin
gegraptai gar apolō tēn sophian tōn sophōn kai tēn sunesin tōn sunetōn athetēsō
pou sophos pou grammateus pou suzētētēs tou aiōnos toutou ouchi emōranen o theos tēn sophian tou kosmou toutou
epeidē gar en tē sophia tou theou ouk egnō o kosmos dia tēs sophias ton theon eudokēsen o theos dia tēs mōrias tou kērugmatos sōsai tous pisteuontas
epeidē kai ioudaioi sēmeion aitousin kai ellēnes sophian zētousin
ēmeis de kērussomen christon estaurōmenon ioudaiois men skandalon ellēsin de mōrian
autois de tois klētois ioudaiois te kai ellēsin christon theou dunamin kai theou sophian
oti to mōron tou theou sophōteron tōn anthrōpōn estin kai to asthenes tou theou ischuroteron tōn anthrōpōn estin
blepete gar tēn klēsin umōn adelphoi oti ou polloi sophoi kata sarka ou polloi dunatoi ou polloi eugeneis
alla ta mōra tou kosmou exelexato o theos ina tous sophous kataischunē kai ta asthenē tou kosmou exelexato o theos ina kataischunē ta ischura
kai ta agenē tou kosmou kai ta exouthenēmena exelexato o theos kai ta mē onta ina ta onta katargēsē
opōs mē kauchēsētai pasa sarx enōpion autou
ex autou de umeis este en christō iēsou os egenēthē ēmin sophia apo theou dikaiosunē te kai agiasmos kai apolutrōsis
ina kathōs gegraptai o kauchōmenos en kuriō kauchasthō
kagō elthōn pros umas adelphoi ēlthon ou kath uperochēn logou ē sophias katangellōn umin to marturion tou theou
ou gar ekrina tou eidenai ti en umin ei mē iēsoun christon kai touton estaurōmenon
kai egō en astheneia kai en phobō kai en tromō pollō egenomēn pros umas
kai o logos mou kai to kērugma mou ouk en peithois anthrōpinēs sophias logois all en apodeixei pneumatos kai dunameōs
ina ē pistis umōn mē ē en sophia anthrōpōn all en dunamei theou
sophian de laloumen en tois teleiois sophian de ou tou aiōnos toutou oude tōn archontōn tou aiōnos toutou tōn katargoumenōn
alla laloumen sophian theou en mustēriō tēn apokekrummenēn ēn proōrisen o theos pro tōn aiōnōn eis doxan ēmōn
ēn oudeis tōn archontōn tou aiōnos toutou egnōken ei gar egnōsan ouk an ton kurion tēs doxēs estaurōsan
alla kathōs gegraptai a ophthalmos ouk eiden kai ous ouk ēkousen kai epi kardian anthrōpou ouk anebē a ētoimasen o theos tois agapōsin auton
ēmin de o theos apekalupsen dia tou pneumatos autou to gar pneuma panta ereuna kai ta bathē tou theou
tis gar oiden anthrōpōn ta tou anthrōpou ei mē to pneuma tou anthrōpou to en autō outōs kai ta tou theou oudeis oiden ei mē to pneuma tou theou
ēmeis de ou to pneuma tou kosmou elabomen alla to pneuma to ek tou theou ina eidōmen ta upo tou theou charisthenta ēmin
a kai laloumen ouk en didaktois anthrōpinēs sophias logois all en didaktois pneumatos agiou pneumatikois pneumatika sunkrinontes
psuchikos de anthrōpos ou dechetai ta tou pneumatos tou theou mōria gar autō estin kai ou dunatai gnōnai oti pneumatikōs anakrinetai
o de pneumatikos anakrinei men panta autos de up oudenos anakrinetai
tis gar egnō noun kuriou os sumbibasei auton ēmeis de noun christou echomen
kai egō adelphoi ouk ēdunēthēn lalēsai umin ōs pneumatikois all ōs sarkikois ōs nēpiois en christō
gala umas epotisa kai ou brōma oupō gar ēdunasthe all oute eti nun dunasthe
eti gar sarkikoi este opou gar en umin zēlos kai eris kai dichostasiai ouchi sarkikoi este kai kata anthrōpon peripateite
otan gar legē tis egō men eimi paulou eteros de egō apollō ouchi sarkikoi este
tis oun estin paulos tis de apollōs all ē diakonoi di ōn episteusate kai ekastō ōs o kurios edōken
egō ephuteusa apollōs epotisen all o theos ēuxanen
ōste oute o phuteuōn estin ti oute o potizōn all o auxanōn theos
o phuteuōn de kai o potizōn en eisin ekastos de ton idion misthon lēpsetai kata ton idion kopon
theou gar esmen sunergoi theou geōrgion theou oikodomē este
kata tēn charin tou theou tēn dotheisan moi ōs sophos architektōn themelion tetheika allos de epoikodomei ekastos de blepetō pōs epoikodomei
themelion gar allon oudeis dunatai theinai para ton keimenon os estin iēsous o christos
ei de tis epoikodomei epi ton themelion touton chruson arguron lithous timious xula chorton kalamēn
ekastou to ergon phaneron genēsetai ē gar ēmera dēlōsei oti en puri apokaluptetai kai ekastou to ergon opoion estin to pur dokimasei
ei tinos to ergon menei o epōkodomēsen misthon lēpsetai
ei tinos to ergon katakaēsetai zēmiōthēsetai autos de sōthēsetai outōs de ōs dia puros
ouk oidate oti naos theou este kai to pneuma tou theou oikei en umin
ei tis ton naon tou theou phtheirei phtherei touton o theos o gar naos tou theou agios estin oitines este umeis
mēdeis eauton exapatatō ei tis dokei sophos einai en umin en tō aiōni toutō mōros genesthō ina genētai sophos
ē gar sophia tou kosmou toutou mōria para tō theō estin gegraptai gar o drassomenos tous sophous en tē panourgia autōn
kai palin kurios ginōskei tous dialogismous tōn sophōn oti eisin mataioi
ōste mēdeis kauchasthō en anthrōpois panta gar umōn estin
eite paulos eite apollōs eite kēphas eite kosmos eite zōē eite thanatos eite enestōta eite mellonta panta umōn estin
umeis de christou christos de theou
outōs ēmas logizesthō anthrōpos ōs upēretas christou kai oikonomous mustēriōn theou
o de loipon zēteitai en tois oikonomois ina pistos tis eurethē
emoi de eis elachiston estin ina uph umōn anakrithō ē upo anthrōpinēs ēmeras all oude emauton anakrinō
ouden gar emautō sunoida all ouk en toutō dedikaiōmai o de anakrinōn me kurios estin
ōste mē pro kairou ti krinete eōs an elthē o kurios os kai phōtisei ta krupta tou skotous kai phanerōsei tas boulas tōn kardiōn kai tote o epainos genēsetai ekastō apo tou theou
tauta de adelphoi meteschēmatisa eis emauton kai apollō di umas ina en ēmin mathēte to mē uper o gegraptai phronein ina mē eis uper tou enos phusiousthe kata tou eterou
tis gar se diakrinei ti de echeis o ouk elabes ei de kai elabes ti kauchasai ōs mē labōn
ēdē kekoresmenoi este ēdē eploutēsate chōris ēmōn ebasileusate kai ophelon ge ebasileusate ina kai ēmeis umin sumbasileusōmen
dokō gar oti o theos ēmas tous apostolous eschatous apedeixen ōs epithanatious oti theatron egenēthēmen tō kosmō kai angelois kai anthrōpois
ēmeis mōroi dia christon umeis de phronimoi en christō ēmeis astheneis umeis de ischuroi umeis endoxoi ēmeis de atimoi
achri tēs arti ōras kai peinōmen kai dipsōmen kai gumnēteuomen kai kolaphizometha kai astatoumen
kai kopiōmen ergazomenoi tais idiais chersin loidoroumenoi eulogoumen diōkomenoi anechometha
blasphēmoumenoi parakaloumen ōs perikatharmata tou kosmou egenēthēmen pantōn peripsēma eōs arti
ouk entrepōn umas graphō tauta all ōs tekna mou agapēta nouthetō
ean gar murious paidagōgous echēte en christō all ou pollous pateras en gar christō iēsou dia tou euangeliou egō umas egennēsa
parakalō oun umas mimētai mou ginesthe
dia touto epempsa umin timotheon os estin teknon mou agapēton kai piston en kuriō os umas anamnēsei tas odous mou tas en christō kathōs pantachou en pasē ekklēsia didaskō
ōs mē erchomenou de mou pros umas ephusiōthēsan tines
eleusomai de tacheōs pros umas ean o kurios thelēsē kai gnōsomai ou ton logon tōn pephusiōmenōn alla tēn dunamin
ou gar en logō ē basileia tou theou all en dunamei
ti thelete en rabdō elthō pros umas ē en agapē pneumati te praotētos
olōs akouetai en umin porneia kai toiautē porneia ētis oude en tois ethnesin onomazetai ōste gunaika tina tou patros echein
kai umeis pephusiōmenoi este kai ouchi mallon epenthēsate ina exarthē ek mesou umōn o to ergon touto poiēsas
egō men gar ōs apōn tō sōmati parōn de tō pneumati ēdē kekrika ōs parōn ton outōs touto katergasamenon
en tō onomati tou kuriou ēmōn iēsou christou sunachthentōn umōn kai tou emou pneumatos sun tē dunamei tou kuriou ēmōn iēsou christou
paradounai ton toiouton tō satana eis olethron tēs sarkos ina to pneuma sōthē en tē ēmera tou kuriou iēsou
ou kalon to kauchēma umōn ouk oidate oti mikra zumē olon to phurama zumoi
ekkatharate oun tēn palaian zumēn ina ēte neon phurama kathōs este azumoi kai gar to pascha ēmōn uper ēmōn ethuthē christos
ōste eortazōmen mē en zumē palaia mēde en zumē kakias kai ponērias all en azumois eilikrineias kai alētheias
egrapsa umin en tē epistolē mē sunanamignusthai pornois
kai ou pantōs tois pornois tou kosmou toutou ē tois pleonektais ē arpaxin ē eidōlolatrais epei opheilete ara ek tou kosmou exelthein
nuni de egrapsa umin mē sunanamignusthai ean tis adelphos onomazomenos ē pornos ē pleonektēs ē eidōlolatrēs ē loidoros ē methusos ē arpax tō toioutō mēde sunesthiein
ti gar moi kai tous exō krinein ouchi tous esō umeis krinete
tous de exō o theos krinei kai exareite ton ponēron ex umōn autōn
tolma tis umōn pragma echōn pros ton eteron krinesthai epi tōn adikōn kai ouchi epi tōn agiōn
ouk oidate oti oi agioi ton kosmon krinousin kai ei en umin krinetai o kosmos anaxioi este kritēriōn elachistōn
ouk oidate oti angelous krinoumen mēti ge biōtika
biōtika men oun kritēria ean echēte tous exouthenēmenous en tē ekklēsia toutous kathizete
pros entropēn umin legō outōs ouk estin en umin sophos oude eis os dunēsetai diakrinai ana meson tou adelphou autou
alla adelphos meta adelphou krinetai kai touto epi apistōn
ēdē men oun olōs ēttēma en umin estin oti krimata echete meth eautōn dia ti ouchi mallon adikeisthe dia ti ouchi mallon apostereisthe
alla umeis adikeite kai apostereite kai tauta adelphous
ē ouk oidate oti adikoi basileian theou ou klēronomēsousin mē planasthe oute pornoi oute eidōlolatrai oute moichoi oute malakoi oute arsenokoitai
oute kleptai oute pleonektai oute methusoi ou loidoroi ouch arpages basileian theou ou klēronomēsousin
kai tauta tines ēte alla apelousasthe alla ēgiasthēte all edikaiōthēte en tō onomati tou kuriou iēsou kai en tō pneumati tou theou ēmōn
panta moi exestin all ou panta sumpherei panta moi exestin all ouk egō exousiasthēsomai upo tinos
ta brōmata tē koilia kai ē koilia tois brōmasin o de theos kai tautēn kai tauta katargēsei to de sōma ou tē porneia alla tō kuriō kai o kurios tō sōmati
o de theos kai ton kurion ēgeiren kai ēmas exegerei dia tēs dunameōs autou
ouk oidate oti ta sōmata umōn melē christou estin aras oun ta melē tou christou poiēsō pornēs melē mē genoito
ē ouk oidate oti o kollōmenos tē pornē en sōma estin esontai gar phēsin oi duo eis sarka mian
o de kollōmenos tō kuriō en pneuma estin
pheugete tēn porneian pan amartēma o ean poiēsē anthrōpos ektos tou sōmatos estin o de porneuōn eis to idion sōma amartanei
ē ouk oidate oti to sōma umōn naos tou en umin agiou pneumatos estin ou echete apo theou kai ouk este eautōn
ēgorasthēte gar timēs doxasate dē ton theon en tō sōmati umōn kai en tō pneumati umōn atina estin tou theou
peri de ōn egrapsate moi kalon anthrōpō gunaikos mē aptesthai
dia de tas porneias ekastos tēn eautou gunaika echetō kai ekastē ton idion andra echetō
tē gunaiki o anēr tēn opheilomenēn eunoian apodidotō omoiōs de kai ē gunē tō andri
ē gunē tou idiou sōmatos ouk exousiazei all o anēr omoiōs de kai o anēr tou idiou sōmatos ouk exousiazei all ē gunē
mē apostereite allēlous ei mē ti an ek sumphōnou pros kairon ina scholazēte tē nēsteia kai tē proseuchē kai palin epi to auto sunerchēsthe ina mē peirazē umas o satanas dia tēn akrasian umōn
touto de legō kata sungnōmēn ou kat epitagēn
thelō gar pantas anthrōpous einai ōs kai emauton all ekastos idion charisma echei ek theou os men outōs os de outōs
legō de tois agamois kai tais chērais kalon autois estin ean meinōsin ōs kagō
ei de ouk enkrateuontai gamēsatōsan kreisson gar estin gamēsai ē purousthai
tois de gegamēkosin parangellō ouk egō all o kurios gunaika apo andros mē chōristhēnai
ean de kai chōristhē menetō agamos ē tō andri katallagētō kai andra gunaika mē aphienai
tois de loipois egō legō ouch o kurios ei tis adelphos gunaika echei apiston kai autē suneudokei oikein met autou mē aphietō autēn
kai gunē ētis echei andra apiston kai autos suneudokei oikein met autēs mē aphietō auton
ēgiastai gar o anēr o apistos en tē gunaiki kai ēgiastai ē gunē ē apistos en tō andri epei ara ta tekna umōn akatharta estin nun de agia estin
ei de o apistos chōrizetai chōrizesthō ou dedoulōtai o adelphos ē ē adelphē en tois toioutois en de eirēnē keklēken ēmas o theos
ti gar oidas gunai ei ton andra sōseis ē ti oidas aner ei tēn gunaika sōseis
ei mē ekastō ōs emerisen o theos ekaston ōs keklēken o kurios outōs peripateitō kai outōs en tais ekklēsiais pasais diatassomai
peritetmēmenos tis eklēthē mē epispasthō en akrobustia tis eklēthē mē peritemnesthō
ē peritomē ouden estin kai ē akrobustia ouden estin alla tērēsis entolōn theou
ekastos en tē klēsei ē eklēthē en tautē menetō
doulos eklēthēs mē soi meletō all ei kai dunasai eleutheros genesthai mallon chrēsai
o gar en kuriō klētheis doulos apeleutheros kuriou estin omoiōs kai o eleutheros klētheis doulos estin christou
timēs ēgorasthēte mē ginesthe douloi anthrōpōn
ekastos en ō eklēthē adelphoi en toutō menetō para tō theō
peri de tōn parthenōn epitagēn kuriou ouk echō gnōmēn de didōmi ōs ēleēmenos upo kuriou pistos einai
peri de tōn eidōlothutōn oidamen oti pantes gnōsin echomen ē gnōsis phusioi ē de agapē oikodomei
ei de tis dokei eidenai ti oudepō ouden egnōken kathōs dei gnōnai
ei de tis agapa ton theon outos egnōstai up autou
peri tēs brōseōs oun tōn eidōlothutōn oidamen oti ouden eidōlon en kosmō kai oti oudeis theos eteros ei mē eis
kai gar eiper eisin legomenoi theoi eite en ouranō eite epi tēs gēs ōsper eisin theoi polloi kai kurioi polloi
all ēmin eis theos o patēr ex ou ta panta kai ēmeis eis auton kai eis kurios iēsous christos di ou ta panta kai ēmeis di autou
all ouk en pasin ē gnōsis tines de tē suneidēsei tou eidōlou eōs arti ōs eidōlothuton esthiousin kai ē suneidēsis autōn asthenēs ousa molunetai
brōma de ēmas ou paristēsin tō theō oute gar ean phagōmen perisseuomen oute ean mē phagōmen usteroumetha
blepete de mēpōs ē exousia umōn autē proskomma genētai tois asthenousin
ean gar tis idē se ton echonta gnōsin en eidōleiō katakeimenon ouchi ē suneidēsis autou asthenous ontos oikodomēthēsetai eis to ta eidōlothuta esthiein
kai apoleitai o asthenōn adelphos epi tē sē gnōsei di on christos apethanen
outōs de amartanontes eis tous adelphous kai tuptontes autōn tēn suneidēsin asthenousan eis christon amartanete
dioper ei brōma skandalizei ton adelphon mou ou mē phagō krea eis ton aiōna ina mē ton adelphon mou skandalisō
ouk eimi apostolos ouk eimi eleutheros ouchi iēsoun christon ton kurion ēmōn eōraka ou to ergon mou umeis este en kuriō
ei allois ouk eimi apostolos alla ge umin eimi ē gar sphragis tēs emēs apostolēs umeis este en kuriō
ē emē apologia tois eme anakrinousin autē estin
mē ouk echomen exousian phagein kai piein
mē ouk echomen exousian adelphēn gunaika periagein ōs kai oi loipoi apostoloi kai oi adelphoi tou kuriou kai kēphas
ē monos egō kai barnabas ouk echomen exousian tou mē ergazesthai
tis strateuetai idiois opsōniois pote tis phuteuei ampelōna kai ek tou karpou autou ouk esthiei ē tis poimainei poimnēn kai ek tou galaktos tēs poimnēs ouk esthiei
mē kata anthrōpon tauta lalō ē ouchi kai o nomos tauta legei
en gar tō mōseōs nomō gegraptai ou phimōseis boun aloōnta mē tōn boōn melei tō theō
ē di ēmas pantōs legei di ēmas gar egraphē oti ep elpidi opheilei o arotriōn arotrian kai o aloōn tēs elpidos autou metechein ep elpidi
ei ēmeis umin ta pneumatika espeiramen mega ei ēmeis umōn ta sarkika therisomen
ei alloi tēs exousias umōn metechousin ou mallon ēmeis all ouk echrēsametha tē exousia tautē alla panta stegomen ina mē enkopēn tina dōmen tō euangeliō tou christou
ouk oidate oti oi ta iera ergazomenoi ek tou ierou esthiousin oi tō thusiastēriō prosedreuontes tō thusiastēriō summerizontai
outōs kai o kurios dietaxen tois to euangelion katangellousin ek tou euangeliou zēn
egō de oudeni echrēsamēn toutōn ouk egrapsa de tauta ina outōs genētai en emoi kalon gar moi mallon apothanein ē to kauchēma mou ina tis kenōsē
ean gar euangelizōmai ouk estin moi kauchēma anankē gar moi epikeitai ouai de moi estin ean mē euangelizōmai
ei gar ekōn touto prassō misthon echō ei de akōn oikonomian pepisteumai
tis oun moi estin o misthos ina euangelizomenos adapanon thēsō to euangelion tou christou eis to mē katachrēsasthai tē exousia mou en tō euangeliō
eleutheros gar ōn ek pantōn pasin emauton edoulōsa ina tous pleionas kerdēsō
kai egenomēn tois ioudaiois ōs ioudaios ina ioudaious kerdēsō tois upo nomon ōs upo nomon ina tous upo nomon kerdēsō
tois anomois ōs anomos mē ōn anomos theō all ennomos christō ina kerdēsō anomous
egenomēn tois asthenesin ōs asthenēs ina tous astheneis kerdēsō tois pasin gegona ta panta ina pantōs tinas sōsō
touto de poiō dia to euangelion ina sunkoinōnos autou genōmai
ouk oidate oti oi en stadiō trechontes pantes men trechousin eis de lambanei to brabeion outōs trechete ina katalabēte
pas de o agōnizomenos panta enkrateuetai ekeinoi men oun ina phtharton stephanon labōsin ēmeis de aphtharton
egō toinun outōs trechō ōs ouk adēlōs outōs pukteuō ōs ouk aera derōn
all upōpiazō mou to sōma kai doulagōgō mēpōs allois kēruxas autos adokimos genōmai
ou thelō de umas agnoein adelphoi oti oi pateres ēmōn pantes upo tēn nephelēn ēsan kai pantes dia tēs thalassēs diēlthon
kai pantes eis ton mōsēn ebaptisanto en tē nephelē kai en tē thalassē
kai pantes to auto brōma pneumatikon ephagon
kai pantes to auto poma pneumatikon epion epinon gar ek pneumatikēs akolouthousēs petras ē de petra ēn o christos
