all ouk en tois pleiosin autōn eudokēsen o theos katestrōthēsan gar en tē erēmō
tauta de tupoi ēmōn egenēthēsan eis to mē einai ēmas epithumētas kakōn kathōs kakeinoi epethumēsan
mēde eidōlolatrai ginesthe kathōs tines autōn ōs gegraptai ekathisen o laos phagein kai piein kai anestēsan paizein
mēde porneuōmen kathōs tines autōn eporneusan kai epeson en mia ēmera eikositreis chiliades
mēde ekpeirazōmen ton christon kathōs kai tines autōn epeirasan kai upo tōn opheōn apōlonto
mēde gonguzete kathōs kai tines autōn egongusan kai apōlonto upo tou olothreutou
tauta de panta tupoi sunebainon ekeinois egraphē de pros nouthesian ēmōn eis ous ta telē tōn aiōnōn katēntēsen
ōste o dokōn estanai blepetō mē pesē
peirasmos umas ouk eilēphen ei mē anthrōpinos pistos de o theos os ouk easei umas peirasthēnai uper o dunasthe alla poiēsei sun tō peirasmō kai tēn ekbasin tou dunasthai umas upenenkein
dioper agapētoi mou pheugete apo tēs eidōlolatreias
ōs phronimois legō krinate umeis o phēmi
to potērion tēs eulogias o eulogoumen ouchi koinōnia tou aimatos tou christou estin ton arton on klōmen ouchi koinōnia tou sōmatos tou christou estin
oti eis artos en sōma oi polloi esmen oi gar pantes ek tou enos artou metechomen
blepete ton israēl kata sarka ouchi oi esthiontes tas thusias koinōnoi tou thusiastēriou eisin
mimētai mou ginesthe kathōs kagō christou
epainō de umas adelphoi oti panta mou memnēsthe kai kathōs paredōka umin tas paradoseis katechete
thelō de umas eidenai oti pantos andros ē kephalē o christos estin kephalē de gunaikos o anēr kephalē de christou o theos
pas anēr proseuchomenos ē prophēteuōn kata kephalēs echōn kataischunei tēn kephalēn autou
pasa de gunē proseuchomenē ē prophēteuousa akatakaluptō tē kephalē kataischunei tēn kephalēn eautēs en gar estin kai to auto tē exurēmenē
ei gar ou katakaluptetai gunē kai keirasthō ei de aischron gunaiki to keirasthai ē xurasthai katakaluptesthō
anēr men gar ouk opheilei katakaluptesthai tēn kephalēn eikōn kai doxa theou uparchōn gunē de doxa andros estin
ou gar estin anēr ek gunaikos alla gunē ex andros
kai gar ouk ektisthē anēr dia tēn gunaika alla gunē dia ton andra
dia touto opheilei ē gunē exousian echein epi tēs kephalēs dia tous angelous
plēn oute anēr chōris gunaikos oute gunē chōris andros en kuriō
ōsper gar ē gunē ek tou andros outōs kai o anēr dia tēs gunaikos ta de panta ek tou theou
en umin autois krinate prepon estin gunaika akatakalupton tō theō proseuchesthai
ē oude autē ē phusis didaskei umas oti anēr men ean koma atimia autō estin
gunē de ean koma doxa autē estin oti ē komē anti peribolaiou dedotai autē
ei de tis dokei philoneikos einai ēmeis toiautēn sunētheian ouk echomen oude ai ekklēsiai tou theou
touto de parangellōn ouk epainō oti ouk eis to kreitton all eis to ētton sunerchesthe
prōton men gar sunerchomenōn umōn en tē ekklēsia akouō schismata en umin uparchein kai meros ti pisteuō
dei gar kai aireseis en umin einai ina oi dokimoi phaneroi genōntai en umin
sunerchomenōn oun umōn epi to auto ouk estin kuriakon deipnon phagein
ekastos gar to idion deipnon prolambanei en tō phagein kai os men peina os de methuei
mē gar oikias ouk echete eis to esthiein kai pinein ē tēs ekklēsias tou theou kataphroneite kai kataischunete tous mē echontas ti umin eipō epainesō umas en toutō ouk epainō
egō gar parelabon apo tou kuriou o kai paredōka umin oti o kurios iēsous en tē nukti ē paredidoto elaben arton
kai eucharistēsas eklasen kai eipen labete phagete touto mou estin to sōma to uper umōn klōmenon touto poieite eis tēn emēn anamnēsin
ōsautōs kai to potērion meta to deipnēsai legōn touto to potērion ē kainē diathēkē estin en tō emō aimati touto poieite osakis an pinēte eis tēn emēn anamnēsin
osakis gar an esthiēte ton arton touton kai to potērion touto pinēte ton thanaton tou kuriou katangellete achris ou an elthē
ōste os an esthiē ton arton touton ē pinē to potērion tou kuriou anaxiōs enochos estai tou sōmatos kai aimatos tou kuriou
dokimazetō de anthrōpos eauton kai outōs ek tou artou esthietō kai ek tou potēriou pinetō
o gar esthiōn kai pinōn anaxiōs krima eautō esthiei kai pinei mē diakrinōn to sōma tou kuriou
dia touto en umin polloi astheneis kai arrōstoi kai koimōntai ikanoi
ei gar eautous diekrinomen ouk an ekrinometha
krinomenoi de upo kuriou paideuometha ina mē sun tō kosmō katakrithōmen
ōste adelphoi mou sunerchomenoi eis to phagein allēlous ekdechesthe
ei de tis peina en oikō esthietō ina mē eis krima sunerchēsthe ta de loipa ōs an elthō diataxomai
peri de tōn pneumatikōn adelphoi ou thelō umas agnoein
oidate oti ethnē ēte pros ta eidōla ta aphōna ōs an ēgesthe apagomenoi
dio gnōrizō umin oti oudeis en pneumati theou lalōn legei anathema iēsoun kai oudeis dunatai eipein kurion iēsoun ei mē en pneumati agiō
diaireseis de charismatōn eisin to de auto pneuma
kai diaireseis diakoniōn eisin kai o autos kurios
kai diaireseis energēmatōn eisin o de autos estin theos o energōn ta panta en pasin
ekastō de didotai ē phanerōsis tou pneumatos pros to sumpheron
ō men gar dia tou pneumatos didotai logos sophias allō de logos gnōseōs kata to auto pneuma
eterō de pistis en tō autō pneumati allō de charismata iamatōn en tō autō pneumati
allō de energēmata dunameōn allō de prophēteia allō de diakriseis pneumatōn eterō de genē glōssōn allō de ermēneia glōssōn
panta de tauta energei to en kai to auto pneuma diairoun idia ekastō kathōs bouletai
kathaper gar to sōma en estin kai melē echei polla panta de ta melē tou sōmatos tou enos polla onta en estin sōma outōs kai o christos
kai gar en eni pneumati ēmeis pantes eis en sōma ebaptisthēmen eite ioudaioi eite ellēnes eite douloi eite eleutheroi kai pantes eis en pneuma epotisthēmen
kai gar to sōma ouk estin en melos alla polla
ean eipē o pous oti ouk eimi cheir ouk eimi ek tou sōmatos ou para touto ouk estin ek tou sōmatos
ean tais glōssais tōn anthrōpōn lalō kai tōn angelōn agapēn de mē echō gegona chalkos ēchōn ē kumbalon alalazon
kai ean echō prophēteian kai eidō ta mustēria panta kai pasan tēn gnōsin kai ean echō pasan tēn pistin ōste orē methistanein agapēn de mē echō ouden eimi
kai ean psōmisō panta ta uparchonta mou kai ean paradō to sōma mou ina kauthēsōmai agapēn de mē echō ouden ōpheloumai
ē agapē makrothumei chrēsteuetai ē agapē ou zēloi ē agapē ou perpereuetai ou phusioutai
ouk aschēmonei ou zētei ta eautēs ou paroxunetai ou logizetai to kakon
ou chairei epi tē adikia sunchairei de tē alētheia
panta stegei panta pisteuei panta elpizei panta upomenei
ē agapē oudepote ekpiptei eite de prophēteiai katargēthēsontai eite glōssai pausontai eite gnōsis katargēthēsetai
ek merous gar ginōskomen kai ek merous prophēteuomen
otan de elthē to teleion tote to ek merous katargēthēsetai
ote ēmēn nēpios ōs nēpios elaloun ōs nēpios ephronoun ōs nēpios elogizomēn ote de gegona anēr katērgēka ta tou nēpiou
blepomen gar arti di esoptrou en ainigmati tote de prosōpon pros prosōpon arti ginōskō ek merous tote de epignōsomai kathōs kai epegnōsthēn
nuni de menei pistis elpis agapē ta tria tauta meizōn de toutōn ē agapē
diōkete tēn agapēn zēloute de ta pneumatika mallon de ina prophēteuēte
o gar lalōn glōssē ouk anthrōpois lalei alla tō theō oudeis gar akouei pneumati de lalei mustēria
o de prophēteuōn anthrōpois lalei oikodomēn kai paraklēsin kai paramuthian
o lalōn glōssē eauton oikodomei o de prophēteuōn ekklēsian oikodomei
thelō de pantas umas lalein glōssais mallon de ina prophēteuēte meizōn gar o prophēteuōn ē o lalōn glōssais ektos ei mē diermēneuē ina ē ekklēsia oikodomēn labē
nuni de adelphoi ean elthō pros umas glōssais lalōn ti umas ōphelēsō ean mē umin lalēsō ē en apokalupsei ē en gnōsei ē en prophēteia ē en didachē
omōs ta apsucha phōnēn didonta eite aulos eite kithara ean diastolēn tois phthongois mē dō pōs gnōsthēsetai to auloumenon ē to kitharizomenon
kai gar ean adēlon phōnēn salpigx dō tis paraskeuasetai eis polemon
outōs kai umeis dia tēs glōssēs ean mē eusēmon logon dōte pōs gnōsthēsetai to laloumenon esesthe gar eis aera lalountes
tosauta ei tuchoi genē phōnōn estin en kosmō kai ouden aphōnon
ean oun mē eidō tēn dunamin tēs phōnēs esomai tō lalounti barbaros kai o lalōn en emoi barbaros
outōs kai umeis epei zēlōtai este pneumatōn pros tēn oikodomēn tēs ekklēsias zēteite ina perisseuēte
dioper o lalōn glōssē proseuchesthō ina diermēneuē
ean gar proseuchōmai glōssē to pneuma mou proseuchetai o de nous mou akarpos estin
ti oun estin proseuxomai tō pneumati proseuxomai de kai tō noi psalō tō pneumati psalō de kai tō noi
epei ean eulogēsēs tō pneumati o anaplērōn ton topon tou idiōtou pōs erei to amēn epi tē sē eucharistia epeidē ti legeis ouk oiden
su men gar kalōs eucharisteis all o eteros ouk oikodomeitai
eucharistō tō theō mou pantōn umōn mallon glōssais lalōn
all en ekklēsia thelō pente logous dia tou noos mou lalēsai ina kai allous katēchēsō ē murious logous en glōssē
adelphoi mē paidia ginesthe tais phresin alla tē kakia nēpiazete tais de phresin teleioi ginesthe
gnōrizō de umin adelphoi to euangelion o euēngelisamēn umin o kai parelabete en ō kai estēkate
di ou kai sōzesthe tini logō euēngelisamēn umin ei katechete ektos ei mē eikē episteusate
paredōka gar umin en prōtois o kai parelabon oti christos apethanen uper tōn amartiōn ēmōn kata tas graphas
kai oti etaphē kai oti egēgertai tē tritē ēmera kata tas graphas
kai oti ōphthē kēpha eita tois dōdeka
epeita ōphthē epanō pentakosiois adelphois ephapax ex ōn oi pleious menousin eōs arti tines de kai ekoimēthēsan
epeita ōphthē iakōbō eita tois apostolois pasin
eschaton de pantōn ōsperei tō ektrōmati ōphthē kamoi
egō gar eimi o elachistos tōn apostolōn os ouk eimi ikanos kaleisthai apostolos dioti ediōxa tēn ekklēsian tou theou
chariti de theou eimi o eimi kai ē charis autou ē eis eme ou kenē egenēthē alla perissoteron autōn pantōn ekopiasa ouk egō de all ē charis tou theou ē sun emoi
eite oun egō eite ekeinoi outōs kērussomen kai outōs episteusate
ei de christos kērussetai oti ek nekrōn egēgertai pōs legousin tines en umin oti anastasis nekrōn ouk estin
ei de anastasis nekrōn ouk estin oude christos egēgertai
ei de christos ouk egēgertai kenon ara to kērugma ēmōn kenē de kai ē pistis umōn
euriskometha de kai pseudomartures tou theou oti emarturēsamen kata tou theou oti ēgeiren ton christon on ouk ēgeiren eiper ara nekroi ouk egeirontai
ei gar nekroi ouk egeirontai oude christos egēgertai
ei de christos ouk egēgertai mataia ē pistis umōn eti este en tais amartiais umōn
ara kai oi koimēthentes en christō apōlonto
ei en tē zōē tautē ēlpikotes esmen en christō monon eleeinoteroi pantōn anthrōpōn esmen
nuni de christos egēgertai ek nekrōn aparchē tōn kekoimēmenōn egeneto
peri de tēs logias tēs eis tous agious ōsper dietaxa tais ekklēsiais tēs galatias outōs kai umeis poiēsate
kata mian sabbatōn ekastos umōn par eautō tithetō thēsaurizōn o ti an euodōtai ina mē otan elthō tote logiai ginōntai
otan de paragenōmai ous ean dokimasēte di epistolōn toutous pempsō apenenkein tēn charin umōn eis ierousalēm
ean de ē axion tou kame poreuesthai sun emoi poreusontai
eleusomai de pros umas otan makedonian dielthō makedonian gar dierchomai
pros umas de tuchon paramenō ē kai paracheimasō ina umeis me propempsēte ou ean poreuōmai
ou thelō gar umas arti en parodō idein elpizō de chronon tina epimeinai pros umas ean o kurios epitrepē
epimenō de en ephesō eōs tēs pentēkostēs
thura gar moi aneōgen megalē kai energēs kai antikeimenoi polloi
ean de elthē timotheos blepete ina aphobōs genētai pros umas to gar ergon kuriou ergazetai ōs kai egō
mē tis oun auton exouthenēsē propempsate de auton en eirēnē ina elthē pros me ekdechomai gar auton meta tōn adelphōn
peri de apollō tou adelphou polla parekalesa auton ina elthē pros umas meta tōn adelphōn kai pantōs ouk ēn thelēma ina nun elthē eleusetai de otan eukairēsē
grēgoreite stēkete en tē pistei andrizesthe krataiousthe
parakalō de umas adelphoi oidate tēn oikian stephana oti estin aparchē tēs achaias kai eis diakonian tois agiois etaxan eautous
ina kai umeis upotassēsthe tois toioutois kai panti tō sunergounti kai kopiōnti
chairō de epi tē parousia stephana kai phourtounatou kai achaikou oti to umōn usterēma outoi aneplērōsan
anepausan gar to emon pneuma kai to umōn epiginōskete oun tous toioutous
aspazontai umas ai ekklēsiai tēs asias aspazontai umas en kuriō polla akulas kai priskilla sun tē kat oikon autōn ekklēsia
aspazontai umas oi adelphoi pantes aspasasthe allēlous en philēmati agiō
o aspasmos tē emē cheiri paulou
ei tis ou philei ton kurion iēsoun christon ētō anathema maran atha
ē charis tou kuriou iēsou christou meth umōn
ē agapē mou meta pantōn umōn en christō iēsou amēn [pros korinthious prōtē egraphē apo philippōn dia stephana kai phourtounatou kai achaikou kai timotheou]

name: ΠΡΟΣ ΚΟΡΙΝΘΙΟΥΣ Β΄
chapters: paulos apostolos iēsou christou dia thelēmatos theou kai timotheos o adelphos tē ekklēsia tou theou tē ousē en korinthō sun tois agiois pasin tois ousin en olē tē achaia
charis umin kai eirēnē apo theou patros ēmōn kai kuriou iēsou christou
eulogētos o theos kai patēr tou kuriou ēmōn iēsou christou o patēr tōn oiktirmōn kai theos pasēs paraklēseōs
o parakalōn ēmas epi pasē tē thlipsei ēmōn eis to dunasthai ēmas parakalein tous en pasē thlipsei dia tēs paraklēseōs ēs parakaloumetha autoi upo tou theou
oti kathōs perisseuei ta pathēmata tou christou eis ēmas outōs dia christou perisseuei kai ē paraklēsis ēmōn

eite de thlibometha uper tēs umōn paraklēseōs kai sōtērias tēs energoumenēs en upomonē tōn autōn pathēmatōn ōn kai ēmeis paschomen eite parakaloumetha uper tēs umōn paraklēseōs kai sōtērias kai ē elpis ēmōn bebaia uper umōn
eidotes oti ōsper koinōnoi este tōn pathēmatōn outōs kai tēs paraklēseōs
ou gar thelomen umas agnoein adelphoi uper tēs thlipseōs ēmōn tēs genomenēs ēmin en tē asia oti kath uperbolēn ebarēthēmen uper dunamin ōste exaporēthēnai ēmas kai tou zēn
alla autoi en eautois to apokrima tou thanatou eschēkamen ina mē pepoithotes ōmen eph eautois all epi tō theō tō egeironti tous nekrous
os ek tēlikoutou thanatou errusato ēmas kai ruetai eis on ēlpikamen oti kai eti rusetai
sunupourgountōn kai umōn uper ēmōn tē deēsei ina ek pollōn prosōpōn to eis ēmas charisma dia pollōn eucharistēthē uper ēmōn
ē gar kauchēsis ēmōn autē estin to marturion tēs suneidēseōs ēmōn oti en aplotēti kai eilikrineia theou ouk en sophia sarkikē all en chariti theou anestraphēmen en tō kosmō perissoterōs de pros umas
ou gar alla graphomen umin all ē a anaginōskete ē kai epiginōskete elpizō de oti kai eōs telous epignōsesthe
kathōs kai epegnōte ēmas apo merous oti kauchēma umōn esmen kathaper kai umeis ēmōn en tē ēmera tou kuriou iēsou
kai tautē tē pepoithēsei eboulomēn pros umas elthein proteron ina deuteran charin echēte
kai di umōn dielthein eis makedonian kai palin apo makedonias elthein pros umas kai uph umōn propemphthēnai eis tēn ioudaian
touto oun bouleuomenos mē ti ara tē elaphria echrēsamēn ē a bouleuomai kata sarka bouleuomai ina ē par emoi to nai nai kai to ou ou
pistos de o theos oti o logos ēmōn o pros umas ouk egeneto nai kai ou
o gar tou theou uios iēsous christos o en umin di ēmōn kēruchtheis di emou kai silouanou kai timotheou ouk egeneto nai kai ou alla nai en autō gegonen
osai gar epangeliai theou en autō to nai kai en autō to amēn tō theō pros doxan di ēmōn
o de bebaiōn ēmas sun umin eis christon kai chrisas ēmas theos
o kai sphragisamenos ēmas kai dous ton arrabōna tou pneumatos en tais kardiais ēmōn
ekrina de emautō touto to mē palin elthein en lupē pros umas
ei gar egō lupō umas kai tis estin o euphrainōn me ei mē o lupoumenos ex emou
kai egrapsa umin touto auto ina mē elthōn lupēn echō aph ōn edei me chairein pepoithōs epi pantas umas oti ē emē chara pantōn umōn estin
ek gar pollēs thlipseōs kai sunochēs kardias egrapsa umin dia pollōn dakruōn ouch ina lupēthēte alla tēn agapēn ina gnōte ēn echō perissoterōs eis umas
ei de tis lelupēken ouk eme lelupēken all apo merous ina mē epibarō pantas umas
ikanon tō toioutō ē epitimia autē ē upo tōn pleionōn
ōste tounantion mallon umas charisasthai kai parakalesai mēpōs tē perissotera lupē katapothē o toioutos
dio parakalō umas kurōsai eis auton agapēn
eis touto gar kai egrapsa ina gnō tēn dokimēn umōn ei eis panta upēkooi este
ō de ti charizesthe kai egō kai gar egō ei ti kecharismai ō kecharismai di umas en prosōpō christou
ina mē pleonektēthōmen upo tou satana ou gar autou ta noēmata agnooumen
elthōn de eis tēn trōada eis to euangelion tou christou kai thuras moi aneōgmenēs en kuriō
ouk eschēka anesin tō pneumati mou tō mē eurein me titon ton adelphon mou alla apotaxamenos autois exēlthon eis makedonian
tō de theō charis tō pantote thriambeuonti ēmas en tō christō kai tēn osmēn tēs gnōseōs autou phanerounti di ēmōn en panti topō
oti christou euōdia esmen tō theō en tois sōzomenois kai en tois apollumenois
ois men osmē thanatou eis thanaton ois de osmē zōēs eis zōēn kai pros tauta tis ikanos
ou gar esmen ōs oi polloi kapēleuontes ton logon tou theou all ōs ex eilikrineias all ōs ek theou katenōpion tou theou en christō laloumen
archometha palin eautous sunistanein ē mē chrēzomen ōs tines sustatikōn epistolōn pros umas ē ex umōn sustatikōn
ē epistolē ēmōn umeis este engegrammenē en tais kardiais ēmōn ginōskomenē kai anaginōskomenē upo pantōn anthrōpōn
phaneroumenoi oti este epistolē christou diakonētheisa uph ēmōn engegrammenē ou melani alla pneumati theou zōntos ouk en plaxin lithinais all en plaxin kardias sarkinais
pepoithēsin de toiautēn echomen dia tou christou pros ton theon
ouch oti ikanoi esmen aph eautōn logisasthai ti ōs ex eautōn all ē ikanotēs ēmōn ek tou theou
os kai ikanōsen ēmas diakonous kainēs diathēkēs ou grammatos alla pneumatos to gar gramma apokteinei to de pneuma zōopoiei

ei de ē diakonia tou thanatou en grammasin entetupōmenē en lithois egenēthē en doxē ōste mē dunasthai atenisai tous uious israēl eis to prosōpon mōseōs dia tēn doxan tou prosōpou autou tēn katargoumenēn
pōs ouchi mallon ē diakonia tou pneumatos estai en doxē
ei gar ē diakonia tēs katakriseōs doxa pollō mallon perisseuei ē diakonia tēs dikaiosunēs en doxē
kai gar oude dedoxastai to dedoxasmenon en toutō tō merei eneken tēs uperballousēs doxēs
ei gar to katargoumenon dia doxēs pollō mallon to menon en doxē
echontes oun toiautēn elpida pollē parrēsia chrōmetha
kai ou kathaper mōsēs etithei kalumma epi to prosōpon eautou pros to mē atenisai tous uious israēl eis to telos tou katargoumenou
all epōrōthē ta noēmata autōn achri gar tēs sēmeron to auto kalumma epi tē anagnōsei tēs palaias diathēkēs menei mē anakaluptomenon o ti en christō katargeitai
all eōs sēmeron ēnika anaginōsketai mōsēs kalumma epi tēn kardian autōn keitai
ēnika d an epistrepsē pros kurion periaireitai to kalumma
o de kurios to pneuma estin ou de to pneuma kuriou ekei eleutheria
ēmeis de pantes anakekalummenō prosōpō tēn doxan kuriou katoptrizomenoi tēn autēn eikona metamorphoumetha apo doxēs eis doxan kathaper apo kuriou pneumatos
dia touto echontes tēn diakonian tautēn kathōs ēleēthēmen ouk ekkakoumen

all apeipametha ta krupta tēs aischunēs mē peripatountes en panourgia mēde dolountes ton logon tou theou alla tē phanerōsei tēs alētheias sunistōntes eautous pros pasan suneidēsin anthrōpōn enōpion tou theou
ei de kai estin kekalummenon to euangelion ēmōn en tois apollumenois estin kekalummenon
en ois o theos tou aiōnos toutou etuphlōsen ta noēmata tōn apistōn eis to mē augasai autois ton phōtismon tou euangeliou tēs doxēs tou christou os estin eikōn tou theou
ou gar eautous kērussomen alla christon iēsoun kurion eautous de doulous umōn dia iēsoun
oti o theos o eipōn ek skotous phōs lampsai os elampsen en tais kardiais ēmōn pros phōtismon tēs gnōseōs tēs doxēs tou theou en prosōpō iēsou christou
echomen de ton thēsauron touton en ostrakinois skeuesin ina ē uperbolē tēs dunameōs ē tou theou kai mē ex ēmōn
en panti thlibomenoi all ou stenochōroumenoi aporoumenoi all ouk exaporoumenoi
diōkomenoi all ouk enkataleipomenoi kataballomenoi all ouk apollumenoi
pantote tēn nekrōsin tou kuriou iēsou en tō sōmati peripherontes ina kai ē zōē tou iēsou en tō sōmati ēmōn phanerōthē
aei gar ēmeis oi zōntes eis thanaton paradidometha dia iēsoun ina kai ē zōē tou iēsou phanerōthē en tē thnētē sarki ēmōn
ōste o men thanatos en ēmin energeitai ē de zōē en umin
echontes de to auto pneuma tēs pisteōs kata to gegrammenon episteusa dio elalēsa kai ēmeis pisteuomen dio kai laloumen
eidotes oti o egeiras ton kurion iēsoun kai ēmas dia iēsou egerei kai parastēsei sun umin
ta gar panta di umas ina ē charis pleonasasa dia tōn pleionōn tēn eucharistian perisseusē eis tēn doxan tou theou
dio ouk ekkakoumen all ei kai o exō ēmōn anthrōpos diaphtheiretai all o esōthen anakainoutai ēmera kai ēmera
to gar parautika elaphron tēs thlipseōs ēmōn kath uperbolēn eis uperbolēn aiōnion baros doxēs katergazetai ēmin
mē skopountōn ēmōn ta blepomena alla ta mē blepomena ta gar blepomena proskaira ta de mē blepomena aiōnia

name: ΠΡΟΣ ΓΑΛΑΤΑΣ
chapters: paulos apostolos ouk ap anthrōpōn oude di anthrōpou alla dia iēsou christou kai theou patros tou egeirantos auton ek nekrōn
kai oi sun emoi pantes adelphoi tais ekklēsiais tēs galatias
charis umin kai eirēnē apo theou patros kai kuriou ēmōn iēsou christou
tou dontos eauton uper tōn amartiōn ēmōn opōs exelētai ēmas ek tou enestōtos aiōnos ponērou kata to thelēma tou theou kai patros ēmōn
ō ē doxa eis tous aiōnas tōn aiōnōn amēn
thaumazō oti outōs tacheōs metatithesthe apo tou kalesantos umas en chariti christou eis eteron euangelion
o ouk estin allo ei mē tines eisin oi tarassontes umas kai thelontes metastrepsai to euangelion tou christou
alla kai ean ēmeis ē angelos ex ouranou euangelizētai umin par o euēngelisametha umin anathema estō
ōs proeirēkamen kai arti palin legō ei tis umas euangelizetai par o parelabete anathema estō
arti gar anthrōpous peithō ē ton theon ē zētō anthrōpois areskein ei gar eti anthrōpois ēreskon christou doulos ouk an ēmēn
gnōrizō de umin adelphoi to euangelion to euangelisthen up emou oti ouk estin kata anthrōpon
oude gar egō para anthrōpou parelabon auto oute edidachthēn alla di apokalupseōs iēsou christou
ēkousate gar tēn emēn anastrophēn pote en tō ioudaismō oti kath uperbolēn ediōkon tēn ekklēsian tou theou kai eporthoun autēn
kai proekopton en tō ioudaismō uper pollous sunēlikiōtas en tō genei mou perissoterōs zēlōtēs uparchōn tōn patrikōn mou paradoseōn
ote de eudokēsen o theos o aphorisas me ek koilias mētros mou kai kalesas dia tēs charitos autou
apokalupsai ton uion autou en emoi ina euangelizōmai auton en tois ethnesin eutheōs ou prosanethemēn sarki kai aimati
oude anēlthon eis ierosoluma pros tous pro emou apostolous all apēlthon eis arabian kai palin upestrepsa eis damaskon
epeita meta etē tria anēlthon eis ierosoluma istorēsai petron kai epemeina pros auton ēmeras dekapente
eteron de tōn apostolōn ouk eidon ei mē iakōbon ton adelphon tou kuriou
a de graphō umin idou enōpion tou theou oti ou pseudomai
epeita ēlthon eis ta klimata tēs surias kai tēs kilikias
ēmēn de agnooumenos tō prosōpō tais ekklēsiais tēs ioudaias tais en christō
monon de akouontes ēsan oti o diōkōn ēmas pote nun euangelizetai tēn pistin ēn pote eporthei
kai edoxazon en emoi ton theon
epeita dia dekatessarōn etōn palin anebēn eis ierosoluma meta barnaba sumparalabōn kai titon
anebēn de kata apokalupsin kai anethemēn autois to euangelion o kērussō en tois ethnesin kat idian de tois dokousin mēpōs eis kenon trechō ē edramon
all oude titos o sun emoi ellēn ōn ēnankasthē peritmēthēnai
dia de tous pareisaktous pseudadelphous oitines pareisēlthon kataskopēsai tēn eleutherian ēmōn ēn echomen en christō iēsou ina ēmas katadoulōsōntai
ois oude pros ōran eixamen tē upotagē ina ē alētheia tou euangeliou diameinē pros umas
apo de tōn dokountōn einai ti opoioi pote ēsan ouden moi diapherei prosōpon theos anthrōpou ou lambanei emoi gar oi dokountes ouden prosanethento
alla tounantion idontes oti pepisteumai to euangelion tēs akrobustias kathōs petros tēs peritomēs
o gar energēsas petrō eis apostolēn tēs peritomēs enērgēsen kai emoi eis ta ethnē
kai gnontes tēn charin tēn dotheisan moi iakōbos kai kēphas kai iōannēs oi dokountes stuloi einai dexias edōkan emoi kai barnaba koinōnias ina ēmeis eis ta ethnē autoi de eis tēn peritomēn
monon tōn ptōchōn ina mnēmoneuōmen o kai espoudasa auto touto poiēsai
ote de ēlthen petros eis antiocheian kata prosōpon autō antestēn oti kategnōsmenos ēn
pro tou gar elthein tinas apo iakōbou meta tōn ethnōn sunēsthien ote de ēlthon upestellen kai aphōrizen eauton phoboumenos tous ek peritomēs
kai sunupekrithēsan autō kai oi loipoi ioudaioi ōste kai barnabas sunapēchthē autōn tē upokrisei
all ote eidon oti ouk orthopodousin pros tēn alētheian tou euangeliou eipon tō petrō emprosthen pantōn ei su ioudaios uparchōn ethnikōs zēs kai ouk ioudaikōs ti ta ethnē anankazeis ioudaizein
ēmeis phusei ioudaioi kai ouk ex ethnōn amartōloi

eidotes oti ou dikaioutai anthrōpos ex ergōn nomou ean mē dia pisteōs iēsou christou kai ēmeis eis christon iēsoun episteusamen ina dikaiōthōmen ek pisteōs christou kai ouk ex ergōn nomou dioti ou dikaiōthēsetai ex ergōn nomou pasa sarx
ei de zētountes dikaiōthēnai en christō eurethēmen kai autoi amartōloi ara christos amartias diakonos mē genoito
ei gar a katelusa tauta palin oikodomō parabatēn emauton sunistēmi
egō gar dia nomou nomō apethanon ina theō zēsō
christō sunestaurōmai zō de ouketi egō zē de en emoi christos o de nun zō en sarki en pistei zō tē tou uiou tou theou tou agapēsantos me kai paradontos eauton uper emou
ouk athetō tēn charin tou theou ei gar dia nomou dikaiosunē ara christos dōrean apethanen
ō anoētoi galatai tis umas ebaskanen tē alētheia mē peithesthai ois kat ophthalmous iēsous christos proegraphē en umin estaurōmenos
touto monon thelō mathein aph umōn ex ergōn nomou to pneuma elabete ē ex akoēs pisteōs
outōs anoētoi este enarxamenoi pneumati nun sarki epiteleisthe
tosauta epathete eikē eige kai eikē
o oun epichorēgōn umin to pneuma kai energōn dunameis en umin ex ergōn nomou ē ex akoēs pisteōs
kathōs abraam episteusen tō theō kai elogisthē autō eis dikaiosunēn
ginōskete ara oti oi ek pisteōs outoi eisin uioi abraam
proidousa de ē graphē oti ek pisteōs dikaioi ta ethnē o theos proeuēngelisato tō abraam oti eulogēthēsontai en soi panta ta ethnē
ōste oi ek pisteōs eulogountai sun tō pistō abraam
osoi gar ex ergōn nomou eisin upo kataran eisin gegraptai gar epikataratos pas os ouk emmenei en pasin tois gegrammenois en tō bibliō tou nomou tou poiēsai auta
oti de en nomō oudeis dikaioutai para tō theō dēlon oti o dikaios ek pisteōs zēsetai
o de nomos ouk estin ek pisteōs all o poiēsas auta anthrōpos zēsetai en autois
christos ēmas exēgorasen ek tēs kataras tou nomou genomenos uper ēmōn katara gegraptai gar epikataratos pas o kremamenos epi xulou
ina eis ta ethnē ē eulogia tou abraam genētai en christō iēsou ina tēn epangelian tou pneumatos labōmen dia tēs pisteōs
adelphoi kata anthrōpon legō omōs anthrōpou kekurōmenēn diathēkēn oudeis athetei ē epidiatassetai
tō de abraam errēthēsan ai epangeliai kai tō spermati autou ou legei kai tois spermasin ōs epi pollōn all ōs eph enos kai tō spermati sou os estin christos
touto de legō diathēkēn prokekurōmenēn upo tou theou eis christon o meta etē tetrakosia kai triakonta gegonōs nomos ouk akuroi eis to katargēsai tēn epangelian
ei gar ek nomou ē klēronomia ouketi ex epangelias tō de abraam di epangelias kecharistai o theos
ti oun o nomos tōn parabaseōn charin prosetethē achris ou elthē to sperma ō epēngeltai diatageis di angelōn en cheiri mesitou
o de mesitēs enos ouk estin o de theos eis estin
o oun nomos kata tōn epangeliōn tou theou mē genoito ei gar edothē nomos o dunamenos zōopoiēsai ontōs an ek nomou ēn ē dikaiosunē
legō de eph oson chronon o klēronomos nēpios estin ouden diapherei doulou kurios pantōn ōn
alla upo epitropous estin kai oikonomous achri tēs prothesmias tou patros
outōs kai ēmeis ote ēmen nēpioi upo ta stoicheia tou kosmou ēmen dedoulōmenoi
ote de ēlthen to plērōma tou chronou exapesteilen o theos ton uion autou genomenon ek gunaikos genomenon upo nomon
ina tous upo nomon exagorasē ina tēn uiothesian apolabōmen
oti de este uioi exapesteilen o theos to pneuma tou uiou autou eis tas kardias umōn krazon abba o patēr
ōste ouketi ei doulos all uios ei de uios kai klēronomos theou dia christou
alla tote men ouk eidotes theon edouleusate tois mē phusei ousin theois
nun de gnontes theon mallon de gnōsthentes upo theou pōs epistrephete palin epi ta asthenē kai ptōcha stoicheia ois palin anōthen douleuein thelete
ēmeras paratēreisthe kai mēnas kai kairous kai eniautous
phoboumai umas mēpōs eikē kekopiaka eis umas
ginesthe ōs egō oti kagō ōs umeis adelphoi deomai umōn ouden me ēdikēsate
oidate de oti di astheneian tēs sarkos euēngelisamēn umin to proteron
kai ton peirasmon mou ton en tē sarki mou ouk exouthenēsate oude exeptusate all ōs angelon theou edexasthe me ōs christon iēsoun
tis oun ēn o makarismos umōn marturō gar umin oti ei dunaton tous ophthalmous umōn exoruxantes an edōkate moi
ōste echthros umōn gegona alētheuōn umin
zēlousin umas ou kalōs alla ekkleisai umas thelousin ina autous zēloute
kalon de to zēlousthai en kalō pantote kai mē monon en tō pareinai me pros umas
teknia mou ous palin ōdinō achris ou morphōthē christos en umin
ēthelon de pareinai pros umas arti kai allaxai tēn phōnēn mou oti aporoumai en umin
legete moi oi upo nomon thelontes einai ton nomon ouk akouete
gegraptai gar oti abraam duo uious eschen ena ek tēs paidiskēs kai ena ek tēs eleutheras
tē eleutheria oun ē christos ēmas ēleutherōsen stēkete kai mē palin zugō douleias enechesthe
ide egō paulos legō umin oti ean peritemnēsthe christos umas ouden ōphelēsei
marturomai de palin panti anthrōpō peritemnomenō oti opheiletēs estin olon ton nomon poiēsai
katērgēthēte apo tou christou oitines en nomō dikaiousthe tēs charitos exepesate
ēmeis gar pneumati ek pisteōs elpida dikaiosunēs apekdechometha
en gar christō iēsou oute peritomē ti ischuei oute akrobustia alla pistis di agapēs energoumenē
etrechete kalōs tis umas anekopsen tē alētheia mē peithesthai
ē peismonē ouk ek tou kalountos umas
mikra zumē olon to phurama zumoi
egō pepoitha eis umas en kuriō oti ouden allo phronēsete o de tarassōn umas bastasei to krima ostis an ē
egō de adelphoi ei peritomēn eti kērussō ti eti diōkomai ara katērgētai to skandalon tou staurou
ophelon kai apokopsontai oi anastatountes umas
adelphoi ean kai prolēphthē anthrōpos en tini paraptōmati umeis oi pneumatikoi katartizete ton toiouton en pneumati praotētos skopōn seauton mē kai su peirasthēs
allēlōn ta barē bastazete kai outōs anaplērōsate ton nomon tou christou
ei gar dokei tis einai ti mēden ōn eauton phrenapata
to de ergon eautou dokimazetō ekastos kai tote eis eauton monon to kauchēma exei kai ouk eis ton eteron
ekastos gar to idion phortion bastasei
koinōneitō de o katēchoumenos ton logon tō katēchounti en pasin agathois
mē planasthe theos ou muktērizetai o gar ean speirē anthrōpos touto kai therisei
oti o speirōn eis tēn sarka eautou ek tēs sarkos therisei phthoran o de speirōn eis to pneuma ek tou pneumatos therisei zōēn aiōnion
to de kalon poiountes mē ekkakōmen kairō gar idiō therisomen mē ekluomenoi
ara oun ōs kairon echomen ergazōmetha to agathon pros pantas malista de pros tous oikeious tēs pisteōs
idete pēlikois umin grammasin egrapsa tē emē cheiri
osoi thelousin euprosōpēsai en sarki outoi anankazousin umas peritemnesthai monon ina mē tō staurō tou christou diōkōntai
oude gar oi peritemnomenoi autoi nomon phulassousin alla thelousin umas peritemnesthai ina en tē umetera sarki kauchēsōntai
emoi de mē genoito kauchasthai ei mē en tō staurō tou kuriou ēmōn iēsou christou di ou emoi kosmos estaurōtai kagō tō kosmō
en gar christō iēsou oute peritomē ti ischuei oute akrobustia alla kainē ktisis
kai osoi tō kanoni toutō stoichēsousin eirēnē ep autous kai eleos kai epi ton israēl tou theou
tou loipou kopous moi mēdeis parechetō egō gar ta stigmata tou kuriou iēsou en tō sōmati mou bastazō
ē charis tou kuriou ēmōn iēsou christou meta tou pneumatos umōn adelphoi amēn [pros galatas egraphē apo rōmēs]

name: ΠΡΟΣ ΕΦΕΣΙΟΥΣ
chapters: paulos apostolos iēsou christou dia thelēmatos theou tois agiois tois ousin en ephesō kai pistois en christō iēsou
charis umin kai eirēnē apo theou patros ēmōn kai kuriou iēsou christou
eulogētos o theos kai patēr tou kuriou ēmōn iēsou christou o eulogēsas ēmas en pasē eulogia pneumatikē en tois epouraniois en christō
kathōs exelexato ēmas en autō pro katabolēs kosmou einai ēmas agious kai amōmous katenōpion autou en agapē
proorisas ēmas eis uiothesian dia iēsou christou eis auton kata tēn eudokian tou thelēmatos autou
eis epainon doxēs tēs charitos autou en ē echaritōsen ēmas en tō ēgapēmenō
en ō echomen tēn apolutrōsin dia tou aimatos autou tēn aphesin tōn paraptōmatōn kata ton plouton tēs charitos autou
ēs eperisseusen eis ēmas en pasē sophia kai phronēsei
gnōrisas ēmin to mustērion tou thelēmatos autou kata tēn eudokian autou ēn proetheto en autō
eis oikonomian tou plērōmatos tōn kairōn anakephalaiōsasthai ta panta en tō christō ta te en tois ouranois kai ta epi tēs gēs
en autō en ō kai eklērōthēmen prooristhentes kata prothesin tou ta panta energountos kata tēn boulēn tou thelēmatos autou
eis to einai ēmas eis epainon tēs doxēs autou tous proēlpikotas en tō christō
en ō kai umeis akousantes ton logon tēs alētheias to euangelion tēs sōtērias umōn en ō kai pisteusantes esphragisthēte tō pneumati tēs epangelias tō agiō
os estin arrabōn tēs klēronomias ēmōn eis apolutrōsin tēs peripoiēseōs eis epainon tēs doxēs autou
dia touto kagō akousas tēn kath umas pistin en tō kuriō iēsou kai tēn agapēn tēn eis pantas tous agious
ou pauomai eucharistōn uper umōn mneian umōn poioumenos epi tōn proseuchōn mou
ina o theos tou kuriou ēmōn iēsou christou o patēr tēs doxēs dōē umin pneuma sophias kai apokalupseōs en epignōsei autou
pephōtismenous tous ophthalmous tēs dianoias umōn eis to eidenai umas tis estin ē elpis tēs klēseōs autou kai tis o ploutos tēs doxēs tēs klēronomias autou en tois agiois
kai ti to uperballon megethos tēs dunameōs autou eis ēmas tous pisteuontas kata tēn energeian tou kratous tēs ischuos autou
ēn enērgēsen en tō christō egeiras auton ek nekrōn kai ekathisen en dexia autou en tois epouraniois
uperanō pasēs archēs kai exousias kai dunameōs kai kuriotētos kai pantos onomatos onomazomenou ou monon en tō aiōni toutō alla kai en tō mellonti
kai panta upetaxen upo tous podas autou kai auton edōken kephalēn uper panta tē ekklēsia
ētis estin to sōma autou to plērōma tou panta en pasin plēroumenou
kai umas ontas nekrous tois paraptōmasin kai tais amartiais
en ais pote periepatēsate kata ton aiōna tou kosmou toutou kata ton archonta tēs exousias tou aeros tou pneumatos tou nun energountos en tois uiois tēs apeitheias
en ois kai ēmeis pantes anestraphēmen pote en tais epithumiais tēs sarkos ēmōn poiountes ta thelēmata tēs sarkos kai tōn dianoiōn kai ēmen tekna phusei orgēs ōs kai oi loipoi
o de theos plousios ōn en eleei dia tēn pollēn agapēn autou ēn ēgapēsen ēmas
kai ontas ēmas nekrous tois paraptōmasin sunezōopoiēsen tō christō chariti este sesōsmenoi
kai sunēgeiren kai sunekathisen en tois epouraniois en christō iēsou
ina endeixētai en tois aiōsin tois eperchomenois ton uperballonta plouton tēs charitos autou en chrēstotēti eph ēmas en christō iēsou
tē gar chariti este sesōsmenoi dia tēs pisteōs kai touto ouk ex umōn theou to dōron
ouk ex ergōn ina mē tis kauchēsētai
autou gar esmen poiēma ktisthentes en christō iēsou epi ergois agathois ois proētoimasen o theos ina en autois peripatēsōmen
dio mnēmoneuete oti umeis pote ta ethnē en sarki oi legomenoi akrobustia upo tēs legomenēs peritomēs en sarki cheiropoiētou
oti ēte en tō kairō ekeinō chōris christou apēllotriōmenoi tēs politeias tou israēl kai xenoi tōn diathēkōn tēs epangelias elpida mē echontes kai atheoi en tō kosmō
nuni de en christō iēsou umeis oi pote ontes makran engus egenēthēte en tō aimati tou christou
autos gar estin ē eirēnē ēmōn o poiēsas ta amphotera en kai to mesotoichon tou phragmou lusas
tēn echthran en tē sarki autou ton nomon tōn entolōn en dogmasin katargēsas ina tous duo ktisē en eautō eis ena kainon anthrōpon poiōn eirēnēn
kai apokatallaxē tous amphoterous en eni sōmati tō theō dia tou staurou apokteinas tēn echthran en autō
kai elthōn euēngelisato eirēnēn umin tois makran kai tois engus
oti di autou echomen tēn prosagōgēn oi amphoteroi en eni pneumati pros ton patera
ara oun ouketi este xenoi kai paroikoi alla sumpolitai tōn agiōn kai oikeioi tou theou
epoikodomēthentes epi tō themeliō tōn apostolōn kai prophētōn ontos akrogōniaiou autou iēsou christou
en ō pasa ē oikodomē sunarmologoumenē auxei eis naon agion en kuriō
en ō kai umeis sunoikodomeisthe eis katoikētērion tou theou en pneumati
toutou charin egō paulos o desmios tou christou iēsou uper umōn tōn ethnōn
eige ēkousate tēn oikonomian tēs charitos tou theou tēs dotheisēs moi eis umas
oti kata apokalupsin egnōrisen moi to mustērion kathōs proegrapsa en oligō
pros o dunasthe anaginōskontes noēsai tēn sunesin mou en tō mustēriō tou christou
o en eterais geneais ouk egnōristhē tois uiois tōn anthrōpōn ōs nun apekaluphthē tois agiois apostolois autou kai prophētais en pneumati
einai ta ethnē sunklēronoma kai sussōma kai summetocha tēs epangelias autou en tō christō dia tou euangeliou
ou egenomēn diakonos kata tēn dōrean tēs charitos tou theou tēn dotheisan moi kata tēn energeian tēs dunameōs autou
emoi tō elachistoterō pantōn tōn agiōn edothē ē charis autē en tois ethnesin euangelisasthai ton anexichniaston plouton tou christou
kai phōtisai pantas tis ē koinōnia tou mustēriou tou apokekrummenou apo tōn aiōnōn en tō theō tō ta panta ktisanti dia iēsou christou
ina gnōristhē nun tais archais kai tais exousiais en tois epouraniois dia tēs ekklēsias ē polupoikilos sophia tou theou
kata prothesin tōn aiōnōn ēn epoiēsen en christō iēsou tō kuriō ēmōn
en ō echomen tēn parrēsian kai tēn prosagōgēn en pepoithēsei dia tēs pisteōs autou
dio aitoumai mē ekkakein en tais thlipsesin mou uper umōn ētis estin doxa umōn
toutou charin kamptō ta gonata mou pros ton patera tou kuriou ēmōn iēsou christou
ex ou pasa patria en ouranois kai epi gēs onomazetai
ina dōē umin kata ton plouton tēs doxēs autou dunamei krataiōthēnai dia tou pneumatos autou eis ton esō anthrōpon
katoikēsai ton christon dia tēs pisteōs en tais kardiais umōn
en agapē errizōmenoi kai tethemeliōmenoi ina exischusēte katalabesthai sun pasin tois agiois ti to platos kai mēkos kai bathos kai upsos
gnōnai te tēn uperballousan tēs gnōseōs agapēn tou christou ina plērōthēte eis pan to plērōma tou theou
tō de dunamenō uper panta poiēsai uper ekperissou ōn aitoumetha ē nooumen kata tēn dunamin tēn energoumenēn en ēmin
autō ē doxa en tē ekklēsia en christō iēsou eis pasas tas geneas tou aiōnos tōn aiōnōn amēn
parakalō oun umas egō o desmios en kuriō axiōs peripatēsai tēs klēseōs ēs eklēthēte
meta pasēs tapeinophrosunēs kai praotētos meta makrothumias anechomenoi allēlōn en agapē
spoudazontes tērein tēn enotēta tou pneumatos en tō sundesmō tēs eirēnēs
en sōma kai en pneuma kathōs kai eklēthēte en mia elpidi tēs klēseōs umōn
eis kurios mia pistis en baptisma
eis theos kai patēr pantōn o epi pantōn kai dia pantōn kai en pasin umin
eni de ekastō ēmōn edothē ē charis kata to metron tēs dōreas tou christou
dio legei anabas eis upsos ēchmalōteusen aichmalōsian kai edōken domata tois anthrōpois
to de anebē ti estin ei mē oti kai katebē prōton eis ta katōtera merē tēs gēs
o katabas autos estin kai o anabas uperanō pantōn tōn ouranōn ina plērōsē ta panta
kai autos edōken tous men apostolous tous de prophētas tous de euangelistas tous de poimenas kai didaskalous
pros ton katartismon tōn agiōn eis ergon diakonias eis oikodomēn tou sōmatos tou christou
ginesthe oun mimētai tou theou ōs tekna agapēta
kai peripateite en agapē kathōs kai o christos ēgapēsen ēmas kai paredōken eauton uper ēmōn prosphoran kai thusian tō theō eis osmēn euōdias
porneia de kai pasa akatharsia ē pleonexia mēde onomazesthō en umin kathōs prepei agiois
kai aischrotēs kai mōrologia ē eutrapelia ta ouk anēkonta alla mallon eucharistia
touto gar este ginōskontes oti pas pornos ē akathartos ē pleonektēs os estin eidōlolatrēs ouk echei klēronomian en tē basileia tou christou kai theou
mēdeis umas apatatō kenois logois dia tauta gar erchetai ē orgē tou theou epi tous uious tēs apeitheias
ēte gar pote skotos nun de phōs en kuriō ōs tekna phōtos peripateite
o gar karpos tou pneumatos en pasē agathōsunē kai dikaiosunē kai alētheia
dokimazontes ti estin euareston tō kuriō
kai mē sunkoinōneite tois ergois tois akarpois tou skotous mallon de kai elenchete
ta gar kruphē ginomena up autōn aischron estin kai legein
ta de panta elenchomena upo tou phōtos phaneroutai pan gar to phaneroumenon phōs estin
dio legei egeirai o katheudōn kai anasta ek tōn nekrōn kai epiphausei soi o christos
blepete oun pōs akribōs peripateite mē ōs asophoi all ōs sophoi
exagorazomenoi ton kairon oti ai ēmerai ponērai eisin
dia touto mē ginesthe aphrones alla sunientes ti to thelēma tou kuriou
kai mē methuskesthe oinō en ō estin asōtia alla plērousthe en pneumati
lalountes eautois psalmois kai umnois kai ōdais pneumatikais adontes kai psallontes en tē kardia umōn tō kuriō
eucharistountes pantote uper pantōn en onomati tou kuriou ēmōn iēsou christou tō theō kai patri
ai gunaikes tois idiois andrasin upotassesthe ōs tō kuriō
oti o anēr estin kephalē tēs gunaikos ōs kai o christos kephalē tēs ekklēsias kai autos estin sōtēr tou sōmatos
all ōsper ē ekklēsia upotassetai tō christō outōs kai ai gunaikes tois idiois andrasin en panti
oi andres agapate tas gunaikas eautōn kathōs kai o christos ēgapēsen tēn ekklēsian kai eauton paredōken uper autēs
ta tekna upakouete tois goneusin umōn en kuriō touto gar estin dikaion
tima ton patera sou kai tēn mētera ētis estin entolē prōtē en epangelia
ina eu soi genētai kai esē makrochronios epi tēs gēs
kai oi pateres mē parorgizete ta tekna umōn all ektrephete auta en paideia kai nouthesia kuriou
oi douloi upakouete tois kuriois kata sarka meta phobou kai tromou en aplotēti tēs kardias umōn ōs tō christō
mē kat ophthalmodouleian ōs anthrōpareskoi all ōs douloi tou christou poiountes to thelēma tou theou ek psuchēs
met eunoias douleuontes ōs tō kuriō kai ouk anthrōpois
eidotes oti o ean ti ekastos poiēsē agathon touto komieitai para tou kuriou eite doulos eite eleutheros
kai oi kurioi ta auta poieite pros autous anientes tēn apeilēn eidotes oti kai umōn autōn o kurios estin en ouranois kai prosōpolēpsia ouk estin par autō
to loipon adelphoi mou endunamousthe en kuriō kai en tō kratei tēs ischuos autou
endusasthe tēn panoplian tou theou pros to dunasthai umas stēnai pros tas methodeias tou diabolou
oti ouk estin ēmin ē palē pros aima kai sarka alla pros tas archas pros tas exousias pros tous kosmokratoras tou skotous tou aiōnos toutou pros ta pneumatika tēs ponērias en tois epouraniois
dia touto analabete tēn panoplian tou theou ina dunēthēte antistēnai en tē ēmera tē ponēra kai apanta katergasamenoi stēnai
stēte oun perizōsamenoi tēn osphun umōn en alētheia kai endusamenoi ton thōraka tēs dikaiosunēs
kai upodēsamenoi tous podas en etoimasia tou euangeliou tēs eirēnēs
epi pasin analabontes ton thureon tēs pisteōs en ō dunēsesthe panta ta belē tou ponērou ta pepurōmena sbesai
kai tēn perikephalaian tou sōtēriou dexasthe kai tēn machairan tou pneumatos o estin rēma theou
dia pasēs proseuchēs kai deēseōs proseuchomenoi en panti kairō en pneumati kai eis auto touto agrupnountes en pasē proskarterēsei kai deēsei peri pantōn tōn agiōn
kai uper emou ina moi dotheiē logos en anoixei tou stomatos mou en parrēsia gnōrisai to mustērion tou euangeliou
uper ou presbeuō en alusei ina en autō parrēsiasōmai ōs dei me lalēsai
ina de eidēte kai umeis ta kat eme ti prassō panta umin gnōrisei tuchikos o agapētos adelphos kai pistos diakonos en kuriō
on epempsa pros umas eis auto touto ina gnōte ta peri ēmōn kai parakalesē tas kardias umōn
eirēnē tois adelphois kai agapē meta pisteōs apo theou patros kai kuriou iēsou christou

name: ΠΡΟΣ ΦΙΛΙΠΠΗΣΙΟΥΣ
chapters: paulos kai timotheos douloi iēsou christou pasin tois agiois en christō iēsou tois ousin en philippois sun episkopois kai diakonois
charis umin kai eirēnē apo theou patros ēmōn kai kuriou iēsou christou
eucharistō tō theō mou epi pasē tē mneia umōn
pantote en pasē deēsei mou uper pantōn umōn meta charas tēn deēsin poioumenos
epi tē koinōnia umōn eis to euangelion apo prōtēs ēmeras achri tou nun
pepoithōs auto touto oti o enarxamenos en umin ergon agathon epitelesei achris ēmeras iēsou christou

kathōs estin dikaion emoi touto phronein uper pantōn umōn dia to echein me en tē kardia umas en te tois desmois mou kai tē apologia kai bebaiōsei tou euangeliou sunkoinōnous mou tēs charitos pantas umas ontas
martus gar mou estin o theos ōs epipothō pantas umas en splanchnois iēsou christou
kai touto proseuchomai ina ē agapē umōn eti mallon kai mallon perisseuē en epignōsei kai pasē aisthēsei
eis to dokimazein umas ta diapheronta ina ēte eilikrineis kai aproskopoi eis ēmeran christou
peplērōmenoi karpōn dikaiosunēs tōn dia iēsou christou eis doxan kai epainon theou
ginōskein de umas boulomai adelphoi oti ta kat eme mallon eis prokopēn tou euangeliou elēluthen
ōste tous desmous mou phanerous en christō genesthai en olō tō praitōriō kai tois loipois pasin
kai tous pleionas tōn adelphōn en kuriō pepoithotas tois desmois mou perissoterōs tolman aphobōs ton logon lalein
tines men kai dia phthonon kai erin tines de kai di eudokian ton christon kērussousin
oi men ex eritheias ton christon katangellousin ouch agnōs oiomenoi thlipsin epipherein tois desmois mou
oi de ex agapēs eidotes oti eis apologian tou euangeliou keimai
ti gar plēn panti tropō eite prophasei eite alētheia christos katangelletai kai en toutō chairō alla kai charēsomai
oida gar oti touto moi apobēsetai eis sōtērian dia tēs umōn deēseōs kai epichorēgias tou pneumatos iēsou christou
kata tēn apokaradokian kai elpida mou oti en oudeni aischunthēsomai all en pasē parrēsia ōs pantote kai nun megalunthēsetai christos en tō sōmati mou eite dia zōēs eite dia thanatou
emoi gar to zēn christos kai to apothanein kerdos
ei de to zēn en sarki touto moi karpos ergou kai ti airēsomai ou gnōrizō
sunechomai gar ek tōn duo tēn epithumian echōn eis to analusai kai sun christō einai pollō mallon kreisson
to de epimenein en tē sarki anankaioteron di umas
kai touto pepoithōs oida oti menō kai sumparamenō pasin umin eis tēn umōn prokopēn kai charan tēs pisteōs
ina to kauchēma umōn perisseuē en christō iēsou en emoi dia tēs emēs parousias palin pros umas
monon axiōs tou euangeliou tou christou politeuesthe ina eite elthōn kai idōn umas eite apōn akousō ta peri umōn oti stēkete en eni pneumati mia psuchē sunathlountes tē pistei tou euangeliou
kai mē pturomenoi en mēdeni upo tōn antikeimenōn ētis autois men estin endeixis apōleias umin de sōtērias kai touto apo theou
oti umin echaristhē to uper christou ou monon to eis auton pisteuein alla kai to uper autou paschein
ton auton agōna echontes oion eidete en emoi kai nun akouete en emoi
ei tis oun paraklēsis en christō ei ti paramuthion agapēs ei tis koinōnia pneumatos ei tina splanchna kai oiktirmoi
plērōsate mou tēn charan ina to auto phronēte tēn autēn agapēn echontes sumpsuchoi to en phronountes
mēden kata eritheian ē kenodoxian alla tē tapeinophrosunē allēlous ēgoumenoi uperechontas eautōn
mē ta eautōn ekastos skopeite alla kai ta eterōn ekastos
touto gar phroneisthō en umin o kai en christō iēsou
os en morphē theou uparchōn ouch arpagmon ēgēsato to einai isa theō
all eauton ekenōsen morphēn doulou labōn en omoiōmati anthrōpōn genomenos
kai schēmati euretheis ōs anthrōpos etapeinōsen eauton genomenos upēkoos mechri thanatou thanatou de staurou
dio kai o theos auton uperupsōsen kai echarisato autō onoma to uper pan onoma
ina en tō onomati iēsou pan gonu kampsē epouraniōn kai epigeiōn kai katachthoniōn
kai pasa glōssa exomologēsētai oti kurios iēsous christos eis doxan theou patros
ōste agapētoi mou kathōs pantote upēkousate mē ōs en tē parousia mou monon alla nun pollō mallon en tē apousia mou meta phobou kai tromou tēn eautōn sōtērian katergazesthe
o theos gar estin o energōn en umin kai to thelein kai to energein uper tēs eudokias
panta poieite chōris gongusmōn kai dialogismōn
ina genēsthe amemptoi kai akeraioi tekna theou amōmēta en mesō geneas skolias kai diestrammenēs en ois phainesthe ōs phōstēres en kosmō
logon zōēs epechontes eis kauchēma emoi eis ēmeran christou oti ouk eis kenon edramon oude eis kenon ekopiasa
all ei kai spendomai epi tē thusia kai leitourgia tēs pisteōs umōn chairō kai sunchairō pasin umin
to d auto kai umeis chairete kai sunchairete moi
elpizō de en kuriō iēsou timotheon tacheōs pempsai umin ina kagō eupsuchō gnous ta peri umōn
oudena gar echō isopsuchon ostis gnēsiōs ta peri umōn merimnēsei
oi pantes gar ta eautōn zētousin ou ta tou christou iēsou
tēn de dokimēn autou ginōskete oti ōs patri teknon sun emoi edouleusen eis to euangelion
touton men oun elpizō pempsai ōs an apidō ta peri eme exautēs
pepoitha de en kuriō oti kai autos tacheōs eleusomai
anankaion de ēgēsamēn epaphroditon ton adelphon kai sunergon kai sustratiōtēn mou umōn de apostolon kai leitourgon tēs chreias mou pempsai pros umas
epeidē epipothōn ēn pantas umas kai adēmonōn dioti ēkousate oti ēsthenēsen
kai gar ēsthenēsen paraplēsion thanatō all o theos auton ēleēsen ouk auton de monon alla kai eme ina mē lupēn epi lupē schō
spoudaioterōs oun epempsa auton ina idontes auton palin charēte kagō alupoteros ō
prosdechesthe oun auton en kuriō meta pasēs charas kai tous toioutous entimous echete
oti dia to ergon tou christou mechri thanatou ēngisen parabouleusamenos tē psuchē ina anaplērōsē to umōn usterēma tēs pros me leitourgias
to loipon adelphoi mou chairete en kuriō ta auta graphein umin emoi men ouk oknēron umin de asphales
blepete tous kunas blepete tous kakous ergatas blepete tēn katatomēn
ēmeis gar esmen ē peritomē oi pneumati theō latreuontes kai kauchōmenoi en christō iēsou kai ouk en sarki pepoithotes
kaiper egō echōn pepoithēsin kai en sarki ei tis dokei allos pepoithenai en sarki egō mallon
peritomē oktaēmeros ek genous israēl phulēs beniamin ebraios ex ebraiōn kata nomon pharisaios
kata zēlon diōkōn tēn ekklēsian kata dikaiosunēn tēn en nomō genomenos amemptos
all atina ēn moi kerdē tauta ēgēmai dia ton christon zēmian
alla menounge kai ēgoumai panta zēmian einai dia to uperechon tēs gnōseōs christou iēsou tou kuriou mou di on ta panta ezēmiōthēn kai ēgoumai skubala einai ina christon kerdēsō
kai eurethō en autō mē echōn emēn dikaiosunēn tēn ek nomou alla tēn dia pisteōs christou tēn ek theou dikaiosunēn epi tē pistei
tou gnōnai auton kai tēn dunamin tēs anastaseōs autou kai tēn koinōnian tōn pathēmatōn autou summorphoumenos tō thanatō autou
ei pōs katantēsō eis tēn exanastasin tōn nekrōn
ouch oti ēdē elabon ē ēdē teteleiōmai diōkō de ei kai katalabō eph ō kai katelēphthēn upo tou christou iēsou
adelphoi egō emauton ou logizomai kateilēphenai en de ta men opisō epilanthanomenos tois de emprosthen epekteinomenos
kata skopon diōkō epi to brabeion tēs anō klēseōs tou theou en christō iēsou
osoi oun teleioi touto phronōmen kai ei ti eterōs phroneite kai touto o theos umin apokalupsei
plēn eis o ephthasamen tō autō stoichein kanoni to auto phronein
summimētai mou ginesthe adelphoi kai skopeite tous outōs peripatountas kathōs echete tupon ēmas
polloi gar peripatousin ous pollakis elegon umin nun de kai klaiōn legō tous echthrous tou staurou tou christou
ōn to telos apōleia ōn o theos ē koilia kai ē doxa en tē aischunē autōn oi ta epigeia phronountes
ēmōn gar to politeuma en ouranois uparchei ex ou kai sōtēra apekdechometha kurion iēsoun christon
os metaschēmatisei to sōma tēs tapeinōseōs ēmōn eis to genesthai auto summorphon tō sōmati tēs doxēs autou kata tēn energeian tou dunasthai auton kai upotaxai eautō ta panta
ōste adelphoi mou agapētoi kai epipothētoi chara kai stephanos mou outōs stēkete en kuriō agapētoi
euodian parakalō kai suntuchēn parakalō to auto phronein en kuriō
kai erōtō kai se suzuge gnēsie sullambanou autais aitines en tō euangeliō sunēthlēsan moi meta kai klēmentos kai tōn loipōn sunergōn mou ōn ta onomata en biblō zōēs
chairete en kuriō pantote palin erō chairete
to epieikes umōn gnōsthētō pasin anthrōpois o kurios engus
mēden merimnate all en panti tē proseuchē kai tē deēsei meta eucharistias ta aitēmata umōn gnōrizesthō pros ton theon
kai ē eirēnē tou theou ē uperechousa panta noun phrourēsei tas kardias umōn kai ta noēmata umōn en christō iēsou
to loipon adelphoi osa estin alēthē osa semna osa dikaia osa agna osa prosphilē osa euphēma ei tis aretē kai ei tis epainos tauta logizesthe
a kai emathete kai parelabete kai ēkousate kai eidete en emoi tauta prassete kai o theos tēs eirēnēs estai meth umōn
echarēn de en kuriō megalōs oti ēdē pote anethalete to uper emou phronein eph ō kai ephroneite ēkaireisthe de
ouch oti kath usterēsin legō egō gar emathon en ois eimi autarkēs einai
oida kai tapeinousthai oida kai perisseuein en panti kai en pasin memuēmai kai chortazesthai kai peinan kai perisseuein kai ustereisthai
panta ischuō en tō endunamounti me christō
plēn kalōs epoiēsate sunkoinōnēsantes mou tē thlipsei
oidate de kai umeis philippēsioi oti en archē tou euangeliou ote exēlthon apo makedonias oudemia moi ekklēsia ekoinōnēsen eis logon doseōs kai lēpseōs ei mē umeis monoi
oti kai en thessalonikē kai apax kai dis eis tēn chreian moi epempsate
ouch oti epizētō to doma all epizētō ton karpon ton pleonazonta eis logon umōn
apechō de panta kai perisseuō peplērōmai dexamenos para epaphroditou ta par umōn osmēn euōdias thusian dektēn euareston tō theō
o de theos mou plērōsei pasan chreian umōn kata ton plouton autou en doxē en christō iēsou
tō de theō kai patri ēmōn ē doxa eis tous aiōnas tōn aiōnōn amēn
aspasasthe panta agion en christō iēsou aspazontai umas oi sun emoi adelphoi
aspazontai umas pantes oi agioi malista de oi ek tēs kaisaros oikias
ē charis tou kuriou ēmōn iēsou christou meta pantōn umōn amēn [pros philippēsious egraphē apo rōmēs di epaphroditou]

name: ΠΡΟΣ ΚΟΛΟΣΣΑΕΙΣ
chapters: paulos apostolos iēsou christou dia thelēmatos theou kai timotheos o adelphos
tois en kolossais agiois kai pistois adelphois en christō charis umin kai eirēnē apo theou patros ēmōn kai kuriou iēsou christou
eucharistoumen tō theō kai patri tou kuriou ēmōn iēsou christou pantote peri umōn proseuchomenoi
akousantes tēn pistin umōn en christō iēsou kai tēn agapēn tēn eis pantas tous agious
dia tēn elpida tēn apokeimenēn umin en tois ouranois ēn proēkousate en tō logō tēs alētheias tou euangeliou
tou parontos eis umas kathōs kai en panti tō kosmō kai estin karpophoroumenon kathōs kai en umin aph ēs ēmeras ēkousate kai epegnōte tēn charin tou theou en alētheia
kathōs kai emathete apo epaphra tou agapētou sundoulou ēmōn os estin pistos uper umōn diakonos tou christou
o kai dēlōsas ēmin tēn umōn agapēn en pneumati
dia touto kai ēmeis aph ēs ēmeras ēkousamen ou pauometha uper umōn proseuchomenoi kai aitoumenoi ina plērōthēte tēn epignōsin tou thelēmatos autou en pasē sophia kai sunesei pneumatikē
peripatēsai umas axiōs tou kuriou eis pasan areskeian en panti ergō agathō karpophorountes kai auxanomenoi eis tēn epignōsin tou theou
en pasē dunamei dunamoumenoi kata to kratos tēs doxēs autou eis pasan upomonēn kai makrothumian meta charas
eucharistountes tō patri tō ikanōsanti ēmas eis tēn merida tou klērou tōn agiōn en tō phōti
os errusato ēmas ek tēs exousias tou skotous kai metestēsen eis tēn basileian tou uiou tēs agapēs autou
en ō echomen tēn apolutrōsin dia tou aimatos autou tēn aphesin tōn amartiōn
os estin eikōn tou theou tou aoratou prōtotokos pasēs ktiseōs
oti en autō ektisthē ta panta ta en tois ouranois kai ta epi tēs gēs ta orata kai ta aorata eite thronoi eite kuriotētes eite archai eite exousiai ta panta di autou kai eis auton ektistai
kai autos estin pro pantōn kai ta panta en autō sunestēken
kai autos estin ē kephalē tou sōmatos tēs ekklēsias os estin archē prōtotokos ek tōn nekrōn ina genētai en pasin autos prōteuōn
thelō gar umas eidenai ēlikon agōna echō peri umōn kai tōn en laodikeia kai osoi ouch eōrakasin to prosōpon mou en sarki
ina paraklēthōsin ai kardiai autōn sumbibasthentōn en agapē kai eis panta plouton tēs plērophorias tēs suneseōs eis epignōsin tou mustēriou tou theou kai patros kai tou christou
en ō eisin pantes oi thēsauroi tēs sophias kai tēs gnōseōs apokruphoi
touto de legō ina mē tis umas paralogizētai en pithanologia
ei gar kai tē sarki apeimi alla tō pneumati sun umin eimi chairōn kai blepōn umōn tēn taxin kai to stereōma tēs eis christon pisteōs umōn
ōs oun parelabete ton christon iēsoun ton kurion en autō peripateite
errizōmenoi kai epoikodomoumenoi en autō kai bebaioumenoi en tē pistei kathōs edidachthēte perisseuontes en autē en eucharistia
blepete mē tis umas estai o sulagōgōn dia tēs philosophias kai kenēs apatēs kata tēn paradosin tōn anthrōpōn kata ta stoicheia tou kosmou kai ou kata christon
oti en autō katoikei pan to plērōma tēs theotētos sōmatikōs
kai este en autō peplērōmenoi os estin ē kephalē pasēs archēs kai exousias
en ō kai perietmēthēte peritomē acheiropoiētō en tē apekdusei tou sōmatos tōn amartiōn tēs sarkos en tē peritomē tou christou
suntaphentes autō en tō baptismati en ō kai sunēgerthēte dia tēs pisteōs tēs energeias tou theou tou egeirantos auton ek tōn nekrōn
kai umas nekrous ontas en tois paraptōmasin kai tē akrobustia tēs sarkos umōn sunezōopoiēsen sun autō charisamenos umin panta ta paraptōmata
exaleipsas to kath ēmōn cheirographon tois dogmasin o ēn upenantion ēmin kai auto ērken ek tou mesou prosēlōsas auto tō staurō
apekdusamenos tas archas kai tas exousias edeigmatisen en parrēsia thriambeusas autous en autō
mē oun tis umas krinetō en brōsei ē en posei ē en merei eortēs ē noumēnias ē sabbatōn
a estin skia tōn mellontōn to de sōma tou christou
mēdeis umas katabrabeuetō thelōn en tapeinophrosunē kai thrēskeia tōn angelōn a mē eōraken embateuōn eikē phusioumenos upo tou noos tēs sarkos autou
kai ou kratōn tēn kephalēn ex ou pan to sōma dia tōn aphōn kai sundesmōn epichorēgoumenon kai sumbibazomenon auxei tēn auxēsin tou theou
ei oun apethanete sun tō christō apo tōn stoicheiōn tou kosmou ti ōs zōntes en kosmō dogmatizesthe
mē apsē mēde geusē mēde thigēs
a estin panta eis phthoran tē apochrēsei kata ta entalmata kai didaskalias tōn anthrōpōn
atina estin logon men echonta sophias en ethelothrēskeia kai tapeinophrosunē kai apheidia sōmatos ouk en timē tini pros plēsmonēn tēs sarkos
ei oun sunēgerthēte tō christō ta anō zēteite ou o christos estin en dexia tou theou kathēmenos
ta anō phroneite mē ta epi tēs gēs
apethanete gar kai ē zōē umōn kekruptai sun tō christō en tō theō
otan o christos phanerōthē ē zōē ēmōn tote kai umeis sun autō phanerōthēsesthe en doxē
nekrōsate oun ta melē umōn ta epi tēs gēs porneian akatharsian pathos epithumian kakēn kai tēn pleonexian ētis estin eidōlolatreia
di a erchetai ē orgē tou theou epi tous uious tēs apeitheias
en ois kai umeis periepatēsate pote ote ezēte en autois
nuni de apothesthe kai umeis ta panta orgēn thumon kakian blasphēmian aischrologian ek tou stomatos umōn
mē pseudesthe eis allēlous apekdusamenoi ton palaion anthrōpon sun tais praxesin autou
kai endusamenoi ton neon ton anakainoumenon eis epignōsin kat eikona tou ktisantos auton
opou ouk eni ellēn kai ioudaios peritomē kai akrobustia barbaros skuthēs doulos eleutheros alla ta panta kai en pasin christos
endusasthe oun ōs eklektoi tou theou agioi kai ēgapēmenoi splanchna oiktirmōn chrēstotēta tapeinophrosunēn praotēta makrothumian
anechomenoi allēlōn kai charizomenoi eautois ean tis pros tina echē momphēn kathōs kai o christos echarisato umin outōs kai umeis
epi pasin de toutois tēn agapēn ētis estin sundesmos tēs teleiotētos
kai ē eirēnē tou theou brabeuetō en tais kardiais umōn eis ēn kai eklēthēte en eni sōmati kai eucharistoi ginesthe
o logos tou christou enoikeitō en umin plousiōs en pasē sophia didaskontes kai nouthetountes eautous psalmois kai umnois kai ōdais pneumatikais en chariti adontes en tē kardia umōn tō kuriō
kai pan o ti an poiēte en logō ē en ergō panta en onomati kuriou iēsou eucharistountes tō theō kai patri di autou
ai gunaikes upotassesthe tois idiois andrasin ōs anēken en kuriō
oi andres agapate tas gunaikas kai mē pikrainesthe pros autas
ta tekna upakouete tois goneusin kata panta touto gar estin euareston tō kuriō
oi pateres mē erethizete ta tekna umōn ina mē athumōsin
oi douloi upakouete kata panta tois kata sarka kuriois mē en ophthalmodouleiais ōs anthrōpareskoi all en aplotēti kardias phoboumenoi ton theon
kai pan o ti ean poiēte ek psuchēs ergazesthe ōs tō kuriō kai ouk anthrōpois
eidotes oti apo kuriou apolēpsesthe tēn antapodosin tēs klēronomias tō gar kuriō christō douleuete
o de adikōn komieitai o ēdikēsen kai ouk estin prosōpolēpsia
oi kurioi to dikaion kai tēn isotēta tois doulois parechesthe eidotes oti kai umeis echete kurion en ouranois
tē proseuchē proskartereite grēgorountes en autē en eucharistia
proseuchomenoi ama kai peri ēmōn ina o theos anoixē ēmin thuran tou logou lalēsai to mustērion tou christou di o kai dedemai
ina phanerōsō auto ōs dei me lalēsai
en sophia peripateite pros tous exō ton kairon exagorazomenoi
o logos umōn pantote en chariti alati ērtumenos eidenai pōs dei umas eni ekastō apokrinesthai
ta kat eme panta gnōrisei umin tuchikos o agapētos adelphos kai pistos diakonos kai sundoulos en kuriō
on epempsa pros umas eis auto touto ina gnō ta peri umōn kai parakalesē tas kardias umōn
sun onēsimō tō pistō kai agapētō adelphō os estin ex umōn panta umin gnōriousin ta ōde
aspazetai umas aristarchos o sunaichmalōtos mou kai markos o anepsios barnaba peri ou elabete entolas ean elthē pros umas dexasthe auton
kai iēsous o legomenos ioustos oi ontes ek peritomēs outoi monoi sunergoi eis tēn basileian tou theou oitines egenēthēsan moi parēgoria
aspazetai umas epaphras o ex umōn doulos christou pantote agōnizomenos uper umōn en tais proseuchais ina stēte teleioi kai peplērōmenoi en panti thelēmati tou theou
marturō gar autō oti echei zēlon polun uper umōn kai tōn en laodikeia kai tōn en ierapolei
aspazetai umas loukas o iatros o agapētos kai dēmas
aspasasthe tous en laodikeia adelphous kai numphan kai tēn kat oikon autou ekklēsian
kai otan anagnōsthē par umin ē epistolē poiēsate ina kai en tē laodikeōn ekklēsia anagnōsthē kai tēn ek laodikeias ina kai umeis anagnōte
kai eipate archippō blepe tēn diakonian ēn parelabes en kuriō ina autēn plērois
o aspasmos tē emē cheiri paulou mnēmoneuete mou tōn desmōn ē charis meth umōn amēn [pros kolassaeis egraphē apo rōmēs dia tuchikou kai onēsimou]

name: ΠΡΟΣ ΘΕΣΣΑΛΟΝΙΚΕΙΣ Α΄
chapters: paulos kai silouanos kai timotheos tē ekklēsia thessalonikeōn en theō patri kai kuriō iēsou christō charis umin kai eirēnē apo theou patros ēmōn kai kuriou iēsou christou
eucharistoumen tō theō pantote peri pantōn umōn mneian umōn poioumenoi epi tōn proseuchōn ēmōn
adialeiptōs mnēmoneuontes umōn tou ergou tēs pisteōs kai tou kopou tēs agapēs kai tēs upomonēs tēs elpidos tou kuriou ēmōn iēsou christou emprosthen tou theou kai patros ēmōn
eidotes adelphoi ēgapēmenoi upo theou tēn eklogēn umōn
oti to euangelion ēmōn ouk egenēthē eis umas en logō monon alla kai en dunamei kai en pneumati agiō kai en plērophoria pollē kathōs oidate oioi egenēthēmen en umin di umas
kai umeis mimētai ēmōn egenēthēte kai tou kuriou dexamenoi ton logon en thlipsei pollē meta charas pneumatos agiou
ōste genesthai umas tupous pasin tois pisteuousin en tē makedonia kai tē achaia
aph umōn gar exēchētai o logos tou kuriou ou monon en tē makedonia kai achaia alla kai en panti topō ē pistis umōn ē pros ton theon exelēluthen ōste mē chreian ēmas echein lalein ti
autoi gar peri ēmōn apangellousin opoian eisodon eschomen pros umas kai pōs epestrepsate pros ton theon apo tōn eidōlōn douleuein theō zōnti kai alēthinō
kai anamenein ton uion autou ek tōn ouranōn on ēgeiren ek nekrōn iēsoun ton ruomenon ēmas apo tēs orgēs tēs erchomenēs
autoi gar oidate adelphoi tēn eisodon ēmōn tēn pros umas oti ou kenē gegonen
alla kai propathontes kai ubristhentes kathōs oidate en philippois eparrēsiasametha en tō theō ēmōn lalēsai pros umas to euangelion tou theou en pollō agōni
ē gar paraklēsis ēmōn ouk ek planēs oude ex akatharsias oute en dolō
alla kathōs dedokimasmetha upo tou theou pisteuthēnai to euangelion outōs laloumen ouch ōs anthrōpois areskontes alla tō theō tō dokimazonti tas kardias ēmōn
oute gar pote en logō kolakeias egenēthēmen kathōs oidate oute en prophasei pleonexias theos martus
oute zētountes ex anthrōpōn doxan oute aph umōn oute ap allōn dunamenoi en barei einai ōs christou apostoloi
all egenēthēmen ēpioi en mesō umōn ōs an trophos thalpē ta eautēs tekna
outōs imeiromenoi umōn eudokoumen metadounai umin ou monon to euangelion tou theou alla kai tas eautōn psuchas dioti agapētoi ēmin gegenēsthe
mnēmoneuete gar adelphoi ton kopon ēmōn kai ton mochthon nuktos gar kai ēmeras ergazomenoi pros to mē epibarēsai tina umōn ekēruxamen eis umas to euangelion tou theou
umeis martures kai o theos ōs osiōs kai dikaiōs kai amemptōs umin tois pisteuousin egenēthēmen
kathaper oidate ōs ena ekaston umōn ōs patēr tekna eautou parakalountes umas kai paramuthoumenoi
kai marturoumenoi eis to peripatēsai umas axiōs tou theou tou kalountos umas eis tēn eautou basileian kai doxan

dia touto kai ēmeis eucharistoumen tō theō adialeiptōs oti paralabontes logon akoēs par ēmōn tou theou edexasthe ou logon anthrōpōn alla kathōs estin alēthōs logon theou os kai energeitai en umin tois pisteuousin
umeis gar mimētai egenēthēte adelphoi tōn ekklēsiōn tou theou tōn ousōn en tē ioudaia en christō iēsou oti tauta epathete kai umeis upo tōn idiōn sumphuletōn kathōs kai autoi upo tōn ioudaiōn
tōn kai ton kurion apokteinantōn iēsoun kai tous idious prophētas kai ēmas ekdiōxantōn kai theō mē areskontōn kai pasin anthrōpois enantiōn
kōluontōn ēmas tois ethnesin lalēsai ina sōthōsin eis to anaplērōsai autōn tas amartias pantote ephthasen de ep autous ē orgē eis telos
ēmeis de adelphoi aporphanisthentes aph umōn pros kairon ōras prosōpō ou kardia perissoterōs espoudasamen to prosōpon umōn idein en pollē epithumia
dio ēthelēsamen elthein pros umas egō men paulos kai apax kai dis kai enekopsen ēmas o satanas
tis gar ēmōn elpis ē chara ē stephanos kauchēseōs ē ouchi kai umeis emprosthen tou kuriou ēmōn iēsou christou en tē autou parousia
umeis gar este ē doxa ēmōn kai ē chara
dio mēketi stegontes eudokēsamen kataleiphthēnai en athēnais monoi
kai epempsamen timotheon ton adelphon ēmōn kai diakonon tou theou kai sunergon ēmōn en tō euangeliō tou christou eis to stērixai umas kai parakalesai umas peri tēs pisteōs umōn
tō mēdena sainesthai en tais thlipsesin tautais autoi gar oidate oti eis touto keimetha
kai gar ote pros umas ēmen proelegomen umin oti mellomen thlibesthai kathōs kai egeneto kai oidate
dia touto kagō mēketi stegōn epempsa eis to gnōnai tēn pistin umōn mēpōs epeirasen umas o peirazōn kai eis kenon genētai o kopos ēmōn
arti de elthontos timotheou pros ēmas aph umōn kai euangelisamenou ēmin tēn pistin kai tēn agapēn umōn kai oti echete mneian ēmōn agathēn pantote epipothountes ēmas idein kathaper kai ēmeis umas
dia touto pareklēthēmen adelphoi eph umin epi pasē tē thlipsei kai anankē ēmōn dia tēs umōn pisteōs
oti nun zōmen ean umeis stēkēte en kuriō
tina gar eucharistian dunametha tō theō antapodounai peri umōn epi pasē tē chara ē chairomen di umas emprosthen tou theou ēmōn
nuktos kai ēmeras uper ekperissou deomenoi eis to idein umōn to prosōpon kai katartisai ta usterēmata tēs pisteōs umōn
autos de o theos kai patēr ēmōn kai o kurios ēmōn iēsous christos kateuthunai tēn odon ēmōn pros umas
umas de o kurios pleonasai kai perisseusai tē agapē eis allēlous kai eis pantas kathaper kai ēmeis eis umas
eis to stērixai umōn tas kardias amemptous en agiōsunē emprosthen tou theou kai patros ēmōn en tē parousia tou kuriou ēmōn iēsou christou meta pantōn tōn agiōn autou
to loipon oun adelphoi erōtōmen umas kai parakaloumen en kuriō iēsou kathōs parelabete par ēmōn to pōs dei umas peripatein kai areskein theō ina perisseuēte mallon
oidate gar tinas parangelias edōkamen umin dia tou kuriou iēsou
touto gar estin thelēma tou theou o agiasmos umōn apechesthai umas apo tēs porneias
eidenai ekaston umōn to eautou skeuos ktasthai en agiasmō kai timē
mē en pathei epithumias kathaper kai ta ethnē ta mē eidota ton theon
to mē uperbainein kai pleonektein en tō pragmati ton adelphon autou dioti ekdikos o kurios peri pantōn toutōn kathōs kai proeipamen umin kai diemarturametha
ou gar ekalesen ēmas o theos epi akatharsia all en agiasmō
toigaroun o athetōn ouk anthrōpon athetei alla ton theon ton kai donta to pneuma autou to agion eis ēmas
peri de tēs philadelphias ou chreian echete graphein umin autoi gar umeis theodidaktoi este eis to agapan allēlous
kai gar poieite auto eis pantas tous adelphous tous en olē tē makedonia parakaloumen de umas adelphoi perisseuein mallon
kai philotimeisthai ēsuchazein kai prassein ta idia kai ergazesthai tais idiais chersin umōn kathōs umin parēngeilamen
ina peripatēte euschēmonōs pros tous exō kai mēdenos chreian echēte
ou thelō de umas agnoein adelphoi peri tōn kekoimēmenōn ina mē lupēsthe kathōs kai oi loipoi oi mē echontes elpida
ei gar pisteuomen oti iēsous apethanen kai anestē outōs kai o theos tous koimēthentas dia tou iēsou axei sun autō
touto gar umin legomen en logō kuriou oti ēmeis oi zōntes oi perileipomenoi eis tēn parousian tou kuriou ou mē phthasōmen tous koimēthentas
oti autos o kurios en keleusmati en phōnē archangelou kai en salpingi theou katabēsetai ap ouranou kai oi nekroi en christō anastēsontai prōton
epeita ēmeis oi zōntes oi perileipomenoi ama sun autois arpagēsometha en nephelais eis apantēsin tou kuriou eis aera kai outōs pantote sun kuriō esometha
ōste parakaleite allēlous en tois logois toutois
peri de tōn chronōn kai tōn kairōn adelphoi ou chreian echete umin graphesthai
autoi gar akribōs oidate oti ē ēmera kuriou ōs kleptēs en nukti outōs erchetai
otan gar legōsin eirēnē kai asphaleia tote aiphnidios autois ephistatai olethros ōsper ē ōdin tē en gastri echousē kai ou mē ekphugōsin
umeis de adelphoi ouk este en skotei ina ē ēmera umas ōs kleptēs katalabē
pantes umeis uioi phōtos este kai uioi ēmeras ouk esmen nuktos oude skotous
ara oun mē katheudōmen ōs kai oi loipoi alla grēgorōmen kai nēphōmen
oi gar katheudontes nuktos katheudousin kai oi methuskomenoi nuktos methuousin
ēmeis de ēmeras ontes nēphōmen endusamenoi thōraka pisteōs kai agapēs kai perikephalaian elpida sōtērias
oti ouk etheto ēmas o theos eis orgēn all eis peripoiēsin sōtērias dia tou kuriou ēmōn iēsou christou
tou apothanontos uper ēmōn ina eite grēgorōmen eite katheudōmen ama sun autō zēsōmen
dio parakaleite allēlous kai oikodomeite eis ton ena kathōs kai poieite
erōtōmen de umas adelphoi eidenai tous kopiōntas en umin kai proistamenous umōn en kuriō kai nouthetountas umas
kai ēgeisthai autous uper ekperissou en agapē dia to ergon autōn eirēneuete en eautois
parakaloumen de umas adelphoi noutheteite tous ataktous paramutheisthe tous oligopsuchous antechesthe tōn asthenōn makrothumeite pros pantas
orate mē tis kakon anti kakou tini apodō alla pantote to agathon diōkete kai eis allēlous kai eis pantas
en panti eucharisteite touto gar thelēma theou en christō iēsou eis umas
autos de o theos tēs eirēnēs agiasai umas oloteleis kai oloklēron umōn to pneuma kai ē psuchē kai to sōma amemptōs en tē parousia tou kuriou ēmōn iēsou christou tērētheiē
pistos o kalōn umas os kai poiēsei
aspasasthe tous adelphous pantas en philēmati agiō

name: ΠΡΟΣ ΘΕΣΣΑΛΟΝΙΚΕΙΣ Β΄
chapters: paulos kai silouanos kai timotheos tē ekklēsia thessalonikeōn en theō patri ēmōn kai kuriō iēsou christō
charis umin kai eirēnē apo theou patros ēmōn kai kuriou iēsou christou
eucharistein opheilomen tō theō pantote peri umōn adelphoi kathōs axion estin oti uperauxanei ē pistis umōn kai pleonazei ē agapē enos ekastou pantōn umōn eis allēlous
ōste ēmas autous en umin kauchasthai en tais ekklēsiais tou theou uper tēs upomonēs umōn kai pisteōs en pasin tois diōgmois umōn kai tais thlipsesin ais anechesthe
endeigma tēs dikaias kriseōs tou theou eis to kataxiōthēnai umas tēs basileias tou theou uper ēs kai paschete
eiper dikaion para theō antapodounai tois thlibousin umas thlipsin
kai umin tois thlibomenois anesin meth ēmōn en tē apokalupsei tou kuriou iēsou ap ouranou met angelōn dunameōs autou
en puri phlogos didontos ekdikēsin tois mē eidosin theon kai tois mē upakouousin tō euangeliō tou kuriou ēmōn iēsou christou
oitines dikēn tisousin olethron aiōnion apo prosōpou tou kuriou kai apo tēs doxēs tēs ischuos autou
otan elthē endoxasthēnai en tois agiois autou kai thaumasthēnai en pasin tois pisteuousin oti episteuthē to marturion ēmōn eph umas en tē ēmera ekeinē
eis o kai proseuchometha pantote peri umōn ina umas axiōsē tēs klēseōs o theos ēmōn kai plērōsē pasan eudokian agathōsunēs kai ergon pisteōs en dunamei
opōs endoxasthē to onoma tou kuriou ēmōn iēsou christou en umin kai umeis en autō kata tēn charin tou theou ēmōn kai kuriou iēsou christou
erōtōmen de umas adelphoi uper tēs parousias tou kuriou ēmōn iēsou christou kai ēmōn episunagōgēs ep auton
eis to mē tacheōs saleuthēnai umas apo tou noos mēte throeisthai mēte dia pneumatos mēte dia logou mēte di epistolēs ōs di ēmōn ōs oti enestēken ē ēmera tou christou
mē tis umas exapatēsē kata mēdena tropon oti ean mē elthē ē apostasia prōton kai apokaluphthē o anthrōpos tēs amartias o uios tēs apōleias
o antikeimenos kai uperairomenos epi pan to legomenon theon ē sebasma ōste auton eis ton naon tou theou ōs theon kathisai apodeiknunta eauton oti estin theos
ou mnēmoneuete oti eti ōn pros umas tauta elegon umin
kai nun to katechon oidate eis to apokaluphthēnai auton en tō eautou kairō
to gar mustērion ēdē energeitai tēs anomias monon o katechōn arti eōs ek mesou genētai
kai tote apokaluphthēsetai o anomos on o kurios analōsei tō pneumati tou stomatos autou kai katargēsei tē epiphaneia tēs parousias autou
ou estin ē parousia kat energeian tou satana en pasē dunamei kai sēmeiois kai terasin pseudous
kai en pasē apatē tēs adikias en tois apollumenois anth ōn tēn agapēn tēs alētheias ouk edexanto eis to sōthēnai autous
kai dia touto pempsei autois o theos energeian planēs eis to pisteusai autous tō pseudei
ina krithōsin pantes oi mē pisteusantes tē alētheia all eudokēsantes en tē adikia
ēmeis de opheilomen eucharistein tō theō pantote peri umōn adelphoi ēgapēmenoi upo kuriou oti eileto umas o theos ap archēs eis sōtērian en agiasmō pneumatos kai pistei alētheias
eis o ekalesen umas dia tou euangeliou ēmōn eis peripoiēsin doxēs tou kuriou ēmōn iēsou christou
ara oun adelphoi stēkete kai krateite tas paradoseis as edidachthēte eite dia logou eite di epistolēs ēmōn
autos de o kurios ēmōn iēsous christos kai o theos kai patēr ēmōn o agapēsas ēmas kai dous paraklēsin aiōnian kai elpida agathēn en chariti
parakalesai umōn tas kardias kai stērixai umas en panti logō kai ergō agathō
to loipon proseuchesthe adelphoi peri ēmōn ina o logos tou kuriou trechē kai doxazētai kathōs kai pros umas
kai ina rusthōmen apo tōn atopōn kai ponērōn anthrōpōn ou gar pantōn ē pistis
pistos de estin o kurios os stērixei umas kai phulaxei apo tou ponērou
pepoithamen de en kuriō eph umas oti a parangellomen umin kai poieite kai poiēsete
o de kurios kateuthunai umōn tas kardias eis tēn agapēn tou theou kai eis tēn upomonēn tou christou
parangellomen de umin adelphoi en onomati tou kuriou ēmōn iēsou christou stellesthai umas apo pantos adelphou ataktōs peripatountos kai mē kata tēn paradosin ēn parelaben par ēmōn
autoi gar oidate pōs dei mimeisthai ēmas oti ouk ētaktēsamen en umin
oude dōrean arton ephagomen para tinos all en kopō kai mochthō nukta kai ēmeran ergazomenoi pros to mē epibarēsai tina umōn
ouch oti ouk echomen exousian all ina eautous tupon dōmen umin eis to mimeisthai ēmas
kai gar ote ēmen pros umas touto parēngellomen umin oti ei tis ou thelei ergazesthai mēde esthietō
akouomen gar tinas peripatountas en umin ataktōs mēden ergazomenous alla periergazomenous
tois de toioutois parangellomen kai parakaloumen dia tou kuriou ēmōn iēsou christou ina meta ēsuchias ergazomenoi ton eautōn arton esthiōsin
umeis de adelphoi mē ekkakēsēte kalopoiountes
ei de tis ouch upakouei tō logō ēmōn dia tēs epistolēs touton sēmeiousthe kai mē sunanamignusthe autō ina entrapē
kai mē ōs echthron ēgeisthe alla noutheteite ōs adelphon
autos de o kurios tēs eirēnēs dōē umin tēn eirēnēn dia pantos en panti tropō o kurios meta pantōn umōn
o aspasmos tē emē cheiri paulou o estin sēmeion en pasē epistolē outōs graphō

name: ΠΡΟΣ ΤΙΜΟΘΕΟΝ Α΄
chapters: paulos apostolos iēsou christou kat epitagēn theou sōtēros ēmōn kai kuriou iēsou christou tēs elpidos ēmōn
timotheō gnēsiō teknō en pistei charis eleos eirēnē apo theou patros ēmōn kai iēsou christou tou kuriou ēmōn
kathōs parekalesa se prosmeinai en ephesō poreuomenos eis makedonian ina parangeilēs tisin mē eterodidaskalein
mēde prosechein muthois kai genealogiais aperantois aitines zētēseis parechousin mallon ē oikodomian theou tēn en pistei
to de telos tēs parangelias estin agapē ek katharas kardias kai suneidēseōs agathēs kai pisteōs anupokritou
ōn tines astochēsantes exetrapēsan eis mataiologian
thelontes einai nomodidaskaloi mē noountes mēte a legousin mēte peri tinōn diabebaiountai
oidamen de oti kalos o nomos ean tis autō nomimōs chrētai
eidōs touto oti dikaiō nomos ou keitai anomois de kai anupotaktois asebesin kai amartōlois anosiois kai bebēlois patralōais kai mētralōais androphonois
pornois arsenokoitais andrapodistais pseustais epiorkois kai ei ti eteron tē ugiainousē didaskalia antikeitai
kata to euangelion tēs doxēs tou makariou theou o episteuthēn egō
parakalō oun prōton pantōn poieisthai deēseis proseuchas enteuxeis eucharistias uper pantōn anthrōpōn
uper basileōn kai pantōn tōn en uperochē ontōn ina ēremon kai ēsuchion bion diagōmen en pasē eusebeia kai semnotēti
touto gar kalon kai apodekton enōpion tou sōtēros ēmōn theou
os pantas anthrōpous thelei sōthēnai kai eis epignōsin alētheias elthein
eis gar theos eis kai mesitēs theou kai anthrōpōn anthrōpos christos iēsous
o dous eauton antilutron uper pantōn to marturion kairois idiois
eis o etethēn egō kērux kai apostolos alētheian legō en christō ou pseudomai didaskalos ethnōn en pistei kai alētheia
boulomai oun proseuchesthai tous andras en panti topō epairontas osious cheiras chōris orgēs kai dialogismou
ōsautōs kai tas gunaikas en katastolē kosmiō meta aidous kai sōphrosunēs kosmein eautas mē en plegmasin ē chrusō ē margaritais ē imatismō polutelei
all o prepei gunaixin epangellomenais theosebeian di ergōn agathōn
gunē en ēsuchia manthanetō en pasē upotagē
gunaiki de didaskein ouk epitrepō oude authentein andros all einai en ēsuchia
adam gar prōtos eplasthē eita eua
kai adam ouk ēpatēthē ē de gunē apatētheisa en parabasei gegonen
sōthēsetai de dia tēs teknogonias ean meinōsin en pistei kai agapē kai agiasmō meta sōphrosunēs
pistos o logos ei tis episkopēs oregetai kalou ergou epithumei
dei oun ton episkopon anepilēpton einai mias gunaikos andra nēphalion sōphrona kosmion philoxenon didaktikon
mē paroinon mē plēktēn mē aischrokerdē all epieikē amachon aphilarguron
tou idiou oikou kalōs proistamenon tekna echonta en upotagē meta pasēs semnotētos
ei de tis tou idiou oikou prostēnai ouk oiden pōs ekklēsias theou epimelēsetai
mē neophuton ina mē tuphōtheis eis krima empesē tou diabolou
dei de auton kai marturian kalēn echein apo tōn exōthen ina mē eis oneidismon empesē kai pagida tou diabolou
diakonous ōsautōs semnous mē dilogous mē oinō pollō prosechontas mē aischrokerdeis
echontas to mustērion tēs pisteōs en kathara suneidēsei
kai outoi de dokimazesthōsan prōton eita diakoneitōsan anenklētoi ontes
gunaikas ōsautōs semnas mē diabolous nēphalious pistas en pasin
diakonoi estōsan mias gunaikos andres teknōn kalōs proistamenoi kai tōn idiōn oikōn
