oi gar kalōs diakonēsantes bathmon eautois kalon peripoiountai kai pollēn parrēsian en pistei tē en christō iēsou
to de pneuma rētōs legei oti en usterois kairois apostēsontai tines tēs pisteōs prosechontes pneumasin planois kai didaskaliais daimoniōn
en upokrisei pseudologōn kekautēriasmenōn tēn idian suneidēsin
kōluontōn gamein apechesthai brōmatōn a o theos ektisen eis metalēpsin meta eucharistias tois pistois kai epegnōkosin tēn alētheian
oti pan ktisma theou kalon kai ouden apoblēton meta eucharistias lambanomenon
agiazetai gar dia logou theou kai enteuxeōs
tauta upotithemenos tois adelphois kalos esē diakonos iēsou christou entrephomenos tois logois tēs pisteōs kai tēs kalēs didaskalias ē parēkolouthēkas
tous de bebēlous kai graōdeis muthous paraitou gumnaze de seauton pros eusebeian
ē gar sōmatikē gumnasia pros oligon estin ōphelimos ē de eusebeia pros panta ōphelimos estin epangelian echousa zōēs tēs nun kai tēs mellousēs
pistos o logos kai pasēs apodochēs axios
eis touto gar kai kopiōmen kai oneidizometha oti ēlpikamen epi theō zōnti os estin sōtēr pantōn anthrōpōn malista pistōn
mēdeis sou tēs neotētos kataphroneitō alla tupos ginou tōn pistōn en logō en anastrophē en agapē en pneumati en pistei en agneia
eōs erchomai proseche tē anagnōsei tē paraklēsei tē didaskalia
mē amelei tou en soi charismatos o edothē soi dia prophēteias meta epitheseōs tōn cheirōn tou presbuteriou
tauta meleta en toutois isthi ina sou ē prokopē phanera ē en pasin
epeche seautō kai tē didaskalia epimene autois touto gar poiōn kai seauton sōseis kai tous akouontas sou
presbuterō mē epiplēxēs alla parakalei ōs patera neōterous ōs adelphous
presbuteras ōs mēteras neōteras ōs adelphas en pasē agneia
ei de tis chēra tekna ē ekgona echei manthanetōsan prōton ton idion oikon eusebein kai amoibas apodidonai tois progonois touto gar estin kalon kai apodekton enōpion tou theou
ē de ontōs chēra kai memonōmenē ēlpiken epi ton theon kai prosmenei tais deēsesin kai tais proseuchais nuktos kai ēmeras
kai tauta parangelle ina anepilēptoi ōsin
ei de tis tōn idiōn kai malista tōn oikeiōn ou pronoei tēn pistin ērnētai kai estin apistou cheirōn
chēra katalegesthō mē elatton etōn exēkonta gegonuia enos andros gunē
en ergois kalois marturoumenē ei eteknotrophēsen ei exenodochēsen ei agiōn podas enipsen ei thlibomenois epērkesen ei panti ergō agathō epēkolouthēsen
neōteras de chēras paraitou otan gar katastrēniasōsin tou christou gamein thelousin
echousai krima oti tēn prōtēn pistin ēthetēsan
ama de kai argai manthanousin perierchomenai tas oikias ou monon de argai alla kai phluaroi kai periergoi lalousai ta mē deonta
boulomai oun neōteras gamein teknogonein oikodespotein mēdemian aphormēn didonai tō antikeimenō loidorias charin
ēdē gar tines exetrapēsan opisō tou satana
ei tis pistos ē pistē echei chēras eparkeitō autais kai mē bareisthō ē ekklēsia ina tais ontōs chērais eparkesē
oi kalōs proestōtes presbuteroi diplēs timēs axiousthōsan malista oi kopiōntes en logō kai didaskalia
osoi eisin upo zugon douloi tous idious despotas pasēs timēs axious ēgeisthōsan ina mē to onoma tou theou kai ē didaskalia blasphēmētai
oi de pistous echontes despotas mē kataphroneitōsan oti adelphoi eisin alla mallon douleuetōsan oti pistoi eisin kai agapētoi oi tēs euergesias antilambanomenoi tauta didaske kai parakalei
ei tis eterodidaskalei kai mē proserchetai ugiainousin logois tois tou kuriou ēmōn iēsou christou kai tē kat eusebeian didaskalia
tetuphōtai mēden epistamenos alla nosōn peri zētēseis kai logomachias ex ōn ginetai phthonos eris blasphēmiai uponoiai ponērai
paradiatribai diephtharmenōn anthrōpōn ton noun kai apesterēmenōn tēs alētheias nomizontōn porismon einai tēn eusebeian aphistaso apo tōn toioutōn
estin de porismos megas ē eusebeia meta autarkeias
ouden gar eisēnenkamen eis ton kosmon dēlon oti oude exenenkein ti dunametha
echontes de diatrophas kai skepasmata toutois arkesthēsometha
oi de boulomenoi ploutein empiptousin eis peirasmon kai pagida kai epithumias pollas anoētous kai blaberas aitines buthizousin tous anthrōpous eis olethron kai apōleian
riza gar pantōn tōn kakōn estin ē philarguria ēs tines oregomenoi apeplanēthēsan apo tēs pisteōs kai eautous periepeiran odunais pollais
su de ō anthrōpe tou theou tauta pheuge diōke de dikaiosunēn eusebeian pistin agapēn upomonēn praotēta
agōnizou ton kalon agōna tēs pisteōs epilabou tēs aiōniou zōēs eis ēn kai eklēthēs kai ōmologēsas tēn kalēn omologian enōpion pollōn marturōn
parangellō soi enōpion tou theou tou zōopoiountos ta panta kai christou iēsou tou marturēsantos epi pontiou pilatou tēn kalēn omologian
tērēsai se tēn entolēn aspilon anepilēpton mechri tēs epiphaneias tou kuriou ēmōn iēsou christou
ēn kairois idiois deixei o makarios kai monos dunastēs o basileus tōn basileuontōn kai kurios tōn kurieuontōn
o monos echōn athanasian phōs oikōn aprositon on eiden oudeis anthrōpōn oude idein dunatai ō timē kai kratos aiōnion amēn
tois plousiois en tō nun aiōni parangelle mē upsēlophronein mēde ēlpikenai epi ploutou adēlotēti all en tō theō tō zōnti tō parechonti ēmin plousiōs panta eis apolausin
agathoergein ploutein en ergois kalois eumetadotous einai koinōnikous
apothēsaurizontas eautois themelion kalon eis to mellon ina epilabōntai tēs aiōniou zōēs
ō timothee tēn parakatathēkēn phulaxon ektrepomenos tas bebēlous kenophōnias kai antitheseis tēs pseudōnumou gnōseōs
ēn tines epangellomenoi peri tēn pistin ēstochēsan ē charis meta sou amēn [pros timotheon prōtē egraphē apo laodikeias ētis estin mētropolis phrugias tēs pakatianēs]

name: ΠΡΟΣ ΤΙΜΟΘΕΟΝ Β΄
chapters: paulos apostolos iēsou christou dia thelēmatos theou kat epangelian zōēs tēs en christō iēsou
timotheō agapētō teknō charis eleos eirēnē apo theou patros kai christou iēsou tou kuriou ēmōn
charin echō tō theō ō latreuō apo progonōn en kathara suneidēsei ōs adialeipton echō tēn peri sou mneian en tais deēsesin mou nuktos kai ēmeras
epipothōn se idein memnēmenos sou tōn dakruōn ina charas plērōthō
upomnēsin lambanōn tēs en soi anupokritou pisteōs ētis enōkēsen prōton en tē mammē sou lōidi kai tē mētri sou eunikē pepeismai de oti kai en soi
di ēn aitian anamimnēskō se anazōpurein to charisma tou theou o estin en soi dia tēs epitheseōs tōn cheirōn mou
ou gar edōken ēmin o theos pneuma deilias alla dunameōs kai agapēs kai sōphronismou
mē oun epaischunthēs to marturion tou kuriou ēmōn mēde eme ton desmion autou alla sunkakopathēson tō euangeliō kata dunamin theou
tou sōsantos ēmas kai kalesantos klēsei agia ou kata ta erga ēmōn alla kat idian prothesin kai charin tēn dotheisan ēmin en christō iēsou pro chronōn aiōniōn
phanerōtheisan de nun dia tēs epiphaneias tou sōtēros ēmōn iēsou christou katargēsantos men ton thanaton phōtisantos de zōēn kai aphtharsian dia tou euangeliou
eis o etethēn egō kērux kai apostolos kai didaskalos ethnōn
su oun teknon mou endunamou en tē chariti tē en christō iēsou
kai a ēkousas par emou dia pollōn marturōn tauta parathou pistois anthrōpois oitines ikanoi esontai kai eterous didaxai
su oun kakopathēson ōs kalos stratiōtēs iēsou christou
oudeis strateuomenos empleketai tais tou biou pragmateiais ina tō stratologēsanti aresē
ean de kai athlē tis ou stephanoutai ean mē nomimōs athlēsē
ton kopiōnta geōrgon dei prōton tōn karpōn metalambanein
noei a legō dōē gar soi o kurios sunesin en pasin
mnēmoneue iēsoun christon egēgermenon ek nekrōn ek spermatos dabid kata to euangelion mou
en ō kakopathō mechri desmōn ōs kakourgos all o logos tou theou ou dedetai
dia touto panta upomenō dia tous eklektous ina kai autoi sōtērias tuchōsin tēs en christō iēsou meta doxēs aiōniou
pistos o logos ei gar sunapethanomen kai suzēsomen
ei upomenomen kai sumbasileusomen ei arnoumetha kakeinos arnēsetai ēmas
ei apistoumen ekeinos pistos menei arnēsasthai eauton ou dunatai
tauta upomimnēske diamarturomenos enōpion tou kuriou mē logomachein eis ouden chrēsimon epi katastrophē tōn akouontōn
spoudason seauton dokimon parastēsai tō theō ergatēn anepaischunton orthotomounta ton logon tēs alētheias
tas de bebēlous kenophōnias periistaso epi pleion gar prokopsousin asebeias
kai o logos autōn ōs gangraina nomēn exei ōn estin umenaios kai philētos
oitines peri tēn alētheian ēstochēsan legontes tēn anastasin ēdē gegonenai kai anatrepousin tēn tinōn pistin
o mentoi stereos themelios tou theou estēken echōn tēn sphragida tautēn egnō kurios tous ontas autou kai apostētō apo adikias pas o onomazōn to onoma christou
en megalē de oikia ouk estin monon skeuē chrusa kai argura alla kai xulina kai ostrakina kai a men eis timēn a de eis atimian
touto de ginōske oti en eschatais ēmerais enstēsontai kairoi chalepoi
esontai gar oi anthrōpoi philautoi philarguroi alazones uperēphanoi blasphēmoi goneusin apeitheis acharistoi anosioi
astorgoi aspondoi diaboloi akrateis anēmeroi aphilagathoi
prodotai propeteis tetuphōmenoi philēdonoi mallon ē philotheoi
echontes morphōsin eusebeias tēn de dunamin autēs ērnēmenoi kai toutous apotrepou
ek toutōn gar eisin oi endunontes eis tas oikias kai aichmalōteuontes ta gunaikaria sesōreumena amartiais agomena epithumiais poikilais
pantote manthanonta kai mēdepote eis epignōsin alētheias elthein dunamena
on tropon de iannēs kai iambrēs antestēsan mōusei outōs kai outoi anthistantai tē alētheia anthrōpoi katephtharmenoi ton noun adokimoi peri tēn pistin
all ou prokopsousin epi pleion ē gar anoia autōn ekdēlos estai pasin ōs kai ē ekeinōn egeneto
su de parēkolouthēkas mou tē didaskalia tē agōgē tē prothesei tē pistei tē makrothumia tē agapē tē upomonē
tois diōgmois tois pathēmasin oia moi egeneto en antiocheia en ikoniō en lustrois oious diōgmous upēnenka kai ek pantōn me errusato o kurios
kai pantes de oi thelontes eusebōs zēn en christō iēsou diōchthēsontai
ponēroi de anthrōpoi kai goētes prokopsousin epi to cheiron planōntes kai planōmenoi
su de mene en ois emathes kai epistōthēs eidōs para tinos emathes
kai oti apo brephous ta iera grammata oidas ta dunamena se sophisai eis sōtērian dia pisteōs tēs en christō iēsou
pasa graphē theopneustos kai ōphelimos pros didaskalian pros elenchon pros epanorthōsin pros paideian tēn en dikaiosunē
ina artios ē o tou theou anthrōpos pros pan ergon agathon exērtismenos
diamarturomai oun egō enōpion tou theou kai tou kuriou iēsou christou tou mellontos krinein zōntas kai nekrous kata tēn epiphaneian autou kai tēn basileian autou
kēruxon ton logon epistēthi eukairōs akairōs elegxon epitimēson parakaleson en pasē makrothumia kai didachē
estai gar kairos ote tēs ugiainousēs didaskalias ouk anexontai alla kata tas epithumias tas idias eautois episōreusousin didaskalous knēthomenoi tēn akoēn
kai apo men tēs alētheias tēn akoēn apostrepsousin epi de tous muthous ektrapēsontai
su de nēphe en pasin kakopathēson ergon poiēson euangelistou tēn diakonian sou plērophorēson
egō gar ēdē spendomai kai o kairos tēs emēs analuseōs ephestēken
ton agōna ton kalon ēgōnismai ton dromon teteleka tēn pistin tetērēka
loipon apokeitai moi o tēs dikaiosunēs stephanos on apodōsei moi o kurios en ekeinē tē ēmera o dikaios kritēs ou monon de emoi alla kai pasin tois ēgapēkosin tēn epiphaneian autou
dēmas gar me enkatelipen agapēsas ton nun aiōna kai eporeuthē eis thessalonikēn krēskēs eis galatian titos eis dalmatian
loukas estin monos met emou markon analabōn age meta seautou estin gar moi euchrēstos eis diakonian
ton phelonēn on apelipon en trōadi para karpō erchomenos phere kai ta biblia malista tas membranas
alexandros o chalkeus polla moi kaka enedeixato apodōē autō o kurios kata ta erga autou
on kai su phulassou lian gar anthestēken tois ēmeterois logois
en tē prōtē mou apologia oudeis moi sumparegeneto alla pantes me enkatelipon mē autois logistheiē
o de kurios moi parestē kai enedunamōsen me ina di emou to kērugma plērophorēthē kai akousē panta ta ethnē kai errusthēn ek stomatos leontos
kai rusetai me o kurios apo pantos ergou ponērou kai sōsei eis tēn basileian autou tēn epouranion ō ē doxa eis tous aiōnas tōn aiōnōn amēn
aspasai priskan kai akulan kai ton onēsiphorou oikon
erastos emeinen en korinthō trophimon de apelipon en milētō asthenounta
spoudason pro cheimōnos elthein aspazetai se euboulos kai poudēs kai linos kai klaudia kai oi adelphoi pantes

o kurios iēsous christos meta tou pneumatos sou ē charis meth umōn amēn [pros timotheon deutera tēs ephesiōn ekklēsias prōton episkopon cheirotonēthenta egraphē apo rōmēs ote ek deuterou parestē paulos tō kaisari nerōni]

name: ΠΡΟΣ ΤΙΤΟΝ
chapters: paulos doulos theou apostolos de iēsou christou kata pistin eklektōn theou kai epignōsin alētheias tēs kat eusebeian
ep elpidi zōēs aiōniou ēn epēngeilato o apseudēs theos pro chronōn aiōniōn
ephanerōsen de kairois idiois ton logon autou en kērugmati o episteuthēn egō kat epitagēn tou sōtēros ēmōn theou
titō gnēsiō teknō kata koinēn pistin charis eleos eirēnē apo theou patros kai kuriou iēsou christou tou sōtēros ēmōn
toutou charin katelipon se en krētē ina ta leiponta epidiorthōsē kai katastēsēs kata polin presbuterous ōs egō soi dietaxamēn
ei tis estin anenklētos mias gunaikos anēr tekna echōn pista mē en katēgoria asōtias ē anupotakta
dei gar ton episkopon anenklēton einai ōs theou oikonomon mē authadē mē orgilon mē paroinon mē plēktēn mē aischrokerdē
alla philoxenon philagathon sōphrona dikaion osion enkratē
antechomenon tou kata tēn didachēn pistou logou ina dunatos ē kai parakalein en tē didaskalia tē ugiainousē kai tous antilegontas elenchein
eisin gar polloi kai anupotaktoi mataiologoi kai phrenapatai malista oi ek peritomēs
ous dei epistomizein oitines olous oikous anatrepousin didaskontes a mē dei aischrou kerdous charin
eipen tis ex autōn idios autōn prophētēs krētes aei pseustai kaka thēria gasteres argai
ē marturia autē estin alēthēs di ēn aitian elenche autous apotomōs ina ugiainōsin en tē pistei
mē prosechontes ioudaikois muthois kai entolais anthrōpōn apostrephomenōn tēn alētheian
panta men kathara tois katharois tois de memiasmenois kai apistois ouden katharon alla memiantai autōn kai o nous kai ē suneidēsis
theon omologousin eidenai tois de ergois arnountai bdeluktoi ontes kai apeitheis kai pros pan ergon agathon adokimoi
su de lalei a prepei tē ugiainousē didaskalia
presbutas nēphalious einai semnous sōphronas ugiainontas tē pistei tē agapē tē upomonē
presbutidas ōsautōs en katastēmati ieroprepeis mē diabolous mē oinō pollō dedoulōmenas kalodidaskalous
ina sōphronizōsin tas neas philandrous einai philoteknous
sōphronas agnas oikourous agathas upotassomenas tois idiois andrasin ina mē o logos tou theou blasphēmētai
peri panta seauton parechomenos tupon kalōn ergōn en tē didaskalia adiaphthorian semnotēta aphtharsian
logon ugiē akatagnōston ina o ex enantias entrapē mēden echōn peri umōn legein phaulon
doulous idiois despotais upotassesthai en pasin euarestous einai mē antilegontas
mē nosphizomenous alla pistin pasan endeiknumenous agathēn ina tēn didaskalian tou sōtēros ēmōn theou kosmōsin en pasin
epephanē gar ē charis tou theou ē sōtērios pasin anthrōpois
paideuousa ēmas ina arnēsamenoi tēn asebeian kai tas kosmikas epithumias sōphronōs kai dikaiōs kai eusebōs zēsōmen en tō nun aiōni
prosdechomenoi tēn makarian elpida kai epiphaneian tēs doxēs tou megalou theou kai sōtēros ēmōn iēsou christou
os edōken eauton uper ēmōn ina lutrōsētai ēmas apo pasēs anomias kai katharisē eautō laon periousion zēlōtēn kalōn ergōn
tauta lalei kai parakalei kai elenche meta pasēs epitagēs mēdeis sou periphroneitō
upomimnēske autous archais kai exousiais upotassesthai peitharchein pros pan ergon agathon etoimous einai
mēdena blasphēmein amachous einai epieikeis pasan endeiknumenous praotēta pros pantas anthrōpous
ēmen gar pote kai ēmeis anoētoi apeitheis planōmenoi douleuontes epithumiais kai ēdonais poikilais en kakia kai phthonō diagontes stugētoi misountes allēlous
ote de ē chrēstotēs kai ē philanthrōpia epephanē tou sōtēros ēmōn theou
ouk ex ergōn tōn en dikaiosunē ōn epoiēsamen ēmeis alla kata ton autou eleon esōsen ēmas dia loutrou palingenesias kai anakainōseōs pneumatos agiou
ou execheen eph ēmas plousiōs dia iēsou christou tou sōtēros ēmōn
ina dikaiōthentes tē ekeinou chariti klēronomoi genōmetha kat elpida zōēs aiōniou
pistos o logos kai peri toutōn boulomai se diabebaiousthai ina phrontizōsin kalōn ergōn proistasthai oi pepisteukotes tō theō tauta estin ta kala kai ōphelima tois anthrōpois
mōras de zētēseis kai genealogias kai ereis kai machas nomikas periistaso eisin gar anōpheleis kai mataioi
airetikon anthrōpon meta mian kai deuteran nouthesian paraitou
eidōs oti exestraptai o toioutos kai amartanei ōn autokatakritos
otan pempsō arteman pros se ē tuchikon spoudason elthein pros me eis nikopolin ekei gar kekrika paracheimasai
zēnan ton nomikon kai apollō spoudaiōs propempson ina mēden autois leipē
manthanetōsan de kai oi ēmeteroi kalōn ergōn proistasthai eis tas anankaias chreias ina mē ōsin akarpoi

aspazontai se oi met emou pantes aspasai tous philountas ēmas en pistei ē charis meta pantōn umōn amēn [pros titon tēs krētōn ekklēsias prōton episkopon cheirotonēthenta egraphē apo nikopoleōs tēs makedonias]

name: ΠΡΟΣ ΦΙΛΗΜΟΝΑ
chapters: paulos desmios christou iēsou kai timotheos o adelphos philēmoni tō agapētō kai sunergō ēmōn
kai apphia tē agapētē kai archippō tō sustratiōtē ēmōn kai tē kat oikon sou ekklēsia
charis umin kai eirēnē apo theou patros ēmōn kai kuriou iēsou christou
eucharistō tō theō mou pantote mneian sou poioumenos epi tōn proseuchōn mou
akouōn sou tēn agapēn kai tēn pistin ēn echeis pros ton kurion iēsoun kai eis pantas tous agious
opōs ē koinōnia tēs pisteōs sou energēs genētai en epignōsei pantos agathou tou en umin eis christon iēsoun
charan gar echomen pollēn kai paraklēsin epi tē agapē sou oti ta splanchna tōn agiōn anapepautai dia sou adelphe
dio pollēn en christō parrēsian echōn epitassein soi to anēkon
dia tēn agapēn mallon parakalō toioutos ōn ōs paulos presbutēs nuni de kai desmios iēsou christou
parakalō se peri tou emou teknou on egennēsa en tois desmois mou onēsimon
ton pote soi achrēston nuni de soi kai emoi euchrēston
on anepempsa su de auton tout estin ta ema splanchna proslabou
on egō eboulomēn pros emauton katechein ina uper sou diakonē moi en tois desmois tou euangeliou
chōris de tēs sēs gnōmēs ouden ēthelēsa poiēsai ina mē ōs kata anankēn to agathon sou ē alla kata ekousion
tacha gar dia touto echōristhē pros ōran ina aiōnion auton apechēs
ouketi ōs doulon all uper doulon adelphon agapēton malista emoi posō de mallon soi kai en sarki kai en kuriō
ei oun eme echeis koinōnon proslabou auton ōs eme
ei de ti ēdikēsen se ē opheilei touto emoi ellogei
egō paulos egrapsa tē emē cheiri egō apotisō ina mē legō soi oti kai seauton moi prosopheileis
nai adelphe egō sou onaimēn en kuriō anapauson mou ta splanchna en kuriō
pepoithōs tē upakoē sou egrapsa soi eidōs oti kai uper o legō poiēseis
ama de kai etoimaze moi xenian elpizō gar oti dia tōn proseuchōn umōn charisthēsomai umin

name: ΠΡΟΣ ΕΒΡΑΙΟΥΣ
chapters: polumerōs kai polutropōs palai o theos lalēsas tois patrasin en tois prophētais
ep eschatōn tōn ēmerōn toutōn elalēsen ēmin en uiō on ethēken klēronomon pantōn di ou kai tous aiōnas epoiēsen

os ōn apaugasma tēs doxēs kai charaktēr tēs upostaseōs autou pherōn te ta panta tō rēmati tēs dunameōs autou di eautou katharismon poiēsamenos tōn amartiōn ēmōn ekathisen en dexia tēs megalōsunēs en upsēlois
tosoutō kreittōn genomenos tōn angelōn osō diaphorōteron par autous keklēronomēken onoma
tini gar eipen pote tōn angelōn uios mou ei su egō sēmeron gegennēka se kai palin egō esomai autō eis patera kai autos estai moi eis uion
otan de palin eisagagē ton prōtotokon eis tēn oikoumenēn legei kai proskunēsatōsan autō pantes angeloi theou
dia touto dei perissoterōs ēmas prosechein tois akoustheisin mēpote pararruōmen
ei gar o di angelōn lalētheis logos egeneto bebaios kai pasa parabasis kai parakoē elaben endikon misthapodosian
pōs ēmeis ekpheuxometha tēlikautēs amelēsantes sōtērias ētis archēn labousa laleisthai dia tou kuriou upo tōn akousantōn eis ēmas ebebaiōthē
sunepimarturountos tou theou sēmeiois te kai terasin kai poikilais dunamesin kai pneumatos agiou merismois kata tēn autou thelēsin
ou gar angelois upetaxen tēn oikoumenēn tēn mellousan peri ēs laloumen
diemarturato de pou tis legōn ti estin anthrōpos oti mimnēskē autou ē uios anthrōpou oti episkeptē auton
ēlattōsas auton brachu ti par angelous doxē kai timē estephanōsas auton kai katestēsas auton epi ta erga tōn cheirōn sou
panta upetaxas upokatō tōn podōn autou en gar tō upotaxai autō ta panta ouden aphēken autō anupotakton nun de oupō orōmen autō ta panta upotetagmena
ton de brachu ti par angelous ēlattōmenon blepomen iēsoun dia to pathēma tou thanatou doxē kai timē estephanōmenon opōs chariti theou uper pantos geusētai thanatou
eprepen gar autō di on ta panta kai di ou ta panta pollous uious eis doxan agagonta ton archēgon tēs sōtērias autōn dia pathēmatōn teleiōsai
o te gar agiazōn kai oi agiazomenoi ex enos pantes di ēn aitian ouk epaischunetai adelphous autous kalein
legōn apangelō to onoma sou tois adelphois mou en mesō ekklēsias umnēsō se
othen adelphoi agioi klēseōs epouraniou metochoi katanoēsate ton apostolon kai archierea tēs omologias ēmōn christon iēsoun
piston onta tō poiēsanti auton ōs kai mōsēs en olō tō oikō autou
pleionos gar doxēs outos para mōsēn ēxiōtai kath oson pleiona timēn echei tou oikou o kataskeuasas auton
pas gar oikos kataskeuazetai upo tinos o de ta panta kataskeuasas theos
kai mōsēs men pistos en olō tō oikō autou ōs therapōn eis marturion tōn lalēthēsomenōn
christos de ōs uios epi ton oikon autou ou oikos esmen ēmeis eanper tēn parrēsian kai to kauchēma tēs elpidos mechri telous bebaian kataschōmen
dio kathōs legei to pneuma to agion sēmeron ean tēs phōnēs autou akousēte
mē sklērunēte tas kardias umōn ōs en tō parapikrasmō kata tēn ēmeran tou peirasmou en tē erēmō
phobēthōmen oun mēpote kataleipomenēs epangelias eiselthein eis tēn katapausin autou dokē tis ex umōn usterēkenai
kai gar esmen euēngelismenoi kathaper kakeinoi all ouk ōphelēsen o logos tēs akoēs ekeinous mē sunkekramenos tē pistei tois akousasin
eiserchometha gar eis tēn katapausin oi pisteusantes kathōs eirēken ōs ōmosa en tē orgē mou ei eiseleusontai eis tēn katapausin mou kaitoi tōn ergōn apo katabolēs kosmou genēthentōn
eirēken gar pou peri tēs ebdomēs outōs kai katepausen o theos en tē ēmera tē ebdomē apo pantōn tōn ergōn autou
kai en toutō palin ei eiseleusontai eis tēn katapausin mou
epei oun apoleipetai tinas eiselthein eis autēn kai oi proteron euangelisthentes ouk eisēlthon di apeitheian
palin tina orizei ēmeran sēmeron en dabid legōn meta tosouton chronon kathōs eirētai sēmeron ean tēs phōnēs autou akousēte mē sklērunēte tas kardias umōn
ei gar autous iēsous katepausen ouk an peri allēs elalei meta tauta ēmeras
pas gar archiereus ex anthrōpōn lambanomenos uper anthrōpōn kathistatai ta pros ton theon ina prospherē dōra te kai thusias uper amartiōn
metriopathein dunamenos tois agnoousin kai planōmenois epei kai autos perikeitai astheneian
kai dia tautēn opheilei kathōs peri tou laou outōs kai peri eautou prospherein uper amartiōn
kai ouch eautō tis lambanei tēn timēn alla o kaloumenos upo tou theou kathaper kai o aarōn
outōs kai o christos ouch eauton edoxasen genēthēnai archierea all o lalēsas pros auton uios mou ei su egō sēmeron gegennēka se
kathōs kai en eterō legei su iereus eis ton aiōna kata tēn taxin melchisedek
os en tais ēmerais tēs sarkos autou deēseis te kai iketērias pros ton dunamenon sōzein auton ek thanatou meta kraugēs ischuras kai dakruōn prosenenkas kai eisakoustheis apo tēs eulabeias
kaiper ōn uios emathen aph ōn epathen tēn upakoēn
kai teleiōtheis egeneto tois upakouousin autō pasin aitios sōtērias aiōniou
prosagoreutheis upo tou theou archiereus kata tēn taxin melchisedek
peri ou polus ēmin o logos kai dusermēneutos legein epei nōthroi gegonate tais akoais

kai gar opheilontes einai didaskaloi dia ton chronon palin chreian echete tou didaskein umas tina ta stoicheia tēs archēs tōn logiōn tou theou kai gegonate chreian echontes galaktos kai ou stereas trophēs
dio aphentes ton tēs archēs tou christou logon epi tēn teleiotēta pherōmetha mē palin themelion kataballomenoi metanoias apo nekrōn ergōn kai pisteōs epi theon
baptismōn didachēs epitheseōs te cheirōn anastaseōs te nekrōn kai krimatos aiōniou
kai touto poiēsomen eanper epitrepē o theos
adunaton gar tous apax phōtisthentas geusamenous te tēs dōreas tēs epouraniou kai metochous genēthentas pneumatos agiou
kai kalon geusamenous theou rēma dunameis te mellontos aiōnos
kai parapesontas palin anakainizein eis metanoian anastaurountas eautois ton uion tou theou kai paradeigmatizontas
gē gar ē piousa ton ep autēs pollakis erchomenon ueton kai tiktousa botanēn eutheton ekeinois di ous kai geōrgeitai metalambanei eulogias apo tou theou
ekpherousa de akanthas kai tribolous adokimos kai kataras engus ēs to telos eis kausin
pepeismetha de peri umōn agapētoi ta kreittona kai echomena sōtērias ei kai outōs laloumen
ou gar adikos o theos epilathesthai tou ergou umōn kai tou kopou tēs agapēs ēs endeixasthe eis to onoma autou diakonēsantes tois agiois kai diakonountes
outos gar o melchisedek basileus salēm iereus tou theou tou upsistou o sunantēsas abraam upostrephonti apo tēs kopēs tōn basileōn kai eulogēsas auton
ō kai dekatēn apo pantōn emerisen abraam prōton men ermēneuomenos basileus dikaiosunēs epeita de kai basileus salēm o estin basileus eirēnēs
apatōr amētōr agenealogētos mēte archēn ēmerōn mēte zōēs telos echōn aphōmoiōmenos de tō uiō tou theou menei iereus eis to diēnekes
theōreite de pēlikos outos ō kai dekatēn abraam edōken ek tōn akrothiniōn o patriarchēs
kai oi men ek tōn uiōn leui tēn ierateian lambanontes entolēn echousin apodekatoun ton laon kata ton nomon tout estin tous adelphous autōn kaiper exelēluthotas ek tēs osphuos abraam
o de mē genealogoumenos ex autōn dedekatōken ton abraam kai ton echonta tas epangelias eulogēken
chōris de pasēs antilogias to elatton upo tou kreittonos eulogeitai
kai ōde men dekatas apothnēskontes anthrōpoi lambanousin ekei de marturoumenos oti zē
kai ōs epos eipein dia abraam kai leui o dekatas lambanōn dedekatōtai
eti gar en tē osphui tou patros ēn ote sunēntēsen autō o melchisedek
ei men oun teleiōsis dia tēs leuitikēs ierōsunēs ēn o laos gar ep autē nenomothetēto tis eti chreia kata tēn taxin melchisedek eteron anistasthai ierea kai ou kata tēn taxin aarōn legesthai
metatithemenēs gar tēs ierōsunēs ex anankēs kai nomou metathesis ginetai
eph on gar legetai tauta phulēs eteras meteschēken aph ēs oudeis proseschēken tō thusiastēriō
prodēlon gar oti ex iouda anatetalken o kurios ēmōn eis ēn phulēn ouden peri ierōsunēs mōsēs elalēsen
kai perissoteron eti katadēlon estin ei kata tēn omoiotēta melchisedek anistatai iereus eteros
os ou kata nomon entolēs sarkikēs gegonen alla kata dunamin zōēs akatalutou
marturei gar oti su iereus eis ton aiōna kata tēn taxin melchisedek
kephalaion de epi tois legomenois toiouton echomen archierea os ekathisen en dexia tou thronou tēs megalōsunēs en tois ouranois
tōn agiōn leitourgos kai tēs skēnēs tēs alēthinēs ēn epēxen o kurios kai ouk anthrōpos
pas gar archiereus eis to prospherein dōra te kai thusias kathistatai othen anankaion echein ti kai touton o prosenenkē
ei men gar ēn epi gēs oud an ēn iereus ontōn tōn iereōn tōn prospherontōn kata ton nomon ta dōra
oitines upodeigmati kai skia latreuousin tōn epouraniōn kathōs kechrēmatistai mōsēs mellōn epitelein tēn skēnēn ora gar phēsin poiēsēs panta kata ton tupon ton deichthenta soi en tō orei
nuni de diaphorōteras teteuchen leitourgias osō kai kreittonos estin diathēkēs mesitēs ētis epi kreittosin epangeliais nenomothetētai
ei gar ē prōtē ekeinē ēn amemptos ouk an deuteras ezēteito topos
memphomenos gar autois legei idou ēmerai erchontai legei kurios kai suntelesō epi ton oikon israēl kai epi ton oikon iouda diathēkēn kainēn

ou kata tēn diathēkēn ēn epoiēsa tois patrasin autōn en ēmera epilabomenou mou tēs cheiros autōn exagagein autous ek gēs aiguptou oti autoi ouk enemeinan en tē diathēkē mou kagō ēmelēsa autōn legei kurios
eichen men oun kai ē prōtē dikaiōmata latreias to te agion kosmikon
skēnē gar kateskeuasthē ē prōtē en ē ē te luchnia kai ē trapeza kai ē prothesis tōn artōn ētis legetai agia
meta de to deuteron katapetasma skēnē ē legomenē agia agiōn
chrusoun echousa thumiatērion kai tēn kibōton tēs diathēkēs perikekalummenēn pantothen chrusiō en ē stamnos chrusē echousa to manna kai ē rabdos aarōn ē blastēsasa kai ai plakes tēs diathēkēs
uperanō de autēs cheroubim doxēs kataskiazonta to ilastērion peri ōn ouk estin nun legein kata meros
toutōn de outōs kateskeuasmenōn eis men tēn prōtēn skēnēn diapantos eisiasin oi iereis tas latreias epitelountes
eis de tēn deuteran apax tou eniautou monos o archiereus ou chōris aimatos o prospherei uper eautou kai tōn tou laou agnoēmatōn
touto dēlountos tou pneumatos tou agiou mēpō pephanerōsthai tēn tōn agiōn odon eti tēs prōtēs skēnēs echousēs stasin
ētis parabolē eis ton kairon ton enestēkota kath on dōra te kai thusiai prospherontai mē dunamenai kata suneidēsin teleiōsai ton latreuonta
monon epi brōmasin kai pomasin kai diaphorois baptismois kai dikaiōmasin sarkos mechri kairou diorthōseōs epikeimena
christos de paragenomenos archiereus tōn mellontōn agathōn dia tēs meizonos kai teleioteras skēnēs ou cheiropoiētou tout estin ou tautēs tēs ktiseōs
oude di aimatos tragōn kai moschōn dia de tou idiou aimatos eisēlthen ephapax eis ta agia aiōnian lutrōsin euramenos
ei gar to aima taurōn kai tragōn kai spodos damaleōs rantizousa tous kekoinōmenous agiazei pros tēn tēs sarkos katharotēta
posō mallon to aima tou christou os dia pneumatos aiōniou eauton prosēnenken amōmon tō theō kathariei tēn suneidēsin umōn apo nekrōn ergōn eis to latreuein theō zōnti
kai dia touto diathēkēs kainēs mesitēs estin opōs thanatou genomenou eis apolutrōsin tōn epi tē prōtē diathēkē parabaseōn tēn epangelian labōsin oi keklēmenoi tēs aiōniou klēronomias
opou gar diathēkē thanaton anankē pheresthai tou diathemenou
diathēkē gar epi nekrois bebaia epei mēpote ischuei ote zē o diathemenos
othen oud ē prōtē chōris aimatos enkekainistai
lalētheisēs gar pasēs entolēs kata nomon upo mōuseōs panti tō laō labōn to aima tōn moschōn kai tragōn meta udatos kai eriou kokkinou kai ussōpou auto te to biblion kai panta ton laon errantisen
legōn touto to aima tēs diathēkēs ēs eneteilato pros umas o theos
skian gar echōn o nomos tōn mellontōn agathōn ouk autēn tēn eikona tōn pragmatōn kat eniauton tais autais thusiais as prospherousin eis to diēnekes oudepote dunatai tous proserchomenous teleiōsai
epei ouk an epausanto prospheromenai dia to mēdemian echein eti suneidēsin amartiōn tous latreuontas apax kekatharmenous
all en autais anamnēsis amartiōn kat eniauton
adunaton gar aima taurōn kai tragōn aphairein amartias
dio eiserchomenos eis ton kosmon legei thusian kai prosphoran ouk ēthelēsas sōma de katērtisō moi
olokautōmata kai peri amartias ouk eudokēsas
tote eipon idou ēkō en kephalidi bibliou gegraptai peri emou tou poiēsai o theos to thelēma sou
anōteron legōn oti thusian kai prosphoran kai olokautōmata kai peri amartias ouk ēthelēsas oude eudokēsas aitines kata ton nomon prospherontai
tote eirēken idou ēkō tou poiēsai o theos to thelēma sou anairei to prōton ina to deuteron stēsē
en ō thelēmati ēgiasmenoi esmen dia tēs prosphoras tou sōmatos tou iēsou christou ephapax
kai pas men iereus estēken kath ēmeran leitourgōn kai tas autas pollakis prospherōn thusias aitines oudepote dunantai perielein amartias
autos de mian uper amartiōn prosenenkas thusian eis to diēnekes ekathisen en dexia tou theou
to loipon ekdechomenos eōs tethōsin oi echthroi autou upopodion tōn podōn autou
mia gar prosphora teteleiōken eis to diēnekes tous agiazomenous
marturei de ēmin kai to pneuma to agion meta gar to proeirēkenai
autē ē diathēkē ēn diathēsomai pros autous meta tas ēmeras ekeinas legei kurios didous nomous mou epi kardias autōn kai epi tōn dianoiōn autōn epigrapsō autous
kai tōn amartiōn autōn kai tōn anomiōn autōn ou mē mnēsthō eti
opou de aphesis toutōn ouketi prosphora peri amartias
estin de pistis elpizomenōn upostasis pragmatōn elenchos ou blepomenōn
en tautē gar emarturēthēsan oi presbuteroi
pistei nooumen katērtisthai tous aiōnas rēmati theou eis to mē ek phainomenōn ta blepomena gegonenai
pistei pleiona thusian abel para kain prosēnenken tō theō di ēs emarturēthē einai dikaios marturountos epi tois dōrois autou tou theou kai di autēs apothanōn eti lalei
pistei enōch metetethē tou mē idein thanaton kai ouch eurisketo dioti metethēken auton o theos pro gar tēs metatheseōs autou memarturētai euērestēkenai tō theō
chōris de pisteōs adunaton euarestēsai pisteusai gar dei ton proserchomenon tō theō oti estin kai tois ekzētousin auton misthapodotēs ginetai
pistei chrēmatistheis nōe peri tōn mēdepō blepomenōn eulabētheis kateskeuasen kibōton eis sōtērian tou oikou autou di ēs katekrinen ton kosmon kai tēs kata pistin dikaiosunēs egeneto klēronomos
toigaroun kai ēmeis tosouton echontes perikeimenon ēmin nephos marturōn onkon apothemenoi panta kai tēn euperistaton amartian di upomonēs trechōmen ton prokeimenon ēmin agōna
aphorōntes eis ton tēs pisteōs archēgon kai teleiōtēn iēsoun os anti tēs prokeimenēs autō charas upemeinen stauron aischunēs kataphronēsas en dexia te tou thronou tou theou ekathisen
analogisasthe gar ton toiautēn upomemenēkota upo tōn amartōlōn eis auton antilogian ina mē kamēte tais psuchais umōn ekluomenoi
oupō mechris aimatos antikatestēte pros tēn amartian antagōnizomenoi
kai eklelēsthe tēs paraklēseōs ētis umin ōs uiois dialegetai uie mou mē oligōrei paideias kuriou mēde ekluou up autou elenchomenos
on gar agapa kurios paideuei mastigoi de panta uion on paradechetai
ei paideian upomenete ōs uiois umin prospheretai o theos tis gar estin uios on ou paideuei patēr
ei de chōris este paideias ēs metochoi gegonasin pantes ara nothoi este kai ouch uioi
tēs philoxenias mē epilanthanesthe dia tautēs gar elathon tines xenisantes angelous
mimnēskesthe tōn desmiōn ōs sundedemenoi tōn kakouchoumenōn ōs kai autoi ontes en sōmati
timios o gamos en pasin kai ē koitē amiantos pornous de kai moichous krinei o theos
aphilarguros o tropos arkoumenoi tois parousin autos gar eirēken ou mē se anō oud ou mē se enkatalipō
ōste tharrountas ēmas legein kurios emoi boēthos kai ou phobēthēsomai ti poiēsei moi anthrōpos

name: ΙΑΚΩΒΟΥ
chapters: iakōbos theou kai kuriou iēsou christou doulos tais dōdeka phulais tais en tē diaspora chairein
pasan charan ēgēsasthe adelphoi mou otan peirasmois peripesēte poikilois
ginōskontes oti to dokimion umōn tēs pisteōs katergazetai upomonēn
ē de upomonē ergon teleion echetō ina ēte teleioi kai oloklēroi en mēdeni leipomenoi
ei de tis umōn leipetai sophias aiteitō para tou didontos theou pasin aplōs kai mē oneidizontos kai dothēsetai autō
aiteitō de en pistei mēden diakrinomenos o gar diakrinomenos eoiken kludōni thalassēs anemizomenō kai ripizomenō
mē gar oiesthō o anthrōpos ekeinos oti lēpsetai ti para tou kuriou
anēr dipsuchos akatastatos en pasais tais odois autou
kauchasthō de o adelphos o tapeinos en tō upsei autou
o de plousios en tē tapeinōsei autou oti ōs anthos chortou pareleusetai
aneteilen gar o ēlios sun tō kausōni kai exēranen ton chorton kai to anthos autou exepesen kai ē euprepeia tou prosōpou autou apōleto outōs kai o plousios en tais poreiais autou maranthēsetai
makarios anēr os upomenei peirasmon oti dokimos genomenos lēpsetai ton stephanon tēs zōēs on epēngeilato o kurios tois agapōsin auton
mēdeis peirazomenos legetō oti apo tou theou peirazomai o gar theos apeirastos estin kakōn peirazei de autos oudena
ekastos de peirazetai upo tēs idias epithumias exelkomenos kai deleazomenos
eita ē epithumia sullabousa tiktei amartian ē de amartia apotelestheisa apokuei thanaton
pasa dosis agathē kai pan dōrēma teleion anōthen estin katabainon apo tou patros tōn phōtōn par ō ouk eni parallagē ē tropēs aposkiasma
boulētheis apekuēsen ēmas logō alētheias eis to einai ēmas aparchēn tina tōn autou ktismatōn
ōste adelphoi mou agapētoi estō pas anthrōpos tachus eis to akousai bradus eis to lalēsai bradus eis orgēn
orgē gar andros dikaiosunēn theou ou katergazetai
dio apothemenoi pasan ruparian kai perisseian kakias en prautēti dexasthe ton emphuton logon ton dunamenon sōsai tas psuchas umōn
ginesthe de poiētai logou kai mē monon akroatai paralogizomenoi eautous
oti ei tis akroatēs logou estin kai ou poiētēs outos eoiken andri katanoounti to prosōpon tēs geneseōs autou en esoptrō
katenoēsen gar eauton kai apelēluthen kai eutheōs epelatheto opoios ēn
o de parakupsas eis nomon teleion ton tēs eleutherias kai parameinas outos ouk akroatēs epilēsmonēs genomenos alla poiētēs ergou outos makarios en tē poiēsei autou estai
ei tis dokei thrēskos einai en umin mē chalinagōgōn glōssan autou all apatōn kardian autou toutou mataios ē thrēskeia
thrēskeia kathara kai amiantos para tō theō kai patri autē estin episkeptesthai orphanous kai chēras en tē thlipsei autōn aspilon eauton tērein apo tou kosmou
adelphoi mou mē en prosōpolēpsiais echete tēn pistin tou kuriou ēmōn iēsou christou tēs doxēs
ean gar eiselthē eis tēn sunagōgēn umōn anēr chrusodaktulios en esthēti lampra eiselthē de kai ptōchos en rupara esthēti
kai epiblepsēte epi ton phorounta tēn esthēta tēn lampran kai eipēte autō su kathou ōde kalōs kai tō ptōchō eipēte su stēthi ekei ē kathou ōde upo to upopodion mou
kai ou diekrithēte en eautois kai egenesthe kritai dialogismōn ponērōn
akousate adelphoi mou agapētoi ouch o theos exelexato tous ptōchous tou kosmou toutou plousious en pistei kai klēronomous tēs basileias ēs epēngeilato tois agapōsin auton
umeis de ētimasate ton ptōchon ouch oi plousioi katadunasteuousin umōn kai autoi elkousin umas eis kritēria
ouk autoi blasphēmousin to kalon onoma to epiklēthen eph umas
ei mentoi nomon teleite basilikon kata tēn graphēn agapēseis ton plēsion sou ōs seauton kalōs poieite
ei de prosōpolēpteite amartian ergazesthe elenchomenoi upo tou nomou ōs parabatai
ostis gar olon ton nomon tērēsei ptaisei de en eni gegonen pantōn enochos
o gar eipōn mē moicheusēs eipen kai mē phoneusēs ei de ou moicheuseis phoneuseis de gegonas parabatēs nomou
outōs laleite kai outōs poieite ōs dia nomou eleutherias mellontes krinesthai
ē gar krisis anileōs tō mē poiēsanti eleos kai katakauchatai eleos kriseōs
ti to ophelos adelphoi mou ean pistin legē tis echein erga de mē echē mē dunatai ē pistis sōsai auton
ean de adelphos ē adelphē gumnoi uparchōsin kai leipomenoi ōsin tēs ephēmerou trophēs
eipē de tis autois ex umōn upagete en eirēnē thermainesthe kai chortazesthe mē dōte de autois ta epitēdeia tou sōmatos ti to ophelos
outōs kai ē pistis ean mē erga echē nekra estin kath eautēn
all erei tis su pistin echeis kagō erga echō deixon moi tēn pistin sou chōris tōn ergōn sou kagō deixō soi ek tōn ergōn mou tēn pistin mou
su pisteueis oti o theos eis estin kalōs poieis kai ta daimonia pisteuousin kai phrissousin
theleis de gnōnai ō anthrōpe kene oti ē pistis chōris tōn ergōn nekra estin
abraam o patēr ēmōn ouk ex ergōn edikaiōthē anenenkas isaak ton uion autou epi to thusiastērion
blepeis oti ē pistis sunērgei tois ergois autou kai ek tōn ergōn ē pistis eteleiōthē
mē polloi didaskaloi ginesthe adelphoi mou eidotes oti meizon krima lēpsometha
polla gar ptaiomen apantes ei tis en logō ou ptaiei outos teleios anēr dunatos chalinagōgēsai kai olon to sōma
idou tōn ippōn tous chalinous eis ta stomata ballomen pros to peithesthai autous ēmin kai olon to sōma autōn metagomen
idou kai ta ploia tēlikauta onta kai upo sklērōn anemōn elaunomena metagetai upo elachistou pēdaliou opou an ē ormē tou euthunontos boulētai
outōs kai ē glōssa mikron melos estin kai megalauchei idou oligon pur ēlikēn ulēn anaptei
kai ē glōssa pur o kosmos tēs adikias outōs ē glōssa kathistatai en tois melesin ēmōn ē spilousa olon to sōma kai phlogizousa ton trochon tēs geneseōs kai phlogizomenē upo tēs geennēs
pasa gar phusis thēriōn te kai peteinōn erpetōn te kai enaliōn damazetai kai dedamastai tē phusei tē anthrōpinē
tēn de glōssan oudeis dunatai anthrōpōn damasai akatascheton kakon mestē iou thanatēphorou
en autē eulogoumen ton theon kai patera kai en autē katarōmetha tous anthrōpous tous kath omoiōsin theou gegonotas
ek tou autou stomatos exerchetai eulogia kai katara ou chrē adelphoi mou tauta outōs ginesthai
mēti ē pēgē ek tēs autēs opēs bruei to gluku kai to pikron
mē dunatai adelphoi mou sukē elaias poiēsai ē ampelos suka outōs oudemia pēgē alukon kai gluku poiēsai udōr
tis sophos kai epistēmōn en umin deixatō ek tēs kalēs anastrophēs ta erga autou en prautēti sophias
ei de zēlon pikron echete kai eritheian en tē kardia umōn mē katakauchasthe kai pseudesthe kata tēs alētheias
ouk estin autē ē sophia anōthen katerchomenē all epigeios psuchikē daimoniōdēs
opou gar zēlos kai eritheia ekei akatastasia kai pan phaulon pragma
ē de anōthen sophia prōton men agnē estin epeita eirēnikē epieikēs eupeithēs mestē eleous kai karpōn agathōn adiakritos kai anupokritos
karpos de tēs dikaiosunēs en eirēnē speiretai tois poiousin eirēnēn
pothen polemoi kai machai en umin ouk enteuthen ek tōn ēdonōn umōn tōn strateuomenōn en tois melesin umōn
epithumeite kai ouk echete phoneuete kai zēloute kai ou dunasthe epituchein machesthe kai polemeite ouk echete de dia to mē aiteisthai umas
aiteite kai ou lambanete dioti kakōs aiteisthe ina en tais ēdonais umōn dapanēsēte
moichoi kai moichalides ouk oidate oti ē philia tou kosmou echthra tou theou estin os an oun boulēthē philos einai tou kosmou echthros tou theou kathistatai
ē dokeite oti kenōs ē graphē legei pros phthonon epipothei to pneuma o katōkēsen en ēmin
meizona de didōsin charin dio legei o theos uperēphanois antitassetai tapeinois de didōsin charin
upotagēte oun tō theō antistēte tō diabolō kai pheuxetai aph umōn
engisate tō theō kai engiei umin katharisate cheiras amartōloi kai agnisate kardias dipsuchoi
talaipōrēsate kai penthēsate kai klausate o gelōs umōn eis penthos metastraphētō kai ē chara eis katēpheian
tapeinōthēte enōpion tou kuriou kai upsōsei umas
mē katalaleite allēlōn adelphoi o katalalōn adelphou kai krinōn ton adelphon autou katalalei nomou kai krinei nomon ei de nomon krineis ouk ei poiētēs nomou alla kritēs
eis estin o nomothetēs o dunamenos sōsai kai apolesai su tis ei os krineis ton eteron
age nun oi legontes sēmeron ē aurion poreusōmetha eis tēnde tēn polin kai poiēsomen ekei eniauton ena kai emporeusometha kai kerdēsomen
oitines ouk epistasthe to tēs aurion poia gar ē zōē umōn atmis gar estin ē pros oligon phainomenē epeita de aphanizomenē
anti tou legein umas ean o kurios thelēsē kai zēsomen kai poiēsomen touto ē ekeino
nun de kauchasthe en tais alazoneiais umōn pasa kauchēsis toiautē ponēra estin
eidoti oun kalon poiein kai mē poiounti amartia autō estin
age nun oi plousioi klausate ololuzontes epi tais talaipōriais umōn tais eperchomenais
o ploutos umōn sesēpen kai ta imatia umōn sētobrōta gegonen
o chrusos umōn kai o arguros katiōtai kai o ios autōn eis marturion umin estai kai phagetai tas sarkas umōn ōs pur ethēsaurisate en eschatais ēmerais
idou o misthos tōn ergatōn tōn amēsantōn tas chōras umōn o apesterēmenos aph umōn krazei kai ai boai tōn therisantōn eis ta ōta kuriou sabaōth eiselēluthasin
etruphēsate epi tēs gēs kai espatalēsate ethrepsate tas kardias umōn ōs en ēmera sphagēs
katedikasate ephoneusate ton dikaion ouk antitassetai umin
makrothumēsate oun adelphoi eōs tēs parousias tou kuriou idou o geōrgos ekdechetai ton timion karpon tēs gēs makrothumōn ep autō eōs an labē ueton prōimon kai opsimon
makrothumēsate kai umeis stērixate tas kardias umōn oti ē parousia tou kuriou ēngiken
mē stenazete kat allēlōn adelphoi ina mē katakrithēte idou o kritēs pro tōn thurōn estēken
upodeigma labete tēs kakopatheias adelphoi mou kai tēs makrothumias tous prophētas oi elalēsan tō onomati kuriou
idou makarizomen tous upomenontas tēn upomonēn iōb ēkousate kai to telos kuriou eidete oti polusplanchnos estin o kurios kai oiktirmōn
pro pantōn de adelphoi mou mē omnuete mēte ton ouranon mēte tēn gēn mēte allon tina orkon ētō de umōn to nai nai kai to ou ou ina mē upo krisin pesēte
kakopathei tis en umin proseuchesthō euthumei tis psalletō
asthenei tis en umin proskalesasthō tous presbuterous tēs ekklēsias kai proseuxasthōsan ep auton aleipsantes auton elaiō en tō onomati tou kuriou
kai ē euchē tēs pisteōs sōsei ton kamnonta kai egerei auton o kurios kan amartias ē pepoiēkōs aphethēsetai autō
exomologeisthe allēlois ta paraptōmata kai euchesthe uper allēlōn opōs iathēte polu ischuei deēsis dikaiou energoumenē
ēlias anthrōpos ēn omoiopathēs ēmin kai proseuchē prosēuxato tou mē brexai kai ouk ebrexen epi tēs gēs eniautous treis kai mēnas ex
kai palin prosēuxato kai o ouranos ueton edōken kai ē gē eblastēsen ton karpon autēs
adelphoi ean tis en umin planēthē apo tēs alētheias kai epistrepsē tis auton
ginōsketō oti o epistrepsas amartōlon ek planēs odou autou sōsei psuchēn ek thanatou kai kalupsei plēthos amartiōn

name: ΠΕΤΡΟΥ Α΄
chapters: petros apostolos iēsou christou eklektois parepidēmois diasporas pontou galatias kappadokias asias kai bithunias
kata prognōsin theou patros en agiasmō pneumatos eis upakoēn kai rantismon aimatos iēsou christou charis umin kai eirēnē plēthuntheiē
eulogētos o theos kai patēr tou kuriou ēmōn iēsou christou o kata to polu autou eleos anagennēsas ēmas eis elpida zōsan di anastaseōs iēsou christou ek nekrōn
eis klēronomian aphtharton kai amianton kai amaranton tetērēmenēn en ouranois eis umas
tous en dunamei theou phrouroumenous dia pisteōs eis sōtērian etoimēn apokaluphthēnai en kairō eschatō
en ō agalliasthe oligon arti ei deon estin lupēthentes en poikilois peirasmois
ina to dokimion umōn tēs pisteōs polu timiōteron chrusiou tou apollumenou dia puros de dokimazomenou eurethē eis epainon kai timēn kai doxan en apokalupsei iēsou christou
on ouk idontes agapate eis on arti mē orōntes pisteuontes de agalliasthe chara aneklalētō kai dedoxasmenē
komizomenoi to telos tēs pisteōs umōn sōtērian psuchōn
peri ēs sōtērias exezētēsan kai exēreunēsan prophētai oi peri tēs eis umas charitos prophēteusantes
ereunōntes eis tina ē poion kairon edēlou to en autois pneuma christou promarturomenon ta eis christon pathēmata kai tas meta tauta doxas
ois apekaluphthē oti ouch eautois ēmin de diēkonoun auta a nun anēngelē umin dia tōn euangelisamenōn umas en pneumati agiō apostalenti ap ouranou eis a epithumousin angeloi parakupsai
dio anazōsamenoi tas osphuas tēs dianoias umōn nēphontes teleiōs elpisate epi tēn pheromenēn umin charin en apokalupsei iēsou christou
ōs tekna upakoēs mē suschēmatizomenoi tais proteron en tē agnoia umōn epithumiais
alla kata ton kalesanta umas agion kai autoi agioi en pasē anastrophē genēthēte
dioti gegraptai agioi genesthe oti egō agios eimi
kai ei patera epikaleisthe ton aprosōpolēptōs krinonta kata to ekastou ergon en phobō ton tēs paroikias umōn chronon anastraphēte
eidotes oti ou phthartois arguriō ē chrusiō elutrōthēte ek tēs mataias umōn anastrophēs patroparadotou
apothemenoi oun pasan kakian kai panta dolon kai upokriseis kai phthonous kai pasas katalalias
ōs artigennēta brephē to logikon adolon gala epipothēsate ina en autō auxēthēte
eiper egeusasthe oti chrēstos o kurios
pros on proserchomenoi lithon zōnta upo anthrōpōn men apodedokimasmenon para de theō eklekton entimon
kai autoi ōs lithoi zōntes oikodomeisthe oikos pneumatikos ierateuma agion anenenkai pneumatikas thusias euprosdektous tō theō dia iēsou christou
dio kai periechei en tē graphē idou tithēmi en siōn lithon akrogōniaion eklekton entimon kai o pisteuōn ep autō ou mē kataischunthē
umin oun ē timē tois pisteuousin apeithousin de lithon on apedokimasan oi oikodomountes outos egenēthē eis kephalēn gōnias
kai lithos proskommatos kai petra skandalou oi proskoptousin tō logō apeithountes eis o kai etethēsan
umeis de genos eklekton basileion ierateuma ethnos agion laos eis peripoiēsin opōs tas aretas exangeilēte tou ek skotous umas kalesantos eis to thaumaston autou phōs
oi pote ou laos nun de laos theou oi ouk ēleēmenoi nun de eleēthentes
agapētoi parakalō ōs paroikous kai parepidēmous apechesthai tōn sarkikōn epithumiōn aitines strateuontai kata tēs psuchēs
tēn anastrophēn umōn en tois ethnesin echontes kalēn ina en ō katalalousin umōn ōs kakopoiōn ek tōn kalōn ergōn epopteusantes doxasōsin ton theon en ēmera episkopēs
upotagēte oun pasē anthrōpinē ktisei dia ton kurion eite basilei ōs uperechonti
eite ēgemosin ōs di autou pempomenois eis ekdikēsin men kakopoiōn epainon de agathopoiōn
oti outōs estin to thelēma tou theou agathopoiountas phimoun tēn tōn aphronōn anthrōpōn agnōsian
ōs eleutheroi kai mē ōs epikalumma echontes tēs kakias tēn eleutherian all ōs douloi theou
pantas timēsate tēn adelphotēta agapate ton theon phobeisthe ton basilea timate
oi oiketai upotassomenoi en panti phobō tois despotais ou monon tois agathois kai epieikesin alla kai tois skoliois
touto gar charis ei dia suneidēsin theou upopherei tis lupas paschōn adikōs
poion gar kleos ei amartanontes kai kolaphizomenoi upomeneite all ei agathopoiountes kai paschontes upomeneite touto charis para theō
eis touto gar eklēthēte oti kai christos epathen uper ēmōn ēmin upolimpanōn upogrammon ina epakolouthēsēte tois ichnesin autou
os amartian ouk epoiēsen oude eurethē dolos en tō stomati autou
os loidoroumenos ouk anteloidorei paschōn ouk ēpeilei paredidou de tō krinonti dikaiōs
os tas amartias ēmōn autos anēnenken en tō sōmati autou epi to xulon ina tais amartiais apogenomenoi tē dikaiosunē zēsōmen ou tō mōlōpi autou iathēte
ēte gar ōs probata planōmena all epestraphēte nun epi ton poimena kai episkopon tōn psuchōn umōn
omoiōs ai gunaikes upotassomenai tois idiois andrasin ina kai ei tines apeithousin tō logō dia tēs tōn gunaikōn anastrophēs aneu logou kerdēthēsōntai
epopteusantes tēn en phobō agnēn anastrophēn umōn
ōn estō ouch o exōthen emplokēs trichōn kai peritheseōs chrusiōn ē enduseōs imatiōn kosmos
all o kruptos tēs kardias anthrōpos en tō aphthartō tou praeos kai ēsuchiou pneumatos o estin enōpion tou theou poluteles
outōs gar pote kai ai agiai gunaikes ai elpizousai epi ton theon ekosmoun eautas upotassomenai tois idiois andrasin
ōs sarra upēkousen tō abraam kurion auton kalousa ēs egenēthēte tekna agathopoiousai kai mē phoboumenai mēdemian ptoēsin
oi andres omoiōs sunoikountes kata gnōsin ōs asthenesterō skeuei tō gunaikeiō aponemontes timēn ōs kai sunklēronomoi charitos zōēs eis to mē ekkoptesthai tas proseuchas umōn
to de telos pantes omophrones sumpatheis philadelphoi eusplanchnoi philophrones
mē apodidontes kakon anti kakou ē loidorian anti loidorias tounantion de eulogountes eidotes oti eis touto eklēthēte ina eulogian klēronomēsēte
o gar thelōn zōēn agapan kai idein ēmeras agathas pausatō tēn glōssan autou apo kakou kai cheilē autou tou mē lalēsai dolon
ekklinatō apo kakou kai poiēsatō agathon zētēsatō eirēnēn kai diōxatō autēn
oti oi ophthalmoi kuriou epi dikaious kai ōta autou eis deēsin autōn prosōpon de kuriou epi poiountas kaka
kai tis o kakōsōn umas ean tou agathou mimētai genēsthe
all ei kai paschoite dia dikaiosunēn makarioi ton de phobon autōn mē phobēthēte mēde tarachthēte
kurion de ton theon agiasate en tais kardiais umōn etoimoi de aei pros apologian panti tō aitounti umas logon peri tēs en umin elpidos meta prautētos kai phobou
suneidēsin echontes agathēn ina en ō katalalōsin umōn ōs kakopoiōn kataischunthōsin oi epēreazontes umōn tēn agathēn en christō anastrophēn
kreitton gar agathopoiountas ei thelei to thelēma tou theou paschein ē kakopoiountas
oti kai christos apax peri amartiōn epathen dikaios uper adikōn ina ēmas prosagagē tō theō thanatōtheis men sarki zōopoiētheis de tō pneumati
en ō kai tois en phulakē pneumasin poreutheis ekēruxen
apeithēsasin pote ote apax exedecheto ē tou theou makrothumia en ēmerais nōe kataskeuazomenēs kibōtou eis ēn oligai tout estin oktō psuchai diesōthēsan di udatos
ō kai ēmas antitupon nun sōzei baptisma ou sarkos apothesis rupou alla suneidēseōs agathēs eperōtēma eis theon di anastaseōs iēsou christou
os estin en dexia tou theou poreutheis eis ouranon upotagentōn autō angelōn kai exousiōn kai dunameōn
christou oun pathontos uper ēmōn sarki kai umeis tēn autēn ennoian oplisasthe oti o pathōn en sarki pepautai amartias
eis to mēketi anthrōpōn epithumiais alla thelēmati theou ton epiloipon en sarki biōsai chronon
arketos gar ēmin o parelēluthōs chronos tou biou to thelēma tōn ethnōn katergasasthai peporeumenous en aselgeiais epithumiais oinophlugiais kōmois potois kai athemitois eidōlolatreiais
en ō xenizontai mē suntrechontōn umōn eis tēn autēn tēs asōtias anachusin blasphēmountes
oi apodōsousin logon tō etoimōs echonti krinai zōntas kai nekrous
eis touto gar kai nekrois euēngelisthē ina krithōsin men kata anthrōpous sarki zōsin de kata theon pneumati
pantōn de to telos ēngiken sōphronēsate oun kai nēpsate eis tas proseuchas
pro pantōn de tēn eis eautous agapēn ektenē echontes oti ē agapē kalupsei plēthos amartiōn
ekastos kathōs elaben charisma eis eautous auto diakonountes ōs kaloi oikonomoi poikilēs charitos theou
ei tis lalei ōs logia theou ei tis diakonei ōs ex ischuos ēs chorēgei o theos ina en pasin doxazētai o theos dia iēsou christou ō estin ē doxa kai to kratos eis tous aiōnas tōn aiōnōn amēn
agapētoi mē xenizesthe tē en umin purōsei pros peirasmon umin ginomenē ōs xenou umin sumbainontos
alla katho koinōneite tois tou christou pathēmasin chairete ina kai en tē apokalupsei tēs doxēs autou charēte agalliōmenoi
ei oneidizesthe en onomati christou makarioi oti to tēs doxēs kai to tou theou pneuma eph umas anapauetai kata men autous blasphēmeitai kata de umas doxazetai
mē gar tis umōn paschetō ōs phoneus ē kleptēs ē kakopoios ē ōs allotrioepiskopos
ei de ōs christianos mē aischunesthō doxazetō de ton theon en tō merei toutō
presbuterous tous en umin parakalō o sumpresbuteros kai martus tōn tou christou pathēmatōn o kai tēs mellousēs apokaluptesthai doxēs koinōnos
poimanate to en umin poimnion tou theou episkopountes mē anankastōs all ekousiōs mēde aischrokerdōs alla prothumōs
mēd ōs katakurieuontes tōn klērōn alla tupoi ginomenoi tou poimniou
kai phanerōthentos tou archipoimenos komieisthe ton amarantinon tēs doxēs stephanon
omoiōs neōteroi upotagēte presbuterois pantes de allēlois upotassomenoi tēn tapeinophrosunēn enkombōsasthe oti o theos uperēphanois antitassetai tapeinois de didōsin charin
tapeinōthēte oun upo tēn krataian cheira tou theou ina umas upsōsē en kairō
pasan tēn merimnan umōn epirripsantes ep auton oti autō melei peri umōn
nēpsate grēgorēsate oti o antidikos umōn diabolos ōs leōn ōruomenos peripatei zētōn tina katapiē
ō antistēte stereoi tē pistei eidotes ta auta tōn pathēmatōn tē en kosmō umōn adelphotēti epiteleisthai
o de theos pasēs charitos o kalesas ēmas eis tēn aiōnion autou doxan en christō iēsou oligon pathontas autos katartisai umas stērixai sthenōsai themeliōsai
autō ē doxa kai to kratos eis tous aiōnas tōn aiōnōn amēn
dia silouanou umin tou pistou adelphou ōs logizomai di oligōn egrapsa parakalōn kai epimarturōn tautēn einai alēthē charin tou theou eis ēn estēkate
aspazetai umas ē en babulōni suneklektē kai markos o uios mou
aspasasthe allēlous en philēmati agapēs eirēnē umin pasin tois en christō iēsou amēn

name: ΠΕΤΡΟΥ Β΄
chapters: simōn petros doulos kai apostolos iēsou christou tois isotimon ēmin lachousin pistin en dikaiosunē tou theou ēmōn kai sōtēros ēmōn iēsou christou
charis umin kai eirēnē plēthuntheiē en epignōsei tou theou kai iēsou tou kuriou ēmōn
ōs panta ēmin tēs theias dunameōs autou ta pros zōēn kai eusebeian dedōrēmenēs dia tēs epignōseōs tou kalesantos ēmas dia doxēs kai aretēs
di ōn ta megista ēmin kai timia epangelmata dedōrētai ina dia toutōn genēsthe theias koinōnoi phuseōs apophugontes tēs en kosmō en epithumia phthoras
kai auto touto de spoudēn pasan pareisenenkantes epichorēgēsate en tē pistei umōn tēn aretēn en de tē aretē tēn gnōsin
en de tē gnōsei tēn enkrateian en de tē enkrateia tēn upomonēn en de tē upomonē tēn eusebeian
en de tē eusebeia tēn philadelphian en de tē philadelphia tēn agapēn
tauta gar umin uparchonta kai pleonazonta ouk argous oude akarpous kathistēsin eis tēn tou kuriou ēmōn iēsou christou epignōsin
ō gar mē parestin tauta tuphlos estin muōpazōn lēthēn labōn tou katharismou tōn palai autou amartiōn
dio mallon adelphoi spoudasate bebaian umōn tēn klēsin kai eklogēn poieisthai tauta gar poiountes ou mē ptaisēte pote
outōs gar plousiōs epichorēgēthēsetai umin ē eisodos eis tēn aiōnion basileian tou kuriou ēmōn kai sōtēros iēsou christou
dio ouk amelēsō umas aei upomimnēskein peri toutōn kaiper eidotas kai estērigmenous en tē parousē alētheia
dikaion de ēgoumai eph oson eimi en toutō tō skēnōmati diegeirein umas en upomnēsei
eidōs oti tachinē estin ē apothesis tou skēnōmatos mou kathōs kai o kurios ēmōn iēsous christos edēlōsen moi
spoudasō de kai ekastote echein umas meta tēn emēn exodon tēn toutōn mnēmēn poieisthai
ou gar sesophismenois muthois exakolouthēsantes egnōrisamen umin tēn tou kuriou ēmōn iēsou christou dunamin kai parousian all epoptai genēthentes tēs ekeinou megaleiotētos
labōn gar para theou patros timēn kai doxan phōnēs enechtheisēs autō toiasde upo tēs megaloprepous doxēs outos estin o uios mou o agapētos eis on egō eudokēsa

egenonto de kai pseudoprophētai en tō laō ōs kai en umin esontai pseudodidaskaloi oitines pareisaxousin aireseis apōleias kai ton agorasanta autous despotēn arnoumenoi epagontes eautois tachinēn apōleian
kai polloi exakolouthēsousin autōn tais apōleiais di ous ē odos tēs alētheias blasphēmēthēsetai
kai en pleonexia plastois logois umas emporeusontai ois to krima ekpalai ouk argei kai ē apōleia autōn ou nustazei
ei gar o theos angelōn amartēsantōn ouk epheisato alla seirais zophou tartarōsas paredōken eis krisin tetērēmenous
kai archaiou kosmou ouk epheisato all ogdoon nōe dikaiosunēs kēruka ephulaxen kataklusmon kosmō asebōn epaxas
kai poleis sodomōn kai gomorras tephrōsas katastrophē katekrinen upodeigma mellontōn asebein tetheikōs
kai dikaion lōt kataponoumenon upo tēs tōn athesmōn en aselgeia anastrophēs errusato
blemmati gar kai akoē o dikaios enkatoikōn en autois ēmeran ex ēmeras psuchēn dikaian anomois ergois ebasanizen
oiden kurios eusebeis ek peirasmōn ruesthai adikous de eis ēmeran kriseōs kolazomenous tērein
malista de tous opisō sarkos en epithumia miasmou poreuomenous kai kuriotētos kataphronountas tolmētai authadeis doxas ou tremousin blasphēmountes
opou angeloi ischui kai dunamei meizones ontes ou pherousin kat autōn para kuriō blasphēmon krisin
outoi de ōs aloga zōa phusika gegenēmena eis alōsin kai phthoran en ois agnoousin blasphēmountes en tē phthora autōn kataphtharēsontai
komioumenoi misthon adikias ēdonēn ēgoumenoi tēn en ēmera truphēn spiloi kai mōmoi entruphōntes en tais apatais autōn suneuōchoumenoi umin
ophthalmous echontes mestous moichalidos kai akatapaustous amartias deleazontes psuchas astēriktous kardian gegumnasmenēn pleonexiais echontes kataras tekna
katalipontes tēn eutheian odon eplanēthēsan exakolouthēsantes tē odō tou balaam tou bosor os misthon adikias ēgapēsen
elegxin de eschen idias paranomias upozugion aphōnon en anthrōpou phōnē phthegxamenon ekōlusen tēn tou prophētou paraphronian
outoi eisin pēgai anudroi nephelai upo lailapos elaunomenai ois o zophos tou skotous eis aiōna tetērētai
tautēn ēdē agapētoi deuteran umin graphō epistolēn en ais diegeirō umōn en upomnēsei tēn eilikrinē dianoian
mnēsthēnai tōn proeirēmenōn rēmatōn upo tōn agiōn prophētōn kai tēs tōn apostolōn ēmōn entolēs tou kuriou kai sōtēros
touto prōton ginōskontes oti eleusontai ep eschatou tōn ēmerōn empaiktai kata tas idias autōn epithumias poreuomenoi
kai legontes pou estin ē epangelia tēs parousias autou aph ēs gar oi pateres ekoimēthēsan panta outōs diamenei ap archēs ktiseōs
lanthanei gar autous touto thelontas oti ouranoi ēsan ekpalai kai gē ex udatos kai di udatos sunestōsa tō tou theou logō
di ōn o tote kosmos udati kataklustheis apōleto
oi de nun ouranoi kai ē gē tō autō logō tethēsaurismenoi eisin puri tēroumenoi eis ēmeran kriseōs kai apōleias tōn asebōn anthrōpōn
en de touto mē lanthanetō umas agapētoi oti mia ēmera para kuriō ōs chilia etē kai chilia etē ōs ēmera mia
ou bradunei o kurios tēs epangelias ōs tines bradutēta ēgountai alla makrothumei eis ēmas mē boulomenos tinas apolesthai alla pantas eis metanoian chōrēsai
ēxei de ē ēmera kuriou ōs kleptēs en nukti en ē oi ouranoi roizēdon pareleusontai stoicheia de kausoumena luthēsontai kai gē kai ta en autē erga katakaēsetai
toutōn oun pantōn luomenōn potapous dei uparchein umas en agiais anastrophais kai eusebeiais

name: ΙΩΑΝΝΟΥ Α΄
chapters: o ēn ap archēs o akēkoamen o eōrakamen tois ophthalmois ēmōn o etheasametha kai ai cheires ēmōn epsēlaphēsan peri tou logou tēs zōēs
kai ē zōē ephanerōthē kai eōrakamen kai marturoumen kai apangellomen umin tēn zōēn tēn aiōnion ētis ēn pros ton patera kai ephanerōthē ēmin
o eōrakamen kai akēkoamen apangellomen umin ina kai umeis koinōnian echēte meth ēmōn kai ē koinōnia de ē ēmetera meta tou patros kai meta tou uiou autou iēsou christou
kai tauta graphomen umin ina ē chara umōn ē peplērōmenē
kai autē estin ē angelia ēn akēkoamen ap autou kai anangellomen umin oti o theos phōs estin kai skotia en autō ouk estin oudemia
ean eipōmen oti koinōnian echomen met autou kai en tō skotei peripatōmen pseudometha kai ou poioumen tēn alētheian
ean de en tō phōti peripatōmen ōs autos estin en tō phōti koinōnian echomen met allēlōn kai to aima iēsou christou tou uiou autou katharizei ēmas apo pasēs amartias
ean eipōmen oti amartian ouk echomen eautous planōmen kai ē alētheia ouk estin en ēmin
ean omologōmen tas amartias ēmōn pistos estin kai dikaios ina aphē ēmin tas amartias kai katharisē ēmas apo pasēs adikias
ean eipōmen oti ouch ēmartēkamen pseustēn poioumen auton kai o logos autou ouk estin en ēmin
teknia mou tauta graphō umin ina mē amartēte kai ean tis amartē paraklēton echomen pros ton patera iēsoun christon dikaion
kai autos ilasmos estin peri tōn amartiōn ēmōn ou peri tōn ēmeterōn de monon alla kai peri olou tou kosmou
kai en toutō ginōskomen oti egnōkamen auton ean tas entolas autou tērōmen
o legōn egnōka auton kai tas entolas autou mē tērōn pseustēs estin kai en toutō ē alētheia ouk estin
os d an tērē autou ton logon alēthōs en toutō ē agapē tou theou teteleiōtai en toutō ginōskomen oti en autō esmen
o legōn en autō menein opheilei kathōs ekeinos periepatēsen kai autos outōs peripatein
adelphoi ouk entolēn kainēn graphō umin all entolēn palaian ēn eichete ap archēs ē entolē ē palaia estin o logos on ēkousate ap archēs
palin entolēn kainēn graphō umin o estin alēthes en autō kai en umin oti ē skotia paragetai kai to phōs to alēthinon ēdē phainei
o legōn en tō phōti einai kai ton adelphon autou misōn en tē skotia estin eōs arti
o agapōn ton adelphon autou en tō phōti menei kai skandalon en autō ouk estin
o de misōn ton adelphon autou en tē skotia estin kai en tē skotia peripatei kai ouk oiden pou upagei oti ē skotia etuphlōsen tous ophthalmous autou
graphō umin teknia oti apheōntai umin ai amartiai dia to onoma autou
graphō umin pateres oti egnōkate ton ap archēs graphō umin neaniskoi oti nenikēkate ton ponēron graphō umin paidia oti egnōkate ton patera
egrapsa umin pateres oti egnōkate ton ap archēs egrapsa umin neaniskoi oti ischuroi este kai o logos tou theou en umin menei kai nenikēkate ton ponēron
mē agapate ton kosmon mēde ta en tō kosmō ean tis agapa ton kosmon ouk estin ē agapē tou patros en autō
oti pan to en tō kosmō ē epithumia tēs sarkos kai ē epithumia tōn ophthalmōn kai ē alazoneia tou biou ouk estin ek tou patros all ek tou kosmou estin
kai o kosmos paragetai kai ē epithumia autou o de poiōn to thelēma tou theou menei eis ton aiōna
paidia eschatē ōra estin kai kathōs ēkousate oti o antichristos erchetai kai nun antichristoi polloi gegonasin othen ginōskomen oti eschatē ōra estin
ex ēmōn exēlthon all ouk ēsan ex ēmōn ei gar ēsan ex ēmōn memenēkeisan an meth ēmōn all ina phanerōthōsin oti ouk eisin pantes ex ēmōn
kai umeis chrisma echete apo tou agiou kai oidate panta
ouk egrapsa umin oti ouk oidate tēn alētheian all oti oidate autēn kai oti pan pseudos ek tēs alētheias ouk estin
tis estin o pseustēs ei mē o arnoumenos oti iēsous ouk estin o christos outos estin o antichristos o arnoumenos ton patera kai ton uion
idete potapēn agapēn dedōken ēmin o patēr ina tekna theou klēthōmen dia touto o kosmos ou ginōskei ēmas oti ouk egnō auton
agapētoi nun tekna theou esmen kai oupō ephanerōthē ti esometha oidamen de oti ean phanerōthē omoioi autō esometha oti opsometha auton kathōs estin
kai pas o echōn tēn elpida tautēn ep autō agnizei eauton kathōs ekeinos agnos estin
pas o poiōn tēn amartian kai tēn anomian poiei kai ē amartia estin ē anomia
kai oidate oti ekeinos ephanerōthē ina tas amartias ēmōn arē kai amartia en autō ouk estin
pas o en autō menōn ouch amartanei pas o amartanōn ouch eōraken auton oude egnōken auton
teknia mēdeis planatō umas o poiōn tēn dikaiosunēn dikaios estin kathōs ekeinos dikaios estin
o poiōn tēn amartian ek tou diabolou estin oti ap archēs o diabolos amartanei eis touto ephanerōthē o uios tou theou ina lusē ta erga tou diabolou
pas o gegennēmenos ek tou theou amartian ou poiei oti sperma autou en autō menei kai ou dunatai amartanein oti ek tou theou gegennētai
en toutō phanera estin ta tekna tou theou kai ta tekna tou diabolou pas o mē poiōn dikaiosunēn ouk estin ek tou theou kai o mē agapōn ton adelphon autou
oti autē estin ē angelia ēn ēkousate ap archēs ina agapōmen allēlous
ou kathōs kain ek tou ponērou ēn kai esphaxen ton adelphon autou kai charin tinos esphaxen auton oti ta erga autou ponēra ēn ta de tou adelphou autou dikaia
mē thaumazete adelphoi mou ei misei umas o kosmos
ēmeis oidamen oti metabebēkamen ek tou thanatou eis tēn zōēn oti agapōmen tous adelphous o mē agapōn ton adelphon menei en tō thanatō
pas o misōn ton adelphon autou anthrōpoktonos estin kai oidate oti pas anthrōpoktonos ouk echei zōēn aiōnion en autō menousan
en toutō egnōkamen tēn agapēn tou theou oti ekeinos uper ēmōn tēn psuchēn autou ethēken kai ēmeis opheilomen uper tōn adelphōn tas psuchas tithenai
os d an echē ton bion tou kosmou kai theōrē ton adelphon autou chreian echonta kai kleisē ta splanchna autou ap autou pōs ē agapē tou theou menei en autō
teknia mou mē agapōmen logō mēde glōssē all ergō kai alētheia
kai en toutō ginōskomen oti ek tēs alētheias esmen kai emprosthen autou peisomen tas kardias ēmōn
oti ean kataginōskē ēmōn ē kardia oti meizōn estin o theos tēs kardias ēmōn kai ginōskei panta
agapētoi ean ē kardia ēmōn mē kataginōskē ēmōn parrēsian echomen pros ton theon
kai o ean aitōmen lambanomen par autou oti tas entolas autou tēroumen kai ta aresta enōpion autou poioumen
kai autē estin ē entolē autou ina pisteusōmen tō onomati tou uiou autou iēsou christou kai agapōmen allēlous kathōs edōken entolēn ēmin
kai o tērōn tas entolas autou en autō menei kai autos en autō kai en toutō ginōskomen oti menei en ēmin ek tou pneumatos ou ēmin edōken
agapētoi mē panti pneumati pisteuete alla dokimazete ta pneumata ei ek tou theou estin oti polloi pseudoprophētai exelēluthasin eis ton kosmon
en toutō ginōskete to pneuma tou theou pan pneuma o omologei iēsoun christon en sarki elēluthota ek tou theou estin
kai pan pneuma o mē omologei ton iēsoun christon en sarki elēluthota ek tou theou ouk estin kai touto estin to tou antichristou o akēkoate oti erchetai kai nun en tō kosmō estin ēdē
umeis ek tou theou este teknia kai nenikēkate autous oti meizōn estin o en umin ē o en tō kosmō
autoi ek tou kosmou eisin dia touto ek tou kosmou lalousin kai o kosmos autōn akouei
ēmeis ek tou theou esmen o ginōskōn ton theon akouei ēmōn os ouk estin ek tou theou ouk akouei ēmōn ek toutou ginōskomen to pneuma tēs alētheias kai to pneuma tēs planēs
pas o pisteuōn oti iēsous estin o christos ek tou theou gegennētai kai pas o agapōn ton gennēsanta agapa kai ton gegennēmenon ex autou
en toutō ginōskomen oti agapōmen ta tekna tou theou otan ton theon agapōmen kai tas entolas autou tērōmen
autē gar estin ē agapē tou theou ina tas entolas autou tērōmen kai ai entolai autou bareiai ouk eisin
oti pan to gegennēmenon ek tou theou nika ton kosmon kai autē estin ē nikē ē nikēsasa ton kosmon ē pistis ēmōn
tis estin o nikōn ton kosmon ei mē o pisteuōn oti iēsous estin o uios tou theou
outos estin o elthōn di udatos kai aimatos iēsous o christos ouk en tō udati monon all en tō udati kai tō aimati kai to pneuma estin to marturoun oti to pneuma estin ē alētheia
oti treis eisin oi marturountes en tō ouranō o patēr o logos kai to agion pneuma kai outoi oi treis en eisin
kai treis eisin oi marturountes en tē gē to pneuma kai to udōr kai to aima kai oi treis eis to en eisin
ei tēn marturian tōn anthrōpōn lambanomen ē marturia tou theou meizōn estin oti autē estin ē marturia tou theou ēn memarturēken peri tou uiou autou
o pisteuōn eis ton uion tou theou echei tēn marturian en eautō o mē pisteuōn tō theō pseustēn pepoiēken auton oti ou pepisteuken eis tēn marturian ēn memarturēken o theos peri tou uiou autou
kai autē estin ē marturia oti zōēn aiōnion edōken ēmin o theos kai autē ē zōē en tō uiō autou estin
o echōn ton uion echei tēn zōēn o mē echōn ton uion tou theou tēn zōēn ouk echei
tauta egrapsa umin tois pisteuousin eis to onoma tou uiou tou theou ina eidēte oti zōēn echete aiōnion kai ina pisteuēte eis to onoma tou uiou tou theou
kai autē estin ē parrēsia ēn echomen pros auton oti ean ti aitōmetha kata to thelēma autou akouei ēmōn
kai ean oidamen oti akouei ēmōn o an aitōmetha oidamen oti echomen ta aitēmata a ētēkamen par autou
ean tis idē ton adelphon autou amartanonta amartian mē pros thanaton aitēsei kai dōsei autō zōēn tois amartanousin mē pros thanaton estin amartia pros thanaton ou peri ekeinēs legō ina erōtēsē
pasa adikia amartia estin kai estin amartia ou pros thanaton
oidamen oti pas o gegennēmenos ek tou theou ouch amartanei all o gennētheis ek tou theou tērei eauton kai o ponēros ouch aptetai autou
oidamen oti ek tou theou esmen kai o kosmos olos en tō ponērō keitai
oidamen de oti o uios tou theou ēkei kai dedōken ēmin dianoian ina ginōskōmen ton alēthinon kai esmen en tō alēthinō en tō uiō autou iēsou christō outos estin o alēthinos theos kai ē zōē aiōnios
teknia phulaxate eautous apo tōn eidōlōn amēn

name: ΙΩΑΝΝΟΥ Β΄
chapters: o presbuteros eklektē kuria kai tois teknois autēs ous egō agapō en alētheia kai ouk egō monos alla kai pantes oi egnōkotes tēn alētheian
dia tēn alētheian tēn menousan en ēmin kai meth ēmōn estai eis ton aiōna
estai meth umōn charis eleos eirēnē para theou patros kai para kuriou iēsou christou tou uiou tou patros en alētheia kai agapē
echarēn lian oti eurēka ek tōn teknōn sou peripatountas en alētheia kathōs entolēn elabomen para tou patros
kai nun erōtō se kuria ouch ōs entolēn graphōn soi kainēn alla ēn eichomen ap archēs ina agapōmen allēlous
kai autē estin ē agapē ina peripatōmen kata tas entolas autou autē estin ē entolē kathōs ēkousate ap archēs ina en autē peripatēte
oti polloi planoi eisēlthon eis ton kosmon oi mē omologountes iēsoun christon erchomenon en sarki outos estin o planos kai o antichristos
blepete eautous ina mē apolesōmen a eirgasametha alla misthon plērē apolabōmen
pas o parabainōn kai mē menōn en tē didachē tou christou theon ouk echei o menōn en tē didachē tou christou outos kai ton patera kai ton uion echei
ei tis erchetai pros umas kai tautēn tēn didachēn ou pherei mē lambanete auton eis oikian kai chairein autō mē legete
o gar legōn autō chairein koinōnei tois ergois autou tois ponērois
polla echōn umin graphein ouk ēboulēthēn dia chartou kai melanos alla elpizō elthein pros umas kai stoma pros stoma lalēsai ina ē chara ēmōn ē peplērōmenē
aspazetai se ta tekna tēs adelphēs sou tēs eklektēs amēn

name: ΙΩΑΝΝΟΥ Γ΄
chapters: o presbuteros gaiō tō agapētō on egō agapō en alētheia
agapēte peri pantōn euchomai se euodousthai kai ugiainein kathōs euodoutai sou ē psuchē
echarēn gar lian erchomenōn adelphōn kai marturountōn sou tē alētheia kathōs su en alētheia peripateis
meizoteran toutōn ouk echō charan ina akouō ta ema tekna en alētheia peripatounta
agapēte piston poieis o ean ergasē eis tous adelphous kai eis tous xenous
oi emarturēsan sou tē agapē enōpion ekklēsias ous kalōs poiēseis propempsas axiōs tou theou
uper gar tou onomatos autou exēlthon mēden lambanontes apo tōn ethnōn
ēmeis oun opheilomen apolambanein tous toioutous ina sunergoi ginōmetha tē alētheia
egrapsa tē ekklēsia all o philoprōteuōn autōn diotrephēs ouk epidechetai ēmas

dia touto ean elthō upomnēsō autou ta erga a poiei logois ponērois phluarōn ēmas kai mē arkoumenos epi toutois oute autos epidechetai tous adelphous kai tous boulomenous kōluei kai ek tēs ekklēsias ekballei
agapēte mē mimou to kakon alla to agathon o agathopoiōn ek tou theou estin o de kakopoiōn ouch eōraken ton theon
dēmētriō memarturētai upo pantōn kai up autēs tēs alētheias kai ēmeis de marturoumen kai oidate oti ē marturia ēmōn alēthēs estin
polla eichon graphein all ou thelō dia melanos kai kalamou soi grapsai
elpizō de eutheōs idein se kai stoma pros stoma lalēsomen eirēnē soi aspazontai se oi philoi aspazou tous philous kat onoma

name: ΙΟΥΔΑ
chapters: ioudas iēsou christou doulos adelphos de iakōbou tois en theō patri ēgiasmenois kai iēsou christō tetērēmenois klētois
eleos umin kai eirēnē kai agapē plēthuntheiē
agapētoi pasan spoudēn poioumenos graphein umin peri tēs koinēs sōtērias anankēn eschon grapsai umin parakalōn epagōnizesthai tē apax paradotheisē tois agiois pistei

pareisedusan gar tines anthrōpoi oi palai progegrammenoi eis touto to krima asebeis tēn tou theou ēmōn charin metatithentes eis aselgeian kai ton monon despotēn theon kai kurion ēmōn iēsoun christon arnoumenoi
upomnēsai de umas boulomai eidotas umas apax touto oti o kurios laon ek gēs aiguptou sōsas to deuteron tous mē pisteusantas apōlesen
angelous te tous mē tērēsantas tēn eautōn archēn alla apolipontas to idion oikētērion eis krisin megalēs ēmeras desmois aidiois upo zophon tetērēken
ōs sodoma kai gomorra kai ai peri autas poleis ton omoion toutois tropon ekporneusasai kai apelthousai opisō sarkos eteras prokeintai deigma puros aiōniou dikēn upechousai
omoiōs mentoi kai outoi enupniazomenoi sarka men miainousin kuriotēta de athetousin doxas de blasphēmousin
o de michaēl o archangelos ote tō diabolō diakrinomenos dielegeto peri tou mōseōs sōmatos ouk etolmēsen krisin epenenkein blasphēmias all eipen epitimēsai soi kurios
outoi de osa men ouk oidasin blasphēmousin osa de phusikōs ōs ta aloga zōa epistantai en toutois phtheirontai
ouai autois oti tē odō tou kain eporeuthēsan kai tē planē tou balaam misthou exechuthēsan kai tē antilogia tou kore apōlonto
outoi eisin en tais agapais umōn spilades suneuōchoumenoi umin aphobōs eautous poimainontes nephelai anudroi upo anemōn peripheromenai dendra phthinopōrina akarpa dis apothanonta ekrizōthenta
kumata agria thalassēs epaphrizonta tas eautōn aischunas asteres planētai ois o zophos tou skotous eis ton aiōna tetērētai
proephēteusen de kai toutois ebdomos apo adam enōch legōn idou ēlthen kurios en muriasin agiais autou
poiēsai krisin kata pantōn kai exelegxai pantas tous asebeis autōn peri pantōn tōn ergōn asebeias autōn ōn ēsebēsan kai peri pantōn tōn sklērōn ōn elalēsan kat autou amartōloi asebeis
outoi eisin gongustai mempsimoiroi kata tas epithumias autōn poreuomenoi kai to stoma autōn lalei uperonka thaumazontes prosōpa ōpheleias charin
umeis de agapētoi mnēsthēte tōn rēmatōn tōn proeirēmenōn upo tōn apostolōn tou kuriou ēmōn iēsou christou
oti elegon umin oti en eschatō chronō esontai empaiktai kata tas eautōn epithumias poreuomenoi tōn asebeiōn
outoi eisin oi apodiorizontes eautous psuchikoi pneuma mē echontes
umeis de agapētoi tē agiōtatē umōn pistei epoikodomountes eautous en pneumati agiō proseuchomenoi
eautous en agapē theou tērēsate prosdechomenoi to eleos tou kuriou ēmōn iēsou christou eis zōēn aiōnion
ous de en phobō sōzete ek tou puros arpazontes misountes kai ton apo tēs sarkos espilōmenon chitōna
tō de dunamenō phulaxai umas aptaistous kai stēsai katenōpion tēs doxēs autou amōmous en agalliasei
monō sophō theō sōtēri ēmōn doxa kai megalōsunē kratos kai exousia kai nun kai eis pantas tous aiōnas amēn

name: ΑΠΟΚΑΛΥΨΙΣ ΙΩΑΝΝΟΥ
chapters: apokalupsis iēsou christou ēn edōken autō o theos deixai tois doulois autou a dei genesthai en tachei kai esēmanen aposteilas dia tou angelou autou tō doulō autou iōannē
os emarturēsen ton logon tou theou kai tēn marturian iēsou christou osa te eiden
makarios o anaginōskōn kai oi akouontes tous logous tēs prophēteias kai tērountes ta en autē gegrammena o gar kairos engus
iōannēs tais epta ekklēsiais tais en tē asia charis umin kai eirēnē apo tou o ōn kai o ēn kai o erchomenos kai apo tōn epta pneumatōn a estin enōpion tou thronou autou
kai apo iēsou christou o martus o pistos o prōtotokos ek tōn nekrōn kai o archōn tōn basileōn tēs gēs tō agapēsanti ēmas kai lousanti ēmas apo tōn amartiōn ēmōn en tō aimati autou
kai epoiēsen ēmas basileis kai iereis tō theō kai patri autou autō ē doxa kai to kratos eis tous aiōnas tōn aiōnōn amēn
idou erchetai meta tōn nephelōn kai opsetai auton pas ophthalmos kai oitines auton exekentēsan kai kopsontai ep auton pasai ai phulai tēs gēs nai amēn
egō eimi to a kai to ō archē kai telos legei o kurios o ōn kai o ēn kai o erchomenos o pantokratōr

egō iōannēs o kai adelphos umōn kai sunkoinōnos en tē thlipsei kai en tē basileia kai upomonē iēsou christou egenomēn en tē nēsō tē kaloumenē patmō dia ton logon tou theou kai dia tēn marturian iēsou christou
egenomēn en pneumati en tē kuriakē ēmera kai ēkousa opisō mou phōnēn megalēn ōs salpingos

legousēs egō eimi to a kai to ō o prōtos kai o eschatos kai o blepeis grapson eis biblion kai pempson tais epta ekklēsiais tais en asia eis epheson kai eis smurnan kai eis pergamon kai eis thuateira kai eis sardeis kai eis philadelpheian kai eis laodikeian
kai epestrepsa blepein tēn phōnēn ētis elalēsen met emou kai epistrepsas eidon epta luchnias chrusas
kai en mesō tōn epta luchniōn omoion uiō anthrōpou endedumenon podērē kai periezōsmenon pros tois mastois zōnēn chrusēn
ē de kephalē autou kai ai triches leukai ōsei erion leukon ōs chiōn kai oi ophthalmoi autou ōs phlox puros
kai oi podes autou omoioi chalkolibanō ōs en kaminō pepurōmenoi kai ē phōnē autou ōs phōnē udatōn pollōn
kai echōn en tē dexia autou cheiri asteras epta kai ek tou stomatos autou romphaia distomos oxeia ekporeuomenē kai ē opsis autou ōs o ēlios phainei en tē dunamei autou
kai ote eidon auton epesa pros tous podas autou ōs nekros kai epethēken tēn dexian autou cheira ep eme legōn moi mē phobou egō eimi o prōtos kai o eschatos
kai o zōn kai egenomēn nekros kai idou zōn eimi eis tous aiōnas tōn aiōnōn amēn kai echō tas kleis tou adou kai tou thanatou
grapson a eides kai a eisin kai a mellei ginesthai meta tauta
to mustērion tōn epta asterōn ōn eides epi tēs dexias mou kai tas epta luchnias tas chrusas oi epta asteres angeloi tōn epta ekklēsiōn eisin kai ai epta luchniai as eides epta ekklēsiai eisin
tō angelō tēs ephesinēs ekklēsias grapson tade legei o kratōn tous epta asteras en tē dexia autou o peripatōn en mesō tōn epta luchniōn tōn chrusōn
oida ta erga sou kai ton kopon sou kai tēn upomonēn sou kai oti ou dunē bastasai kakous kai epeirasō tous phaskontas einai apostolous kai ouk eisin kai eures autous pseudeis
kai ebastasas kai upomonēn echeis kai dia to onoma mou kekopiakas kai ou kekmēkas
all echō kata sou oti tēn agapēn sou tēn prōtēn aphēkas
mnēmoneue oun pothen ekpeptōkas kai metanoēson kai ta prōta erga poiēson ei de mē erchomai soi tachu kai kinēsō tēn luchnian sou ek tou topou autēs ean mē metanoēsēs
alla touto echeis oti miseis ta erga tōn nikolaitōn a kagō misō
o echōn ous akousatō ti to pneuma legei tais ekklēsiais tō nikōnti dōsō autō phagein ek tou xulou tēs zōēs o estin en mesō tou paradeisou tou theou
kai tō angelō tēs ekklēsias smurnaiōn grapson tade legei o prōtos kai o eschatos os egeneto nekros kai ezēsen
